+          cardType: "ImageCard",
+          pluginId: "chips.basecard.image",
+          baseCardId: "image-1",
+        },
+      }) as any),
+    );
+
+    const previousWindow = (globalThis as any).window;
+    const previousDocument = (globalThis as any).document;
+
+    try {
+      const listeners: Array<(event: MessageEvent) => void> = [];
+      const postMessage = vi.fn();
+      let createdFrame: HTMLIFrameElement | undefined;
+
+      (globalThis as any).window = {
+        location: { origin: "https://example.test" },
+        addEventListener: (type: string, listener: (event: MessageEvent) => void) => {
+          if (type === "message") {
+            listeners.push(listener);
+          }
+        },
+        removeEventListener: (type: string, listener: (event: MessageEvent) => void) => {
+          if (type !== "message") {
+            return;
+          }
+          const index = listeners.indexOf(listener);
+          if (index >= 0) {
+            listeners.splice(index, 1);
+          }
+        },
+      };
+
+      (globalThis as any).document = {
+        createElement: (tag: string) => {
+          const el: any = {
+            tagName: tag.toUpperCase(),
+            attrs: {} as Record<string, string>,
+            contentWindow: { postMessage },
+            isConnected: true,
+            setAttribute(name: string, value: string) {
+              this.attrs[name] = value;
+            },
+          };
+          createdFrame = el as HTMLIFrameElement;
+          return el;
+        },
+      };
+
+      const resolveResourceUrl = vi.fn(async (resourcePath: string) => `blob:https://example.test/${resourcePath}`);
+      const importResource = vi.fn(async ({ file, preferredPath }: { file: File; preferredPath?: string }) => ({
+        path: preferredPath ?? file.name,
+      }));
+      const deleteResource = vi.fn(async () => undefined);
+      const releaseResourceUrl = vi.fn();
+
+      await api.editorPanel.render({
+        cardType: "ImageCard",
+        baseCardId: "image-1",
+        resources: {
+          resolveResourceUrl,
+          importResource,
+          deleteResource,
+          releaseResourceUrl,
+        },
+      });
+
+      expect(createdFrame).toBeDefined();
+      expect(listeners).toHaveLength(1);
+
+      const dispatch = async (data: unknown, origin = "null") => {
+        listeners[0]?.({
+          source: createdFrame?.contentWindow,
+          origin,
+          data,
+        } as MessageEvent);
+        await Promise.resolve();
+        await Promise.resolve();
+      };
+
+      await dispatch({
+        type: "chips.card-editor:resource-request",
+        payload: {
+          requestId: "resolve-1",
+          action: "resolve",
+          resourcePath: "./images/demo.png",
+        },
+      });
+      expect(resolveResourceUrl).toHaveBeenCalledWith("images/demo.png");
+      expect(postMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
+        {
+          type: "chips.card-editor:resource-response",
+          payload: {
+            requestId: "resolve-1",
+            ok: true,
+            result: "blob:https://example.test/images/demo.png",
+          },
+        },
+        "*",
+      );
+
+      const file = new File(["image"], "cover.png", { type: "image/png" });
+      await dispatch({
+        type: "chips.card-editor:resource-request",
+        payload: {
+          requestId: "import-1",
+          action: "import",
+          preferredPath: "images/cover.png",
+          file,
+        },
+      });
+      expect(importResource).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+        file,
+        preferredPath: "images/cover.png",
+      });
+      expect(postMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
+        {
+          type: "chips.card-editor:resource-response",
+          payload: {
+            requestId: "import-1",
+            ok: true,
+            result: { path: "images/cover.png" },
+          },
+        },
+        "*",
+      );
+
+      await dispatch({
+        type: "chips.card-editor:resource-request",
+        payload: {
+          requestId: "delete-1",
+          action: "delete",
+          resourcePath: "./images/cover.png",
+        },
+      });
+      expect(deleteResource).toHaveBeenCalledWith("images/cover.png");
+      expect(postMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
+        {
+          type: "chips.card-editor:resource-response",
+          payload: {
+            requestId: "delete-1",
+            ok: true,
+            result: null,
+          },
+        },
+        "*",
+      );
+
+      await dispatch({
+        type: "chips.card-editor:resource-release",
+        payload: {
+          resourcePath: "./images/cover.png",
+        },
+      });
+      expect(releaseResourceUrl).toHaveBeenCalledWith("images/cover.png");
+    } finally {
+      (globalThis as any).window = previousWindow;
+      (globalThis as any).document = previousDocument;
+    }
+  });
+
+  it("uses rootPath as the fallback editor resource resolver", async () => {
+    const api = createCardApi(
+      createStubClient(async () => ({
+        view: {
+          title: "ImageCard Editor",
+          body: "<div>editor</div>",
+          cardType: "ImageCard",
+          pluginId: "chips.basecard.image",
+          baseCardId: "image-1",
+        },
+      }) as any),
+    );
+
+    const previousWindow = (globalThis as any).window;
+    const previousDocument = (globalThis as any).document;
+
+    try {
+      const listeners: Array<(event: MessageEvent) => void> = [];
+      const postMessage = vi.fn();
+      let createdFrame: HTMLIFrameElement | undefined;
+
+      (globalThis as any).window = {
+        location: { origin: "https://example.test" },
+        addEventListener: (type: string, listener: (event: MessageEvent) => void) => {
+          if (type === "message") {
+            listeners.push(listener);
+          }
+        },
+        removeEventListener: () => {},
+      };
+
+      (globalThis as any).document = {
+        createElement: (tag: string) => {
+          const el: any = {
+            tagName: tag.toUpperCase(),
+            attrs: {} as Record<string, string>,
+            contentWindow: { postMessage },
+            isConnected: true,
+            setAttribute(name: string, value: string) {
+              this.attrs[name] = value;
+            },
+          };
+          createdFrame = el as HTMLIFrameElement;
+          return el;
+        },
+      };
+
+      await api.editorPanel.render({
+        cardType: "ImageCard",
+        resources: {
+          rootPath: "/workspace/card-root",
+        },
+      });
+
+      listeners[0]?.({
+        source: createdFrame?.contentWindow,
+        origin: "null",
+        data: {
+          type: "chips.card-editor:resource-request",
+          payload: {
+            requestId: "resolve-root",
+            action: "resolve",
+            resourcePath: "images/cover photo.png",
+          },
+        },
+      } as MessageEvent);
+
+      await Promise.resolve();
+      await Promise.resolve();
+
+      expect(postMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
+        {
+          type: "chips.card-editor:resource-response",
+          payload: {
+            requestId: "resolve-root",
+            ok: true,
+            result: "file:///workspace/card-root/images/cover%20photo.png",
+          },
+        },
+        "*",
+      );
+    } finally {
+      (globalThis as any).window = previousWindow;
+      (globalThis as any).document = previousDocument;
+    }
+  });
```

```
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0 seconds
Output:
import fs from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";
import { describe, it, expect } from "vitest";

interface RouteDescriptorMeta {
  action: string;
  schemaIn?: string;
  schemaOut?: string;
  idempotent?: boolean;
  timeoutMs?: number;
}

interface RouteManifest {
  routes: Record<string, RouteDescriptorMeta>;
}

function loadRouteManifest(): RouteManifest {
  const manifestPath = path.resolve(__dirname, "..", "..", "src", "contracts", "route-manifest.json");
  const raw = fs.readFileSync(manifestPath, "utf-8");
  return JSON.parse(raw) as RouteManifest;
}

function listSourceFiles(rootDir: string): string[] {
  const entries = fs.readdirSync(rootDir, { withFileTypes: true });
  const files: string[] = [];

  for (const entry of entries) {
    const fullPath = path.join(rootDir, entry.name);
    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
      files.push(...listSourceFiles(fullPath));
    } else if (entry.isFile() && entry.name.endsWith(".ts")) {
      files.push(fullPath);
    }
  }

  return files;
}

function collectInvokedActions(srcRoot: string): Set<string> {
  const files = listSourceFiles(srcRoot);
  const actions = new Set<string>();

  const pattern =
    /client\.invoke\s*(?:<[^>]+>)?\s*\(\s*["']([^"']+)["']/g;

  for (const file of files) {
    const source = fs.readFileSync(file, "utf-8");
    let match: RegExpExecArray | null;
    // eslint-disable-next-line no-cond-assign
    while ((match = pattern.exec(source)) !== null) {
      const action = match[1];
      if (action) {
        actions.add(action);
      }
    }
  }

  return actions;
}

describe("route-manifest contract drift", () => {
  it("contains all actions used by SDK client wrappers", () => {
    const manifest = loadRouteManifest();
    const manifestActions = new Set(Object.keys(manifest.routes));

    const srcRoot = path.resolve(__dirname, "..", "..", "src");
    const usedActions = collectInvokedActions(srcRoot);

    const missing: string[] = [];
    for (const action of usedActions) {
      if (!manifestActions.has(action)) {
        missing.push(action);
      }
    }

    expect(missing).toEqual([]);
  });
});
```
</details></tool-use>

# хНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢х╝АхПС

## цжВш┐░

хНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢ф╕║хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПРф╛Ыц╕▓цЯУхТМч╝Цш╛СшГ╜хКЫуАВцпПф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч▒╗хЮЛхп╣х║Фф╕Аф╕кхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢я╝МхоЪф╣Йшпеч▒╗хЮЛхНбчЙЗхЬицЯечЬЛхЩиуАБщАЪчФи Host цЙШчобч╝Цш╛СхЩия╝Мф╗ехПКхоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОф╕нчЪДцнгх╝ПшбМф╕║уАВ

х╜УхЙНцнгх╝ПщУ╛ш╖пцЬЙф╕дч▒╗ц╢Иш┤╣шАЕя╝Ъ

- Host щАЪчФищУ╛ш╖пя╝ЪщАЪш┐З `card.render/card.renderEditor` ф╕О SDK `compositeWindow/editorPanel` ц╢Иш┤╣я╝Ы
- хоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОщУ╛ш╖пя╝ЪщАЪш┐ЗщЭЩцАБц│ихЖМчЪД `BasecardDescriptor` чЫ┤цОец╢Иш┤╣хРМф╕Ач╗ДцПТф╗╢хп╝хЗ║уАВ

хЫацндя╝МхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢х┐Ещб╗цККтАЬхЖЕхо╣ц╕▓цЯУ/ч╝Цш╛СшГ╜хКЫтАЭхЖЩцИРхПпхдНчФичЪДч║пцМВш╜╜хЗ╜цХ░я╝МшАМф╕НцШпцККш┐РшбМцЧ╢хБЗшо╛хЖЩцн╗хЬицЯРф╕Аф╕кхо┐ф╕╗щЗМуАВ

## цПТф╗╢ч╗УцЮД

хНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢шЗ│х░Сх║ФхМЕхРлф╗еф╕ЛцибхЭЧя╝Ъ

- `manifest.yaml`
- `src/index.ts`
- `src/render/`
- `src/editor/`
- `src/schema/`
- `src/shared/`
- ц╡ЛшпХчЫох╜Хф╕Очд║ф╛ЛцХ░цНо

цОишНРч╗УцЮДя╝Ъ

```text

  index.ts
  render/
    view.tsx
    runtime.ts
  editor/
    panel.tsx
    runtime.ts
  schema/

## manifest щЕНч╜о

хНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢чЪД `manifest.yaml` х┐Ещб╗ц╗бш╢│ф╗еф╕ЛшжБц▒Вя╝Ъ

- `type: card`
- `capabilities.cardTypes` цШОчбохг░цШОцФпцМБчЪДхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч▒╗хЮЛ
- `entry` цМЗхРСцЮДх╗║ф║зчЙйхЕехПгя╝Мф╛ЛхжВ `dist/index.mjs`

чд║ф╛Ля╝Ъ

```yaml
id: chips.basecard.richtext
name: хпМцЦЗцЬмхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢
version: 0.1.0

entry: dist/index.mjs

```

ч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- `capabilities.cardTypes` цШп Host хИЖхПСф╕Оч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОцППш┐░чмжцШах░ДчЪДч╗Яф╕Аф╛ЭцНоя╝Ы
- шЛецПТф╗╢щЬАшжБхЕ╝хо╣ `RichTextCard -> base.richtext` ш┐Щч▒╗хИлхРНя╝Мх║ФхЬихо┐ф╕╗цППш┐░чмжх▒ВхдДчРЖя╝Мф╕Нх║ФцККхИлхРНхИдцЦнцХгшР╜хЬиф╕ЪхКбч╗Дф╗╢ф╕нуАВ

## цнгх╝Пхп╝хЗ║хеСч║ж

хНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢хЕехПгх┐Ещб╗хп╝хЗ║ф╗еф╕Лцнгх╝ПшГ╜хКЫя╝Ъ

```ts

```

- цЙАцЬЙц╕ЕчРЖщА╗ш╛СщГ╜х┐Ещб╗хЬиш┐ФхЫЮчЪД cleanup ф╕нщЧнчОпуАВ

## цЯечЬЛцАБц╕▓цЯУх╝АхПС

цЯечЬЛцАБц╕▓цЯУчЪДцнгх╝ПшБМш┤гцШпя╝Ъца╣цНощЕНч╜оцККхЖЕхо╣цМВш╜╜хИ░ч╗ЩхоЪхо╣хЩиуАВ

цОишНРхоЮчО░цЦ╣х╝Пя╝Ъ

1. хЬи `render/view.tsx` ф╕нхИЫх╗║ч║п DOM ч╗УцЮДя╝Ы
2. хЬи `render/runtime.ts` ф╕нхдДчРЖф╕╗щвШ CSS ц│ихЕеуАБца╣шКВчВ╣цМВш╜╜ф╕Оц╕ЕчРЖя╝Ы
3. хЬи `src/index.ts` ф╕нцКК `renderBasecardView` цЪ┤щЬ▓ч╗Щхо┐ф╕╗уАВ

цЯечЬЛцАБч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- ф╕НчЫ┤цОехБЗхоЪхдЦх▒Вф╕АхоЪцЬЙш╛╣цбЖуАБхЬЖшзТцИЦхНбчЙЗхг│х▒Вя╝Ы
- хЖЕхо╣хо╜х║жф╗ехо┐ф╕╗цПРф╛ЫчЪДхо╣хЩиф╕║хЗЖя╝Ы
- ф╕╗щвШщвЬшЙ▓уАБш╛╣цбЖуАБцЦЗцЬмшЙ▓ф╝ШхЕИф╜┐чФи `--chips-*` tokenя╝Ы
- хо┐ф╕╗хПпшГ╜цККшпехп╝хЗ║цМВш╜╜хЬи Host чФЯцИРчЪД iframe цЦЗцбгф╕ня╝Мф╣ЯхПпшГ╜цМВш╜╜хЬич╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОхИЫх╗║чЪДхНХхНб iframe ф╕нуАВ

## ч╝Цш╛СхЩих╝АхПС

ч╝Цш╛СхЩичЪДцнгх╝ПшБМш┤гцШпя╝ЪцККщЕНч╜оч╝Цш╛С UI цМВш╜╜хИ░ч╗ЩхоЪхо╣хЩия╝Мх╣╢щАЪш┐З `onChange` ш╛УхЗ║цЦ░щЕНч╜оуАВ

4. щАЪш┐З `onChange` ш╛УхЗ║цЦ░чЪДщЕНч╜ох┐лчЕзуАВ

ч╝Цш╛СхЩич║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- ф╕НчЫ┤цОеш░ГчФи `CardService`уАБBridge хЖЩцЦЗф╗╢цИЦхЕ╢ф╗ЦцМБф╣ЕхМЦцОехПгя╝Ы

- ф╕НшжБц▒Вхо┐ф╕╗х┐Ещб╗цПРф╛Ы iframe ф║Лф╗╢цбея╝Ы
- шЛещЬАшжБщФАцпБщА╗ш╛Ся╝Мх┐Ещб╗щАЪш┐Зца╣шКВчВ╣ cleanup цИЦцШ╛х╝ПщФАцпБхЗ╜цХ░щЧнчОпуАВ

## ф╕Охо┐ф╕╗щУ╛ш╖пчЪДхЕ│ч│╗

шп┤цШОя╝Ъ

- `coverFrame` ш┐ФхЫЮхНбчЙЗх░БщЭв iframeя╝Иф╕ЛцЦ╣цШ╛чд║хНбчЙЗхРНчз░я╝ЙуАВ
- `compositeWindow` ш┐ФхЫЮхдНхРИхНбчЙЗ iframe чкЧхПгуАВ
- `compositeWindow.mode` хПкхЕБшо╕ `view | preview`уАВ
- `compositeWindow.interactionPolicy` хПкхЕБшо╕ `native | delegate`я╝Мщ╗Шшодх║Фф┐ЭцМБ `native`уАВ
- `compositeWindow.mode = 'preview'` цЧ╢я╝МхПпщАЪш┐Зф║Лф╗╢шовщШЕцОецФ╢хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗшКВчВ╣щАЙф╕нф║Лф╗╢уАВ
- `compositeWindow` хПпщАЪш┐З `onResize` шовщШЕцХ┤х╝ахдНхРИхНбчЙЗх╜УхЙНцА╗щлШх║жя╝Мцнгх╝ПчФиф║ОцЯечЬЛхЩиуАБшЗкщАВх║Фхо╣хЩиф╗ехПКф╗НщАЙцЛй Host цЙШчобхдНхРИ iframe чЪДхЬ║цЩпуАВ
- `compositeWindow.interactionPolicy = 'delegate'` цЧ╢я╝МхПпщАЪш┐З `onInteraction` шовщШЕхдНхРИхНбчЙЗхЖЕщГиц╗Ъш╜оуАБшзжцС╕ц╗ЪхКихТМцНПхРИч╝йцФ╛цДПхЫ╛я╝Мцнгх╝ПчФиф║ОцЧащЩРчФ╗х╕ГчнЙщЬАшжБхдЦх▒Вхг│х▒ВцОечобцбМщЭвф║дф║ТчЪДхЬ║цЩпуАВ
- `editorPanel` ш┐ФхЫЮхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч╝Цш╛СхЩи iframeя╝Мцнгх╝ПчФиф║Очммф╕ЙцЦ╣хо┐ф╕╗уАБш░ГшпХх╖ехЕ╖хТМф╗НщЬА Host цЙШчобч╝Цш╛СхЩи iframe чЪДхЬ║цЩпуАВ
- хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗхИЖхПСуАБцибцЭ┐ч╝ЦшпСуАБiframe цЛ╝цОечФ▒ Host хЖЕч╜оц╕▓цЯУш┐РшбМцЧ╢хоМцИРя╝ЫSDK ф╗Ех░БшгЕш░ГчФихЕехПгуАВ

щАВчФиш╛╣чХМшбехЕЕя╝Ъ

- `compositeWindow + editorPanel` ф╗НцШпчФЯцАБхп╣хдЦхЕмх╝АчЪДщАЪчФи SDK цОехПгя╝Ы
- хоШцЦ╣ `Chips-EditingEngine` чЪДч╝Цш╛СцАБцнгх╝ПщУ╛ш╖пф╕НхЖНф╗еш┐Щф╕дф╕кцОехПгф╜Ьф╕║ф╕╗ш╖пх╛Дя╝МшАМцШпцФ╣чФицЬмхЬ░хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗш┐РшбМцЧ╢я╝Ы
- шЛеф╕НцШпхоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОя╝Мф╕Нх╛ЧцНоцндхдНхИ╢чммф║МхеЧцЬмхЬ░ш┐РшбМцЧ╢уАВ

хдНхРИхНбчЙЗщвДшзИцибх╝ПцОишНРф║Лф╗╢шовщШЕцОехПгя╝Ъ

```typescript
const preview = await client.card.compositeWindow.render({
  cardFile: '/workspace/demo.card',
  mode: 'preview',
  interactionPolicy: 'delegate',
});

const disposeResize = client.card.compositeWindow.onResize(preview.frame, (payload) => {
  console.log(payload.height, payload.reason);
});

const disposeNodeSelect = client.card.compositeWindow.onNodeSelect(preview.frame, (payload) => {
  console.log(payload.nodeId, payload.cardType, payload.pluginId);
});

const disposeInteraction = client.card.compositeWindow.onInteraction(preview.frame, (payload) => {
  console.log(payload.intent, payload.deltaX, payload.deltaY, payload.zoomDelta);
});
```

`onInteraction` ш╜╜шН╖шп┤цШОя╝Ъ

- `intent = 'scroll'`я╝Ъшбичд║хдНхРИхНбчЙЗхЖЕщГихПСчФЯф║ЖщЬАшжБчФ▒хдЦх▒Вхг│х▒Вц╢Иш┤╣чЪДц╗ЪхКицДПхЫ╛я╝Ы
- `intent = 'zoom'`я╝Ъшбичд║хдНхРИхНбчЙЗхЖЕщГихПСчФЯф║ЖцНПхРИцИЦчнЙф╗╖ч╝йцФ╛цДПхЫ╛я╝Ы
- `source` чФиф║ОхМ║хИЖф║Лф╗╢цЭешЗкхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗ iframeуАБхдНхРИхг│х▒Вш┐ШцШпщЩНч║зшКВчВ╣я╝Ы
- `clientX/clientY` цШпчЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхдНхРИ iframe шзЖхПгчЪДхЭРцаЗя╝Мх║ФчФишЛешжБцККч╝йцФ╛щФЪхоЪхИ░хдЦх▒ВцбМщЭвхЭРцаЗя╝Мх║ФхЕИхКаф╕КхдЦх▒В iframe шЗкш║лчЪД `getBoundingClientRect().left/top`уАВ

### хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч╝Цш╛СхЩищЭвцЭ┐

Host цЙШчобч╝Цш╛СхЩищУ╛ш╖пхжВф╕Ля╝Ъ

1. х║ФчФичбохоЪх╜УхЙНхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗ `cardType/baseCardId/config`я╝Ы
2. ш░ГчФи `client.card.editorPanel.render(...)`я╝Ы
3. Host ш╖пчФ▒хИ░хп╣х║ФхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢чЪД `renderBasecardEditor`я╝Ы
4. Host ш┐ФхЫЮхоМцХ┤ч╝Цш╛СхЩицЦЗцбгх╣╢чФ▒ SDK х░БшгЕф╕║ iframeя╝Ы
5. х║ФчФищАЪш┐Зф║Лф╗╢шовщШЕцОецФ╢ч╝Цш╛СхЩичК╢цАБф╕ОщЕНч╜охПШцЫ┤уАВ

цОишНРф║Лф╗╢шовщШЕцОехПгя╝Ъ

```typescript
const result = await client.card.editorPanel.render({
  cardType: 'RichTextCard',
  baseCardId: 'base-1',
  initialConfig: {
    title: 'Hello',
    body: '<p>World</p>',
  },
});

const disposeReady = client.card.editorPanel.onReady(result.frame, () => {
  console.log('editor ready');
});

const disposeChange = client.card.editorPanel.onChange(result.frame, (payload) => {
  console.log(payload.baseCardId, payload.config);
});

const disposeError = client.card.editorPanel.onError(result.frame, (payload) => {
  console.error(payload.code, payload.message);
});
```

ч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- х║ФчФих▒Вф╕Нх╛Чф┐ЭчХЩцЬмхЬ░щ╗Шшодч╝Цш╛СхЩиф╜Ьф╕║цнгх╝Пш╖пх╛ДхЕЬх║Хя╝Ы
- цЩощАЪх║ФчФихТМчммф╕ЙцЦ╣хо┐ф╕╗ф╕Нх╛Чч╗Хш┐З SDK/Host чЫ┤цОе import хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢ц║РчаБя╝Ы

## 3. ца╕х┐ГхеСч║ж

### 3.1 BasecardDescriptor

ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОцЬмхЬ░ш┐РшбМцЧ╢ф╗е `BasecardDescriptor` ф╜Ьф╕║ч╗Яф╕АхЕехПгя╝Ъ

```ts
interface BasecardDescriptor {
  pluginId: string;
  cardType: string;
  displayName: string;
  aliases?: string[];
  commitDebounceMs?: number;
  createInitialConfig(baseCardId: string): Record<string, unknown>;
  normalizeConfig(input: Record<string, unknown>, baseCardId: string): Record<string, unknown>;
  validateConfig(config: Record<string, unknown>): { valid: boolean; errors: Record<string, string> };
  renderView(ctx: {
    container: HTMLElement;
    config: Record<string, unknown>;
    themeCssText?: string;
  }): (() => void) | void;
  renderEditor?(ctx: {
    container: HTMLElement;
    initialConfig: Record<string, unknown>;
    onChange(next: Record<string, unknown>): void;
  }): (() => void) | void;
}
```

### 3.2 BasecardFrameHost

`BasecardFrameHost` ш┤Яш┤гя╝Ъ

- хЬи iframe хЖЕцМВш╜╜ `renderView`я╝Ы

## 10. Host цЙШчобч╝Цш╛СхЩищЭвцЭ┐щУ╛ш╖п

`client.card.editorPanel.render(...)` цШпф╕О `CompositeCardWindow` щЕНхеЧчЪД Host цЙШчобч╝Цш╛СхЩи iframe щУ╛ш╖пя╝МщАВчФиф║Оя╝Ъ

- чммф╕ЙцЦ╣хо┐ф╕╗щЫЖцИРя╝Ы
- щЬАшжБ Host ч╗Яф╕АцЙШчобч╝Цш╛СхЩи iframe чЪДх║ФчФия╝Ы
- ш░ГшпХуАБх╡МхеЧцгАцЯецИЦщЬАшжБф╕еца╝ц▓┐ `chips.card-editor:*` хНПшоощАЪф┐бчЪДхЬ║цЩпуАВ

цаЗхЗЖц╡БчиЛя╝Ъ

1. х║ФчФиш░ГчФи `client.card.editorPanel.render({ cardType, initialConfig, baseCardId })`я╝Ы
2. Host щАЪш┐З `card.renderEditor` ш╖пчФ▒хИ░хп╣х║ФхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢я╝Ы
3. Host шгЕш╜╜цПТф╗╢ `renderBasecardEditor` х╣╢чФЯцИРцнгх╝Пч╝Цш╛СхЩицЦЗцбгя╝Ы
4. SDK цККшпецЦЗцбгх░БшгЕф╕║ iframeя╝Ы
5. х║ФчФищАЪш┐З `chips.card-editor:*` цИЦ SDK ф║Лф╗╢шовщШЕцОецФ╢чК╢цАБф╕ОщЕНч╜охПШхМЦуАВ

ч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- ч╝Цш╛СхЩищУ╛ш╖пф╕ОцШ╛чд║щУ╛ш╖пх┐Ещб╗хЕ▒ф║лхРМф╕АцПТф╗╢шГ╜хКЫхМ╣щЕНшзДхИЩя╝Ы
- цЩощАЪх║ФчФиф╕Очммф╕ЙцЦ╣щЫЖцИРф╕Нх╛Чч╗Хш┐З SDK/Host чЫ┤цОе import хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢ц║РчаБя╝Ы
- цЯечЬЛхЩичнЙ Host цЙШчобхЬ║цЩпх┐Ещб╗ц╢Иш┤╣цнгх╝П iframe ф║Лф╗╢хНПшооя╝МшАМф╕НцШпчзБцОе iframe хЖЕщГи DOMя╝Ы
- хоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОф╕НхЖНцКК `editorPanel` ф╜Ьф╕║хЕ╢цнгх╝Пф╕╗ч╝Цш╛СщУ╛ш╖пуАВ

# хдНхРИхНбчЙЗчкЧхПгф╕О SDK цШ╛чд║щУ╛ш╖пцаЗхЗЖ

## 1. ч╗Дф╗╢хоЪф╣Й

`CompositeCardWindow` цШпчФЯцАБхп╣хдЦхЕмх╝АчЪДщАЪчФихдНхРИхНбчЙЗцШ╛чд║ч╗Дф╗╢я╝МцЬАч╗ИхРСх║ФчФих▒Вф║дф╗Шф╕Аф╕кчФ▒ Host цЙШчобчЪДхдНхРИ iframe чкЧхПгуАВ

щАВчФишМГхЫ┤я╝Ъ

- цЯечЬЛхЩичнЙцЯечЬЛцАБх║ФчФия╝Ы
- щЬАшжБ Host цЙШчобхдНхРИхНбчЙЗцШ╛чд║чЪДх║ФчФицПТф╗╢я╝Ы
- чммф╕ЙцЦ╣щЫЖцИРхЬ║цЩпя╝Ы
- щЬАшжБц╢Иш┤╣цнгх╝П `chips.composite:*` ф║Лф╗╢хНПшоочЪДхЬ║цЩпуАВ

ф╕НщАВчФишМГхЫ┤я╝Ъ

- хоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОчЪДч╝Цш╛СцАБхдНхРИхНбчЙЗчкЧхПгуАВ

ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОчЪДцнгх╝Пч╝Цш╛СцАБщУ╛ш╖пщБ╡х╛к `чФЯцАБхЕ▒чФицКАцЬпцЦЗцбг/ч╗Дф╗╢х║У/08-ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗшгЕщЕНф╕Оч╝Цш╛Сш┐РшбМцЧ╢цаЗхЗЖ.md`уАВ

## 2. щУ╛ш╖пхОЯхИЩ

- щАЪчФих║ФчФих▒Вч╗Яф╕АщАЪш┐З SDK ш░ГчФихНбчЙЗцШ╛чд║цОехПгя╝Ы
- Host цШпщАЪчФихдНхРИхНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУуАБф╕╗щвШшзгцЮРхТМчкЧхПгч╝ЦцОТчЪДхФпф╕АцЙзшбМцЦ╣я╝Ы
- ф╕╗щвШх┐Ещб╗ш┤пчй┐х║ФчФихг│х▒ВуАБхдНхРИхНбчЙЗ iframeуАБхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗ iframe хТМхОЯчФЯчкЧхПгя╝Ы
- щЩдхоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОч╝Цш╛СцАБщУ╛ш╖пхдЦя╝Мф╕НхЕБшо╕х║ФчФих▒ВшЗкшбМхоЮчО░чммф║МхеЧхдНхРИ iframe цЛ╝цОеуАБф╕╗щвШц│ихЕецИЦхЕ╝хо╣хИЖцФпуАВ

## 3. цаЗхЗЖщУ╛ш╖п

1. х║ФчФишО╖х╛ЧхНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢ш╖пх╛Дя╝Ы
2. х║ФчФиш░ГчФи `client.card.compositeWindow.render({ cardFile, mode, interactionPolicy? })`я╝Ы
3. Host шзгцЮРхдНхРИхНбчЙЗч╗УцЮДя╝Ы
4. Host ф╛ЭцНо `capabilities.cardTypes` хИЖхПСхИ░хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢я╝Ы
5. Host ц╕▓цЯУхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗшКВчВ╣ iframeя╝Ы
6. Host цЛ╝цОехдНхРИхНбчЙЗцЦЗцбгх╣╢ш┐ФхЫЮхдНхРИ iframeя╝Ы
7. `CompositeCardWindow` цМВш╜╜цЬАч╗И iframeя╝Ы
8. х╜Уф╕╗щвШш┐РшбМцЧ╢ч╝УхнШщФохПШхМЦцЧ╢я╝М`CompositeCardWindow` щЗНцЦ░шзжхПСцХ┤цЭбц╕▓цЯУщУ╛уАВ

## 4. ф╕╗щвШхРМцнещУ╛ш╖п

цнгх╝Пф╕╗щвШхРМцнещб║х║ПхжВф╕Ля╝Ъ

1. Host `theme.getCurrent/getAllCss/resolve` ф║зхЗ║х╜УхЙНф╕╗щвШх┐лчЕзя╝Ы

5. `CompositeCardWindow` чЫСхРмч╝УхнШщФохПШхМЦхРОщЗНцЦ░ц╕▓цЯУхдНхРИхНбчЙЗ iframeя╝Ы
6. Host хНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУцЬНхКбцККф╕╗щвШхМЕ CSS ф╕ОшзгцЮРхРОчЪДхПШщЗПф╕Ах╣╢ц│ихЕехдНхРИцЦЗцбгхТМхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцЦЗцбгя╝Ы
7. ф╕╗щвШхМЕшЗкш║лчЪД `color-scheme` х┐Ещб╗ф┐ЭчХЩя╝Мф╕Нх╛Чшвлц╕▓цЯУцЬНхКбшжЖчЫЦуАВ

## 8. ш┐РшбМцЧ╢шжБц▒В

- хдЦх▒ВхПкхРСх║ФчФих▒Вф║дф╗Шф╕Аф╕кхдНхРИ iframeя╝Ы
- цпПф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗшКВчВ╣хЬихдНхРИцЦЗцбгхЖЕщГиф┐ЭцМБчЛмчлЛ iframeя╝Мф╗еф╛┐хд▒ш┤ещЪФчж╗хТМх░║хп╕хЫЮф╝ая╝Ы

- хЕищГишКВчВ╣х░▒ч╗кхРОхПСщАБ `chips.composite:ready`я╝Ы
- х╜У `interactionPolicy = 'delegate'` цЧ╢я╝МхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗ iframe ф╕ОхдНхРИхг│х▒ВхЖЕщГихПСчФЯчЪДц╗Ъш╜оуАБшзжцС╕ц╗ЪхКиуАБцНПхРИч╝йцФ╛чнЙцнгх╝Пф║дф║ТцДПхЫ╛я╝Мх┐Ещб╗щАЪш┐З `chips.composite:interaction` хЫЮф╝ахИ░х║ФчФихг│х▒Вя╝Ы
- хдНхРИхНбчЙЗхдДф║О `mode: 'preview'` цЧ╢я╝МхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗшКВчВ╣швлчВ╣хЗ╗хРОх┐Ещб╗хПСщАБ `chips.composite:node-select`я╝Ы
- хНХшКВчВ╣хд▒ш┤ецЧ╢хПСщАБ `chips.composite:node-error`я╝МхРМцЧ╢хЬихп╣х║Фф╜Нч╜ош╛УхЗ║щЩНч║зхЖЕхо╣я╝Ы

`interactionPolicy` ч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- `native`я╝Ъф┐ЭцМБхдНхРИхНбчЙЗхЖЕщГихОЯчФЯц╗ЪхКи/шзжцС╕шбМф╕║я╝Мф╕НхРСх║ФчФихг│х▒Вф╗гчРЖф║дф║ТцДПхЫ╛я╝Ы

+const result = await client.card.editorPanel.render({
+  cardType: 'ImageCard',
+  baseCardId: 'image-1',
+  initialConfig: {
+    src: 'images/cover.png',
+  },
+  resources: {
+    rootPath: '/workspace/cards/demo',
+    async importResource({ file, preferredPath }) {
+      return saveIntoCardRoot(file, preferredPath);
+    },
+    async deleteResource(resourcePath) {
+      await removeFromCardRoot(resourcePath);
+    },
+    releaseResourceUrl(resourcePath) {

+});

+- чК╢цАБя╝Ъх╖▓щЧнчОп
+
+  хдДчРЖч╗УцЮЬя╝И2026-03-14я╝Йя╝Ъ
+  - EditingEngine х╖▓цнгх╝ПцЙйх▒ХхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗш╡Дц║Рш┐РшбМцЧ╢хеСч║жя╝Ъ

+  - EditingEngine хНбчЙЗцМБф╣ЕхМЦщУ╛ш╖пх╖▓цнгх╝ПщЧнчОпя╝Ъ

## цнгх╝Пхп╝хЗ║хеСч║ж

хНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢хЕехПгх┐Ещб╗хп╝хЗ║ф╗еф╕Лцнгх╝ПшГ╜хКЫя╝Ъ

```ts
export interface BasecardRenderContext {
  container: HTMLElement;
  config: Record<string, unknown>;
  themeCssText?: string;
}

export interface BasecardResourceImportRequest {
  file: File;
  preferredPath?: string;
}

export interface BasecardResourceImportResult {
  path: string;
}

export interface BasecardEditorContext {
  container: HTMLElement;
  initialConfig: Record<string, unknown>;
  onChange(next: Record<string, unknown>): void;
  resolveResourceUrl?(resourcePath: string): Promise<string>;
  releaseResourceUrl?(resourcePath: string): Promise<void> | void;
  importResource?(input: BasecardResourceImportRequest): Promise<BasecardResourceImportResult>;
  deleteResource?(resourcePath: string): Promise<void>;
}

export function renderBasecardView(ctx: BasecardRenderContext): (() => void) | void;
export function renderBasecardEditor(ctx: BasecardEditorContext): (() => void) | void;
```

цнгх╝ПшжБц▒Вя╝Ъ

- ф╕дф╕кхп╝хЗ║щГ╜х┐Ещб╗цШптАЬцМВш╜╜хИ░хо╣хЩих╣╢ш┐ФхЫЮ cleanupтАЭчЪДч║пхЗ╜цХ░я╝Ы

- цЙАцЬЙц╕ЕчРЖщА╗ш╛СщГ╜х┐Ещб╗хЬиш┐ФхЫЮчЪД cleanup ф╕нщЧнчОпуАВ

## цЯечЬЛцАБц╕▓цЯУх╝АхПС

цЯечЬЛцАБц╕▓цЯУчЪДцнгх╝ПшБМш┤гцШпя╝Ъца╣цНощЕНч╜оцККхЖЕхо╣цМВш╜╜хИ░ч╗ЩхоЪхо╣хЩиуАВ

цОишНРхоЮчО░цЦ╣х╝Пя╝Ъ

1. хЬи `render/view.tsx` ф╕нхИЫх╗║ч║п DOM ч╗УцЮДя╝Ы
2. хЬи `render/runtime.ts` ф╕нхдДчРЖф╕╗щвШ CSS ц│ихЕеуАБца╣шКВчВ╣цМВш╜╜ф╕Оц╕ЕчРЖя╝Ы
3. хЬи `src/index.ts` ф╕нцКК `renderBasecardView` цЪ┤щЬ▓ч╗Щхо┐ф╕╗уАВ

цЯечЬЛцАБч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- ф╕НчЫ┤цОехБЗхоЪхдЦх▒Вф╕АхоЪцЬЙш╛╣цбЖуАБхЬЖшзТцИЦхНбчЙЗхг│х▒Вя╝Ы
- хЖЕхо╣хо╜х║жф╗ехо┐ф╕╗цПРф╛ЫчЪДхо╣хЩиф╕║хЗЖя╝Ы
- ф╕╗щвШщвЬшЙ▓уАБш╛╣цбЖуАБцЦЗцЬмшЙ▓ф╝ШхЕИф╜┐чФи `--chips-*` tokenя╝Ы
- хо┐ф╕╗хПпшГ╜цККшпехп╝хЗ║цМВш╜╜хЬи Host чФЯцИРчЪД iframe цЦЗцбгф╕ня╝Мф╣ЯхПпшГ╜цМВш╜╜хЬич╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОхИЫх╗║чЪДхНХхНб iframe ф╕нуАВ

## ч╝Цш╛СхЩих╝АхПС

ч╝Цш╛СхЩичЪДцнгх╝ПшБМш┤гцШпя╝ЪцККщЕНч╜оч╝Цш╛С UI цМВш╜╜хИ░ч╗ЩхоЪхо╣хЩия╝Мх╣╢щАЪш┐З `onChange` ш╛УхЗ║цЦ░щЕНч╜оуАВ

цОишНРхоЮчО░цЦ╣х╝Пя╝Ъ

1. хЬи `editor/panel.tsx` ф╕нхоЮчО░ч╝Цш╛СхЩичХМщЭвя╝Ы
2. хЬи `editor/runtime.ts` ф╕нхдДчРЖхо╣хЩих░║хп╕уАБца╣шКВчВ╣ца╖х╝Пф╕Оц╕ЕчРЖя╝Ы
3. цККх▒АщГиш╛УхЕешКВц╡БуАБхпМцЦЗцЬмц╕Ец┤ЧчнЙщА╗ш╛СцФ╢хПгхЬицПТф╗╢хЖЕщГия╝Ы
4. щАЪш┐З `onChange` ш╛УхЗ║цЦ░чЪДщЕНч╜ох┐лчЕзуАВ

ч╝Цш╛СхЩич║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- ф╕НчЫ┤цОеш░ГчФи `CardService`уАБBridge хЖЩцЦЗф╗╢цИЦхЕ╢ф╗ЦцМБф╣ЕхМЦцОехПгя╝Ы
- ф╕НцККхНбчЙЗхИЗцНвуАБф╝ЪшпЭ flushуАБщШ▓цКЦцПРф║дшБМш┤гхЖЩш┐ЫцПТф╗╢я╝Ы
- ф╕НшжБц▒Вхо┐ф╕╗х┐Ещб╗цПРф╛Ы iframe ф║Лф╗╢цбея╝Ы
- ш╡Дц║РхЮЛч╝Цш╛СхЩих║Фф╝ШхЕИф╜┐чФихо┐ф╕╗цПРф╛ЫчЪД `resolveResourceUrl/releaseResourceUrl/importResource/deleteResource`я╝Ы
- хНбчЙЗхЖЕщГиш╡Дц║РхЖЩхЫЮщЕНч╜оцЧ╢хПкшо░х╜ХтАЬчЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜ХтАЭчЪДш╖пх╛Дя╝Ы
- ф╕Нх╛ЧцКК `blob:`уАБ`data:`уАБч│╗ч╗Яч╗Эхп╣ш╖пх╛ДчнЙш┐РшбМцЧ╢ URL цМБф╣ЕхМЦцИРхНбчЙЗхЖЕщГицнгх╝Пш╡Дц║Рш╖пх╛Дя╝Ы
- шЛещЬАшжБщФАцпБщА╗ш╛Ся╝Мх┐Ещб╗щАЪш┐Зца╣шКВчВ╣ cleanup цИЦцШ╛х╝ПщФАцпБхЗ╜цХ░щЧнчОпуАВ

## ф╕Охо┐ф╕╗щУ╛ш╖пчЪДхЕ│ч│╗

### Host щАЪчФищУ╛ш╖п

- Host щАЪш┐З `card.render` цИЦ `card.renderEditor` шзгцЮРцПТф╗╢я╝Ы
- Host ш┤Яш┤гчФЯцИРцнгх╝П iframe цЦЗцбгф╕Оф║Лф╗╢хНПшооя╝Ы
- SDK `compositeWindow/editorPanel` ш┤Яш┤гцККш┐Щф║ЫцЦЗцбгф║дф╗Шч╗Щх║ФчФиуАВ

### хоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОщУ╛ш╖п

```typescript
const preview = await client.card.compositeWindow.render({
  cardFile: '/workspace/demo.card',
  mode: 'preview',
  interactionPolicy: 'delegate',
});

const disposeResize = client.card.compositeWindow.onResize(preview.frame, (payload) => {
  console.log(payload.height, payload.reason);
});

const disposeNodeSelect = client.card.compositeWindow.onNodeSelect(preview.frame, (payload) => {
  console.log(payload.nodeId, payload.cardType, payload.pluginId);
});

const disposeInteraction = client.card.compositeWindow.onInteraction(preview.frame, (payload) => {
  console.log(payload.intent, payload.deltaX, payload.deltaY, payload.zoomDelta);
});
```

`onInteraction` ш╜╜шН╖шп┤цШОя╝Ъ

- `intent = 'scroll'`я╝Ъшбичд║хдНхРИхНбчЙЗхЖЕщГихПСчФЯф║ЖщЬАшжБчФ▒хдЦх▒Вхг│х▒Вц╢Иш┤╣чЪДц╗ЪхКицДПхЫ╛я╝Ы

```typescript
const result = await client.card.editorPanel.render({
  cardType: 'RichTextCard',
  baseCardId: 'base-1',
  initialConfig: {
    title: 'Hello',
    body: '<p>World</p>',
  },
});

const disposeReady = client.card.editorPanel.onReady(result.frame, () => {
  console.log('editor ready');
});

const disposeChange = client.card.editorPanel.onChange(result.frame, (payload) => {
  console.log(payload.baseCardId, payload.config);
});

const disposeError = client.card.editorPanel.onError(result.frame, (payload) => {
  console.error(payload.code, payload.message);
});
```

## 3. ца╕х┐ГхеСч║ж

### 3.1 BasecardDescriptor

ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОцЬмхЬ░ш┐РшбМцЧ╢ф╗е `BasecardDescriptor` ф╜Ьф╕║ч╗Яф╕АхЕехПгя╝Ъ

```ts
interface BasecardDescriptor {
  pluginId: string;
  cardType: string;
  displayName: string;
  aliases?: string[];
  commitDebounceMs?: number;
  createInitialConfig(baseCardId: string): Record<string, unknown>;
  normalizeConfig(input: Record<string, unknown>, baseCardId: string): Record<string, unknown>;
  validateConfig(config: Record<string, unknown>): { valid: boolean; errors: Record<string, string> };
  collectResourcePaths?(config: Record<string, unknown>): string[];
  renderView(ctx: {
    container: HTMLElement;
    config: Record<string, unknown>;
    themeCssText?: string;
  }): (() => void) | void;
  renderEditor?(ctx: {
    container: HTMLElement;
    initialConfig: Record<string, unknown>;
    onChange(next: Record<string, unknown>): void;
    resolveResourceUrl?(resourcePath: string): Promise<string>;
    releaseResourceUrl?(resourcePath: string): Promise<void> | void;
    importResource?(input: { file: File; preferredPath?: string }): Promise<{ path: string }>;
    deleteResource?(resourcePath: string): Promise<void>;
  }): (() => void) | void;
}
```

ч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- цППш┐░чмжц│ихЖМчФ▒ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОхЬицЮДх╗║цЬЯщЭЩцАБхоМцИРя╝Ы
- ф╕╗ц╡БчиЛч╗Яф╕АщАЪш┐З `cardType` цИЦхИлхРНшзгцЮРцППш┐░чмжя╝Ы
- `RichTextCard -> base.richtext` ш┐Щч▒╗хИлхРНх╜Тф╕Ах▒Юф║ОцППш┐░чмжх▒ВшГ╜хКЫя╝Мф╕Нх╛ЧцХгшР╜хЬиф╕ЪхКбч╗Дф╗╢ф╕ня╝Ы
- ш╡Дц║РхЮЛхНбчЙЗчЪДцнгх╝ПщЕНч╜охПкф┐ЭхнШтАЬчЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜ХтАЭчЪДш╡Дц║Рш╖пх╛Дя╝Ы
- `collectResourcePaths(...)` чФиф║ОцФ╢щЫЖщЕНч╜оф╕нх╝ХчФичЪДхЖЕщГиш╡Дц║Ря╝Мф╛ЫцМБф╣ЕхМЦщШ╢цо╡щЗНх╗║ `structure.yaml manifest.resources`я╝Ы
- х╜УхЙНщжЦф╕кцнгх╝ПцОехЕеч▒╗хЮЛф╕║ `base.richtext`я╝Мф╜ЖхоГхПкцШпц│ихЖМф╕нх┐Гф╕нчЪДф╕Аф╕кцППш┐░чмжя╝Мф╕НцШпф╕╗ц╡БчиЛчЙ╣хИдуАВ

### 3.2 BasecardFrameHost

`BasecardFrameHost` ш┤Яш┤гя╝Ъ

import type { BasecardConfig } from "../schema/card-config";

export interface BasecardViewProps {
  config: BasecardConfig;
}

export function createBasecardViewRoot(config: BasecardConfig): HTMLElement {
  const root = document.createElement("div");
  root.className = "chips-basecard chips-basecard--standard";

  const titleEl = document.createElement("h2");
  titleEl.className = "chips-basecard__title";
  titleEl.textContent = config.title || "";
  root.appendChild(titleEl);

  const bodyEl = document.createElement("div");
  bodyEl.className = "chips-basecard__body";
  bodyEl.textContent = config.body || "";
  root.appendChild(bodyEl);

  return root;
}
```

Output:
import type { BasecardConfig } from "../schema/card-config";
import { defaultBasecardConfig } from "../schema/card-config";
import { isNonEmptyString } from "../shared/utils";

export interface BasecardEditorProps {
  initialConfig: BasecardConfig;
  onChange: (next: BasecardConfig) => void;
}

export function createBasecardEditorRoot(
  props: BasecardEditorProps
): HTMLElement {
  const root = document.createElement("div");
  root.className = "chips-basecard-editor chips-basecard-editor--standard";

  const form = document.createElement("form");
  form.className = "chips-basecard-editor__form";

  const titleLabel = document.createElement("label");
  titleLabel.textContent = "цаЗщвШ";
  titleLabel.className = "chips-basecard-editor__label";

  const titleInput = document.createElement("input");
  titleInput.type = "text";
  titleInput.className = "chips-basecard-editor__input";
  titleInput.value = props.initialConfig.title ?? "";
  titleLabel.appendChild(titleInput);
  form.appendChild(titleLabel);

  const bodyLabel = document.createElement("label");
  bodyLabel.textContent = "хЖЕхо╣";
  bodyLabel.className = "chips-basecard-editor__label";

  const bodyTextarea = document.createElement("textarea");
  bodyTextarea.className = "chips-basecard-editor__textarea";
  bodyTextarea.value = props.initialConfig.body ?? "";
  bodyLabel.appendChild(bodyTextarea);
  form.appendChild(bodyLabel);

  const errorBox = document.createElement("div");
  errorBox.className = "chips-basecard-editor__errors";
  form.appendChild(errorBox);

  function validateAndEmit() {
    const next: BasecardConfig = {
      ...defaultBasecardConfig,
      ...props.initialConfig,
      title: titleInput.value,
      body: bodyTextarea.value,
    };

    const errors: string[] = [];
    if (!isNonEmptyString(next.title)) {
      errors.push("цаЗщвШф╕НшГ╜ф╕║чй║уАВ");
    }
    if (!isNonEmptyString(next.body)) {
      errors.push("хЖЕхо╣ф╕НшГ╜ф╕║чй║уАВ");
    }

    errorBox.textContent = "";
    if (errors.length > 0) {
      const list = document.createElement("ul");
      list.className = "chips-basecard-editor__errors-list";
      for (const msg of errors) {
        const li = document.createElement("li");
        li.textContent = msg;
        list.appendChild(li);
      }
      errorBox.appendChild(list);
      return;
    }

    props.onChange(next);
  }

  titleInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
    validateAndEmit();
  });

  bodyTextarea.addEventListener("input", () => {
    validateAndEmit();
  });

  form.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
    event.preventDefault();
    validateAndEmit();
  });

  root.appendChild(form);
  return root;
}
```
</details></tool-use>

import type { BasecardConfig } from "./schema/card-config";
import { mountBasecardView } from "./render/runtime";
import { mountBasecardEditor } from "./editor/runtime";

export interface BasecardRenderContext {
  container: HTMLElement;
  config: BasecardConfig;
  themeCssText?: string;
}

export interface BasecardEditorContext {
  container: HTMLElement;
  initialConfig: BasecardConfig;
  onChange: (next: BasecardConfig) => void;
}

export function renderBasecardView(ctx: BasecardRenderContext): () => void {
  return mountBasecardView(ctx);
}

export function renderBasecardEditor(ctx: BasecardEditorContext): () => void {
  return mountBasecardEditor(ctx);
}
```

# хЫ╛чЙЗхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢ (Image Basic Card Plugin)

**шЦпчЙЗчФЯцАБ (Chips Ecosystem)** хЫ╛чЙЗхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢я╝МчФиф║Ох▒Хчд║хЫ╛чЙЗхЖЕхо╣уАВ

## хКЯшГ╜чЙ╣цАз

- **хЫЫчзНцОТчЙИч▒╗хЮЛ**
  - хНХх╝ахЫ╛чЙЗя╝ЪцФпцМБхо╜х║жчЩ╛хИЖцпФш░ГшКВхТМхп╣щ╜РцЦ╣х╝ПщАЙцЛй
  - ч╜Сца╝цОТчЙИя╝ЪцФпцМБ 2├Ч2уАБ3├Ч3уАБф╕ЙхИЧцЧащЩРшбМф╕ЙчзНч╜Сца╝цибх╝П
  - щХ┐хЫ╛цЛ╝цОея╝ЪцФпцМБхЫ║хоЪчкЧхПгц╗ЪхКихТМшЗкщАВх║ФцЧащЩРщХ┐ф╕дчзНцибх╝П
  - цикхРСц╗СхКия╝ЪхЫ╛чЙЗцикхРСцЛ╝цОея╝МцФпцМБц╗СхКицЯечЬЛ

- **ч╝Цш╛СхКЯшГ╜**
  - ф╕Кф╝ахЫ╛чЙЗцЦЗф╗╢я╝ИцЛЦцЛ╜цИЦчВ╣хЗ╗я╝Й
  - щАЪш┐З URL ц╖╗хКахЫ╛чЙЗ
  - цЛЦхКицОТх║П
  - хЫ╛чЙЗцаЗщвШхТМцЫ┐ф╗гцЦЗцЬмч╝Цш╛С
  - цТдщФА/щЗНхБЪ

- **х╝АхПСшзДшМГ**
  - щЫ╢чбмч╝ЦчаБцЦЗцЬмя╝ИхЕищГищАЪш┐З i18n ч│╗ч╗ЯчобчРЖя╝Й
  - щЫ╢чбмч╝ЦчаБца╖х╝Пя╝ИхЕищГищАЪш┐З CSS хПШщЗПхТМф╕╗щвШч│╗ч╗Яц│ихЕея╝Й
  - щАЪш┐ЗхЖЕца╕ш╖пчФ▒щАЪф┐б
  - хоМцХ┤чЪДч▒╗хЮЛхоЪф╣ЙхТМщЕНч╜ощкМшпБ
  - 80%+ ц╡ЛшпХшжЖчЫЦчОЗ

## хоЙшгЕ

```bash
pnpm add @chips/image-card-plugin
```

## х┐лщАЯх╝АхзЛ

```typescript
import { ImageCardPlugin } from '@chips/image-card-plugin';

// хИЫх╗║цПТф╗╢хоЮф╛Л
const plugin = new ImageCardPlugin();

// хИЭхзЛхМЦя╝Иф╝ахЕехЖЕца╕хоЮф╛Ля╝Й
await plugin.initialize(core);
await plugin.start();

// хИЫх╗║ц╕▓цЯУхЩи
const renderer = plugin.createRenderer();
await renderer.render(config, container, { mode: 'view', interactive: true });

// хИЫх╗║ч╝Цш╛СхЩи
const editor = plugin.createEditor();
await editor.render(config, container, { toolbar: true, preview: true });
editor.onChange((newConfig) => {
  // ф┐ЭхнШщЕНч╜охИ░хНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢
});
```

## щЕНч╜оч╗УцЮД

```yaml
# content/{ID}.yaml
card_type: "ImageCard"
images:
  - id: "abc1234567"
    source: "file"
    file_path: "images/photo.jpg"
    alt: "чд║ф╛ЛхЫ╛чЙЗ"
    title: "ф╕Ах╝ачЕзчЙЗ"
  - id: "def7890123"
    source: "url"
    url: "https://example.com/image.png"
layout_type: "grid"           # single | grid | long-scroll | horizontal-scroll
layout_options:
  grid_mode: "3x3"            # 2x2 | 3x3 | 3-column-infinite
  gap: 8                      # хЫ╛чЙЗщЧ┤ш╖Эя╝ИхГПч┤ая╝Й
theme: ""
layout:
  height_mode: "auto"
```

## цОТчЙИч▒╗хЮЛшп┤цШО

### хНХх╝ахЫ╛чЙЗ (`single`)
ф╗ЕцШ╛чд║ф╕Ах╝ахЫ╛чЙЗуАВх╜УхЫ╛чЙЗхИЧшбихПкцЬЙф╕Ах╝ацЧ╢шЗкхКиф╜┐чФицндцибх╝ПуАВ
- `single_width_percent`: хЫ╛чЙЗхо╜х║жчЩ╛хИЖцпФя╝И10-100я╝Й
- `single_alignment`: хп╣щ╜РцЦ╣х╝Пя╝Иleft / center / rightя╝Й

### ч╜Сца╝цОТчЙИ (`grid`)
- `2x2`: 2хИЧ2шбМя╝МцЬАхдЪцШ╛чд║4х╝ахЫ╛чЙЗ
- `3x3`: 3хИЧ3шбМя╝МцЬАхдЪцШ╛чд║9х╝ая╝Мш╢ЕхЗ║хИЩцЬАхРОца╝цШ╛чд║ "+N"
- `3-column-infinite`: 3хИЧцЧащЩРшбМя╝МцШ╛чд║цЙАцЬЙхЫ╛чЙЗ

### щХ┐хЫ╛цЛ╝цОе (`long-scroll`)
хЫ╛чЙЗцМЙщб║х║Пч║╡хРСцОТхИЧуАВ
- `fixed-window`: хЫ║хоЪчкЧхПгхдзх░Пя╝МхЖЕхо╣ц╗ЪхКи
- `adaptive`: чкЧхПгшЗкщАВх║Фя╝МцШ╛чд║хЕищГихЖЕхо╣

### цикхРСц╗СхКи (`horizontal-scroll`)
хЫ╛чЙЗцикхРСцОТхИЧя╝МчФицИ╖хПпцикхРСц╗СхКицЯечЬЛуАВ

## х╝АхПС

```bash
# хоЙшгЕф╛Эш╡Ц
pnpm install

# х╝АхПСцибх╝П
pnpm dev

# ш┐РшбМц╡ЛшпХ
pnpm test

# ц╡ЛшпХшжЖчЫЦчОЗ
pnpm test:coverage

# ч▒╗хЮЛцгАцЯе
pnpm type-check

# цЮДх╗║
pnpm build
```

/**
 * х╕Гх▒АщЕНч╜о
 */
export interface ImageLayoutConfig {
  /** щлШх║жцибх╝П */
  height_mode?: 'auto' | 'fixed';
  /** хЫ║хоЪщлШх║жхА╝я╝ИхГПч┤ая╝Й */
  fixed_height?: number;
}

/**
 * хЫ╛чЙЗцЭец║Рч▒╗хЮЛ
 */
export type ImageSourceType = 'file' | 'url';

/**
 * хНХх╝ахЫ╛чЙЗф┐бцБп
 */
export interface ImageItem {
  /** хЫ╛чЙЗхФпф╕АIDя╝ИхНБф╜Н62ш┐ЫхИ╢я╝Й */
  id: string;
  /** хЫ╛чЙЗцЭец║Рч▒╗хЮЛ */
  source: ImageSourceType;
  /** цЬмхЬ░цЦЗф╗╢ш╖пх╛Дя╝Иsource=fileцЧ╢ф╜┐чФия╝Й */
  file_path?: string;
  /** хЫ╛чЙЗURLя╝Иsource=urlцЧ╢ф╜┐чФия╝Й */
  url?: string;
  /** хЫ╛чЙЗцЫ┐ф╗гцЦЗцЬм */
  alt?: string;
  /** хЫ╛чЙЗцаЗщвШшп┤цШО */
  title?: string;
}

/**
 * цОТчЙИч▒╗хЮЛ
 */
export type LayoutType = 'single' | 'grid' | 'long-scroll' | 'horizontal-scroll';

/**
 * ч╜Сца╝цибх╝П
 */
export type GridMode = '2x2' | '3x3' | '3-column-infinite';

/**
 * щХ┐хЫ╛ц╗ЪхКицибх╝П
 */
export type ScrollMode = 'fixed-window' | 'adaptive';

/**
 * хНХх╝ахЫ╛чЙЗхп╣щ╜РцЦ╣х╝П
 */
export type SingleAlignment = 'left' | 'center' | 'right';

/**
 * цОТчЙИщАЙщб╣
 */
export interface LayoutOptions {
  /** ч╜Сца╝цибх╝Пя╝Иlayout_type=gridцЧ╢ф╜┐чФия╝Й */
  grid_mode?: GridMode;
  /** щХ┐хЫ╛ц╗ЪхКицибх╝Пя╝Иlayout_type=long-scrollцЧ╢ф╜┐чФия╝Й */
  scroll_mode?: ScrollMode;
  /** хЫ║хоЪчкЧхПгщлШх║жя╝Иscroll_mode=fixed-windowцЧ╢ф╜┐чФия╝МхГПч┤ая╝Й */
  fixed_window_height?: number;
  /** хНХх╝ахЫ╛чЙЗхо╜х║жчЩ╛хИЖцпФя╝Иlayout_type=singleцЧ╢ф╜┐чФия╝М10-100я╝Й */
  single_width_percent?: number;
  /** хНХх╝ахЫ╛чЙЗхп╣щ╜РцЦ╣х╝Пя╝Иlayout_type=singleцЧ╢ф╜┐чФия╝Й */
  single_alignment?: SingleAlignment;
  /** хЫ╛чЙЗщЧ┤ш╖Эя╝ИхГПч┤ая╝Й */
  gap?: number;
}

/**
 * хЫ╛чЙЗхНбчЙЗщЕНч╜о

}

/**
 * хЫ╛чЙЗц╕▓цЯУхЩи
 */

import { createApp, App } from 'vue';
import type { ChipsCore } from '../plugin';
import type {
  ImageCardConfig,
  ImageRendererState,
  RenderOptions,
  ImageItem,
} from '../types';
import { ImageErrorCode, ResourceError } from '../types/errors';
import ImageRendererVue from './ImageRenderer.vue';
import { t } from '../utils/i18n';

/**
 * хЫ╛чЙЗц╕▓цЯУхЩич▒╗
 */
export class ImageRenderer {
  private core: ChipsCore | null = null;
  private config: ImageCardConfig | null = null;
  private container: HTMLElement | null = null;
  private options: RenderOptions | null = null;
  private vueApp: App<Element> | null = null;
  private resizeObserver: ResizeObserver | null = null;

  private state: ImageRendererState = {
    loadedImages: [],
    isLoading: false,
    error: null,
    currentTheme: '',
    containerWidth: 0,
    scrollPosition: 0,
    currentImageIndex: 0,
  };

  /**
   * шо╛ч╜оCoreх╝ХчФи
   */
  setCore(core: ChipsCore): void {
    this.core = core;
  }

  /**
   * ц╕▓цЯУхЫ╛чЙЗхНбчЙЗ
   */
  async render(
    config: ImageCardConfig,
    container: HTMLElement,
    options: RenderOptions
  ): Promise<void> {
    this.config = config;
    this.container = container;
    this.options = options;

    // шо╛ч╜охКаш╜╜чК╢цАБ
    this.setState({ isLoading: true, error: null });

    try {
      // 1. шзгцЮРхЫ╛чЙЗURL
      const resolvedImages = await this.resolveImageUrls(config.images);

      // 2. шЗкхКихИдцЦнцОТчЙИч▒╗хЮЛ
      const effectiveLayoutType =
        resolvedImages.length <= 1 ? 'single' : config.layout_type;

      // 3. цЫ┤цЦ░чК╢цАБ
      this.setState({
        loadedImages: resolvedImages.map((img) => img.resolvedUrl),
        isLoading: false,
      });

      // 4. цМВш╜╜Vueч╗Дф╗╢
      this.mountVueComponent(resolvedImages, effectiveLayoutType);

      // 5. х║ФчФиф╕╗щвШ
      const themeId = options.theme || config.theme || '';
      if (themeId) {
        await this.applyTheme(themeId);
      }

      // 6. шо╛ч╜охУНх║Фх╝ПчЫСхРм
      this.setupResizeObserver();
    } catch (error) {
      this.setState({
        isLoading: false,
        error: (error as Error).message,
      });
      this.renderError(error as Error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * цЫ┤цЦ░щЕНч╜о
   */
  async update(config: Partial<ImageCardConfig>): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.config || !this.container || !this.options) return;

    this.config = { ...this.config, ...config };

    // щЗНцЦ░ц╕▓цЯУ
    await this.render(this.config, this.container, this.options);
  }

  /**
   * шО╖хПЦчК╢цАБ
   */
  getState(): ImageRendererState {
    return { ...this.state };
  }

  /**
   * шо╛ч╜очК╢цАБ
   */
  setState(state: Partial<ImageRendererState>): void {
    this.state = { ...this.state, ...state };
  }

  /**
   * щФАцпБц╕▓цЯУхЩи
   */
  async destroy(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.resizeObserver) {
      this.resizeObserver.disconnect();
      this.resizeObserver = null;
    }

    if (this.vueApp) {
      this.vueApp.unmount();
      this.vueApp = null;
    }

    if (this.container) {
      this.container.innerHTML = '';
      this.container = null;
    }

    this.config = null;
    this.options = null;
  }

  /**
   * шзгцЮРхЫ╛чЙЗURLхИЧшби
   */
  private async resolveImageUrls(
    images: ImageItem[]
  ): Promise<Array<ImageItem & { resolvedUrl: string }>> {
    const resolved: Array<ImageItem & { resolvedUrl: string }> = [];

    for (const image of images) {
      try {
        let resolvedUrl = '';

        if (image.source === 'url' && image.url) {
          resolvedUrl = image.url;
        } else if (image.source === 'file' && image.file_path) {
          resolvedUrl = await this.resolveFilePath(image.file_path);
        }

        if (resolvedUrl) {
          resolved.push({ ...image, resolvedUrl });
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.warn(`Failed to resolve image ${image.id}:`, error);
        // ч╗зч╗нхдДчРЖхЕ╢ф╗ЦхЫ╛чЙЗя╝Мф╕НщШ╗хбЮц╕▓цЯУ
      }
    }

    return resolved;
  }

  /**
   * шзгцЮРцЬмхЬ░цЦЗф╗╢ш╖пх╛Дф╕║хПпшо┐щЧоURL
   */
  private async resolveFilePath(path: string): Promise<string> {
    if (!this.core) return path;

    const uri = this.buildResourceUri(path);

    const response = await this.core.request({
      service: 'resource.fetch',
      payload: {
        uri,
        options: {
          as: 'url',
          cache: true,
        },
      },
    });

    if (!response?.success) {
      throw new ResourceError(
        ImageErrorCode.IMAGE_NOT_FOUND,
        t('error.image_not_found', { file: path }),
        { file: path, uri }
      );
    }

    return (response.data as { url: string }).url;
  }

  /**
   * цМВш╜╜Vueч╗Дф╗╢
   */
  private mountVueComponent(
    resolvedImages: Array<ImageItem & { resolvedUrl: string }>,
    effectiveLayoutType: string
  ): void {
    if (!this.container || !this.config) return;

    // хН╕ш╜╜чО░цЬЙч╗Дф╗╢
    if (this.vueApp) {
      this.v
... (truncated)

/**

import { createApp, App, reactive } from 'vue';
import type { ChipsCore } from '../plugin';
import type {
  ImageCardConfig,
  ImageEditorState,
  EditorOptions,
  ImageCommand,
  ValidationResult,
  ImageItem,
  LayoutType,
  LayoutOptions,
} from '../types';
import { DEFAULT_CONFIG, DEFAULT_MAX_IMAGES, DEFAULT_MAX_IMAGE_SIZE, ACCEPTED_IMAGE_FORMATS } from '../types/constants';
import ImageEditorVue from './ImageEditor.vue';
import { UndoManager } from './history';
import { t } from '../utils/i18n';
import { generateId, arrayMove } from '../utils/dom';
import { validateImageFormat, validateImageSize } from '../utils/validator';

/**
 * щ╗Шшодч╝Цш╛СхЩищАЙщб╣
 */
const DEFAULT_EDITOR_OPTIONS: EditorOptions = {
  toolbar: true,
  preview: true,
  autoSave: true,
  saveDelay: 1000,
  maxImages: DEFAULT_MAX_IMAGES,
  maxImageSize: DEFAULT_MAX_IMAGE_SIZE,
  acceptedFormats: ACCEPTED_IMAGE_FORMATS,
};

/**
 * хЫ╛чЙЗч╝Цш╛СхЩич▒╗
 */
export class ImageEditor {
  private core: ChipsCore | null = null;
  private config: ImageCardConfig | null = null;
  private container: HTMLElement | null = null;
  private options: EditorOptions | null = null;
  private vueApp: App<Element> | null = null;
  private undoManager: UndoManager;
  private changeCallbacks: Array<(config: ImageCardConfig) => void> = [];
  private keyboardHandler: ((event: KeyboardEvent) => void) | null = null;

  private state: ImageEditorState = reactive({
    images: [],
    layoutType: 'single',
    isDirty: false,
    canUndo: false,
    canRedo: false,
    isUploading: false,
    uploadProgress: 0,
    selectedImageId: null,
    draggingImageId: null,
  });

  constructor() {
    this.undoManager = new UndoManager();
  }

  /**
   * шо╛ч╜оCoreх╝ХчФи
   */
  setCore(core: ChipsCore): void {
    this.core = core;
  }

  /**
   * ц╕▓цЯУч╝Цш╛СхЩи
   */
  async render(
    config: ImageCardConfig,
    container: HTMLElement,
    options: EditorOptions
  ): Promise<void> {
    this.config = { ...config };
    this.container = container;
    this.options = { ...DEFAULT_EDITOR_OPTIONS, ...options };

    // хИЭхзЛхМЦчК╢цАБ
    this.state.images = [...config.images];
    this.state.layoutType = config.layout_type || 'single';

    // хИЭхзЛхМЦцТдщФАчобчРЖхЩи
    this.undoManager.init(this.config);

    // цМВш╜╜Vueч╗Дф╗╢
    this.mountVueComponent();

    // шо╛ч╜ох┐лцН╖щФо
    this.setupKeyboardShortcuts();
  }

  /**
   * шО╖хПЦщЕНч╜о
   */
  getConfig(): ImageCardConfig {
    if (!this.config) {
      throw new Error(t('error.editor_not_initialized'));
    }

    return {
      ...this.config,
      images: [...this.state.images],
      layout_type: this.state.layoutType,
    };
  }

  /**
   * шо╛ч╜ощЕНч╜о
   */
  setConfig(config: Partial<ImageCardConfig>): void {
    if (!this.config) return;

    this.config = { ...this.config, ...config };

    if (config.images !== undefined) {
      this.state.images = [...config.images];
    }
    if (config.layout_type !== undefined) {
      this.state.layoutType = config.layout_type;
    }
  }

  /**
   * щкМшпБщЕНч╜о
   */
  validate(): ValidationResult {
    const errors: ValidationResult['errors'] = [];

    if (this.state.images.length === 0) {
      errors.push({
        field: 'images',
        message: t('error.load_failed'),
        code: 'NO_IMAGES',
      });
    }

    // щкМшпБцпПх╝ахЫ╛чЙЗ
    this.state.images.forEach((img, index) => {
      if (img.source === 'file' && !img.file_path) {
        errors.push({
          field: `images[${index}].file_path`,
          message: t('error.image_not_found', { file: '' }),
          code: 'MISSING_FILE_PATH',
        });
      }
      if (img.source === 'url' && !img.url) {
        errors.push({
          field: `images[${index}].url`,
          message: t('error.invalid_url'),
          code: 'MISSING_URL',
        });
      }
    });

    return {
      valid: (errors?.length ?? 0) === 0,
      errors: errors && errors.length > 0 ? errors : undefined,
    };
  }

  /**
   * ц│ихЖМхПШцЫ┤хЫЮш░Г
   */
  onChange(callback: (config: ImageCardConfig) => void): void {
    this.changeCallbacks.push(callback);
  }

  /**
   * цЙзшбМхС╜ф╗д
   */
  executeCommand(command: ImageCommand): void {
    if (!this.config) return;

    const beforeState = this.getConfig();

    switch (command.type) {
      case 'add_image':
        this.addImage(command.image);
        break;

      case 'remove_image':
        this.removeImage(command.imageId);
        break;

      case 'move_image':
        this.moveImage(command.imageId, command.targetIndex);
        break;

      case 'update_image':
        this.updateImage(command.imageId, command.updates);
        break;

      case 'set_layout_type':
        this.setLayoutType(command.layoutType);
        break;

      case 'update_layout_options':
        this.updateLayoutOptions(command.options);
        break;

      case 'batch_add_images':
        this.batc

      <div

      >

          v-if="!isOverflowCell(index)"

            @error="handleImageError(index, $event)"
          />

        </div>

    >
      <div class="chips-image-longscroll__content">
        <img
          v-for="(image, index) in images"
          :key="image.id"
          :src="image.resolvedUrl"
          :alt="image.alt || ''"

        />

    <!-- цикхРСц╗СхКи -->

<script lang="ts">
import { defineComponent, computed, ref, type PropType } from 'vue';
import type { ImageItem, LayoutOptions, LayoutType, GridMode } from '../types';
import { GRID_DISPLAY_LIMITS } from '../types/constants';

interface ResolvedImage extends ImageItem {
  resolvedUrl: string;
}

export default defineComponent({
  name: 'ImageRenderer',

  props: {
    images: {
      type: Array as PropType<ResolvedImage[]>,
      required: true,
    },

      type: String as PropType<LayoutType>,
      required: true,

    layoutOptions: {

      type: Boolean,

  setup(props) {

    const effectiveLayoutType = computed(() => {
      if (props.images.length <= 1) return 'single';
      return props.layoutType;
    });

    const containerClass = computed(() => [
      'chips-image-renderer',
      `chips-image-renderer--${effectiveLayoutType.value}`,
      { 'chips-image-renderer--interactive': props.interactive },
    ]);

    const gap = computed(() => props.layoutOptions.gap ?? 8);

    // --- хНХх╝ахЫ╛чЙЗ ---
    const singleContainerStyle = computed(() => {
      const alignment = props.layoutOptions.single_alignment || 'center';
      const justifyMap = {
        left: 'flex-start',
        center: 'center',
        right: 'flex-end',
      };
      return {
        display: 'flex',
        justifyContent: justifyMap[alignment],
      };

## цЮ╢цЮДшп┤цШО

цЬмцПТф╗╢х▒Юф║ОшЦпчЙЗчФЯцАБ monorepo х╖еф╜ЬхМ║чЪДф╕АщГихИЖя╝МщБ╡х╛кшЦпчЙЗчФЯцАБч╗Яф╕АчЪДх╝АхПСшзДшМГхТМцаЗхЗЖуАВ

### ца╕х┐ГхОЯхИЩ

1. **ф╕нх┐Гш╖пчФ▒цЮ╢цЮД**я╝ЪцЙАцЬЙцибхЭЧщЧ┤щАЪф┐бщАЪш┐ЗшЦпчЙЗхЖЕца╕ш╖пчФ▒я╝Мф╕НчЫ┤цОеш░ГчФи
2. **щЫ╢чбмч╝ЦчаБцЦЗцЬм**я╝ЪцЙАцЬЙчХМщЭвцЦЗцЬмщАЪш┐З i18n ч│╗ч╗ЯчобчРЖ
3. **щЫ╢чбмч╝ЦчаБца╖х╝П**я╝ЪцЙАцЬЙца╖х╝ПщАЪш┐З CSS хПШщЗПхТМф╕╗щвШч│╗ч╗Яц│ихЕе
4. **щЕНч╜ощй▒хКи**я╝ЪцЙАцЬЙхПпхПШхПВцХ░щАЪш┐ЗщЕНч╜оцЦЗф╗╢чобчРЖ
5. **хЙНхРОчлпхИЖчж╗**я╝ЪхЙНчлпхПкш┤Яш┤гх▒Хчд║хТМф║дф║Тя╝МхРОчлпщА╗ш╛СчФ▒хЖЕца╕хдДчРЖ

### ф╛Эш╡ЦхЕ│ч│╗

```
@chips/image-card-plugin
тФЬтФАтФА @chips/foundation (peer) - хЕмхЕ▒хЯ║чбАх▒В
тФЬтФАтФА @chips/sdk (peer) - х╝АхПСх╖ехЕ╖хМЕ
тФФтФАтФА vue (dependency) - хЙНчлпцбЖцЮ╢
```

### цХ░цНоц╡Б

```
хНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢(content/{ID}.yaml) тЖТ ц╕▓цЯУхЩишп╗хПЦщЕНч╜о тЖТ шзгцЮРхЫ╛чЙЗш╖пх╛Д тЖТ цМВш╜╜Vueч╗Дф╗╢ тЖТ чФЯцИРiframe
```

## щЕНч╜ошп┤цШО

### layout_type шЗкхКихИдцЦн

х╜УхЫ╛чЙЗхИЧшбихПкцЬЙ 0 цИЦ 1 х╝ахЫ╛чЙЗцЧ╢я╝МцЧашо║щЕНч╜оф╕ншо╛ч╜оф║Жф╗Аф╣И layout_typeя╝Мц╕▓цЯУхЩищГ╜ф╝ЪшЗкхКиф╜┐чФи `single` цибх╝ПуАВш┐Щчбоф┐Эф║ЖхНХх╝ахЫ╛чЙЗцЧ╢ф╕Нф╝ЪхЗ║чО░ф╕Нх┐ЕшжБчЪДх╕Гх▒АщАЙщб╣уАВ

### ч╜Сца╝ц║вхЗ║цЬ║хИ╢

- `2x2` цибх╝ПцЬАхдЪцШ╛чд║ 4 х╝ахЫ╛чЙЗ
- `3x3` цибх╝ПцЬАхдЪцШ╛чд║ 9 х╝ахЫ╛чЙЗя╝МхжВцЮЬш╢ЕхЗ║я╝МцЬАхРОф╕Аца╝цШ╛чд║ "+N"я╝ИNф╕║хЙйф╜ЩхЫ╛чЙЗцХ░щЗПя╝Й
- `3-column-infinite` цибх╝ПцЧащЩРхИ╢я╝МцШ╛чд║цЙАцЬЙхЫ╛чЙЗ

import { describe, it, expect } from "vitest";
import { createBasecardViewRoot } from "../../src/render/view";
import type { BasecardConfig } from "../../src/schema/card-config";

describe("createBasecardViewRoot", () => {
  it("renders title and body", () => {
    const config: BasecardConfig = {
      id: "test",
      title: "Hello",
      body: "World",
      locale: "zh-CN",
    };

    const root = createBasecardViewRoot(config);
    const titleEl = root.querySelector(".chips-basecard__title");
    const bodyEl = root.querySelector(".chips-basecard__body");

    expect(bodyEl?.textContent).toBe("World");
  });
});

import { describe, it, expect } from "vitest";
import { createBasecardEditorRoot } from "../../src/editor/panel";
import type { BasecardConfig } from "../../src/schema/card-config";

describe("createBasecardEditorRoot", () => {
  it("emits changes when fields are updated and valid", () => {
    const initialConfig: BasecardConfig = {
      id: "test",
      title: "Title",
      body: "Body",
      locale: "zh-CN",
    };

    let lastConfig: BasecardConfig | undefined;
    const root = createBasecardEditorRoot({
      initialConfig,
      onChange: (next) => {
        lastConfig = next;
      },
    });

    const titleInput = root.querySelector(
      ".chips-basecard-editor__input"
    ) as HTMLInputElement | null;

    if (!titleInput) {
      throw new Error("цЙ╛ф╕НхИ░цаЗщвШш╛УхЕецбЖ");
    }

    titleInput.value = "New Title";
    titleInput.dispatchEvent(new Event("input"));

    expect(lastConfig?.title).toBe("New Title");
  });
});
```

import { describe, it, expect } from "vitest";
import { mountBasecardView } from "../../src/render/runtime";
import { mountBasecardEditor } from "../../src/editor/runtime";
import type { BasecardConfig } from "../../src/schema/card-config";

describe("basecard integration flow", () => {
  it("updates view when editor emits valid config", () => {
    const container = document.createElement("div");
    const editorContainer = document.createElement("div");

    const initialConfig: BasecardConfig = {
      id: "test",
      title: "Initial",
      body: "Body",
      locale: "zh-CN",
    };

    let currentConfig: BasecardConfig = initialConfig;

    mountBasecardView({
      container,
      config: currentConfig,
    });

    mountBasecardEditor({
      container: editorContainer,
      initialConfig,
      onChange: (next) => {
        currentConfig = next;
        mountBasecardView({
          container,
          config: currentConfig,
        });
      },
    });

    const titleInput = editorContainer.querySelector(
      ".chips-basecard-editor__input"
    ) as HTMLInputElement | null;

    if (!titleInput) {
      throw new Error("цЙ╛ф╕НхИ░цаЗщвШш╛УхЕецбЖ");
    }

    titleInput.value = "Updated";
    titleInput.dispatchEvent(new Event("input"));

    const titleEl = container.querySelector(".chips-basecard__title");
    expect(titleEl?.textContent).toBe("Updated");
  });
});
```
</details></tool-use>

import type { BasecardConfig } from "./schema/card-config";
import { mountBasecardView } from "./render/runtime";
import { mountBasecardEditor } from "./editor/runtime";

export interface BasecardRenderContext {
  container: HTMLElement;
  config: BasecardConfig;
  themeCssText?: string;
}

export interface BasecardEditorContext {
  container: HTMLElement;
  initialConfig: BasecardConfig;
  onChange: (next: BasecardConfig) => void;
}

export function renderBasecardView(ctx: BasecardRenderContext): () => void {
  return mountBasecardView(ctx);
}

export function renderBasecardEditor(ctx: BasecardEditorContext): () => void {
  return mountBasecardEditor(ctx);
}

## 1. ф║зхУБцжВш┐░

цЬмцПТф╗╢цПРф╛ЫхпМцЦЗцЬмхЖЕхо╣чЪДц╕▓цЯУф╕Оч╝Цш╛СшГ╜хКЫя╝МчФиф║ОхЬихдНхРИхНбчЙЗф╕нцЙ┐ш╜╜ца╝х╝ПхМЦцЦЗцЬмхЖЕхо╣я╝МцШпцЦЗцЬмч▒╗хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗф╕нчЪДца╕х┐Гч▒╗хЮЛф╣Лф╕АуАВ

## 2. хКЯшГ╜шМГхЫ┤

### 2.1 ц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢я╝ИцЯечЬЛцибх╝Пя╝Й

хЬицЯечЬЛхЩицИЦщАЪш┐З SDK чЪДч╗Яф╕АцШ╛чд║цОехПгшвлш░ГчФицЧ╢я╝МцПТф╗╢ца╣цНо `BasecardConfig` ц╕▓цЯУф╕Аф╕кхПкшп╗чЪДхпМцЦЗцЬмхНбчЙЗщб╡щЭвя╝Ъ

- хЖЕхо╣хМ║хЯЯ
  - х░Ж `config.body` ф╜Ьф╕║ HTML ц╕▓цЯУ
  - ф╜┐чФич▒╗хРНя╝Ъ`chips-basecard__body chips-basecard__body--richtext`
  - цФпцМБчЪДхпМцЦЗцЬмч╗УцЮДшЗ│х░СхМЕцЛмя╝Ъ
    - цЦЗцЬмхЖЕшБФца╝х╝Пя╝ЪхКач▓ЧуАБцЦЬф╜УуАБф╕ЛхИТч║┐уАБхИащЩдч║┐уАБф╕КцаЗуАБф╕ЛцаЗуАБшбМхЖЕф╗гчаБ
    - цо╡шР╜ф╕Оч╗УцЮДя╝Ъцо╡шР╜уАБH1-H6 цаЗщвШуАБцЬЙх║П/цЧах║ПхИЧшбиуАБх╝ХчФихЭЧуАБц░┤х╣│ч║┐уАБцНвшбМ
    - ца╖х╝Пя╝ЪцЦЗхнЧщвЬшЙ▓уАБшГМцЩпщлШф║оуАБхнЧф╜Ухдзх░ПуАБхп╣щ╜РцЦ╣х╝П
    - щУ╛цОеф╕ОхЫ╛чЙЗя╝Ъ`<a>` ш╢ЕщУ╛цОеуАБ`<img>` хЫ╛чЙЗ
- хоЙхЕихдДчРЖ
  - ц╕▓цЯУхЙНхп╣ HTML хБЪхоЙхЕиш┐Зц╗дя╝Ъ
    - ф╗Еф┐ЭчХЩчЩ╜хРНхНХцаЗчн╛ф╕Ох▒ЮцАз
    - чз╗щЩд `javascript:`уАБ`data:` чнЙхН▒щЩйхНПшоо
    - ф╕║ `<a>` шЗкхКишбехЕи `target="_blank" rel="noopener"`

### 2.2 ч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢я╝Ич╝Цш╛Сцибх╝Пя╝Й

хЬич╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОф╕ня╝МцПТф╗╢ф╜Ьф╕║хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч╝Цш╛СхЩих╡МхЕеч╝Цш╛СщЭвцЭ┐я╝МцПРф╛ЫцЙАшзБхН│цЙАх╛ЧчЪДхпМцЦЗцЬмч╝Цш╛СшГ╜хКЫя╝Ъ

- хпМцЦЗцЬмч╝Цш╛СхМ║
  - `contenteditable` хо╣хЩичФиф║Оч╝Цш╛С `body` чЪД HTML хЖЕхо╣
  - хоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОцЦ░х╗║хпМцЦЗцЬмхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцЧ╢я╝Мцнгх╝ПхИЭхзЛцнгцЦЗф╕║ `123456789`я╝Мф┐ЭхнШч╗УцЮДф╕║ `<p>123456789</p>`
  - ф╕НцПРф╛ЫцаЗщвШш╛УхЕехМ║я╝Мч╝Цш╛СхЩищб╢щГичЫ┤цОеш┐ЫхЕех╖ехЕ╖цаП
  - ч╝Цш╛СхЩих╕Гх▒АхЫ║хоЪф╕║ф╕Кф╕Лф╕дхМ║я╝Ъ
    - щб╢щГих╖ехЕ╖цаПхМ║
    - х║ХщГицнгцЦЗц╗ЪхКихМ║
  - х╖ехЕ╖цаПх┐Ещб╗хЫ║хоЪхЬич╝Цш╛СхЩищб╢щГия╝Мхо╜х║жф╕ОцнгцЦЗц╗ЪхКихМ║ф┐ЭцМБф╕АшЗ┤я╝Мф╕НхЕБшо╕хЖНхБЪчЛмчлЛцВмц╡охо╜х║жцЦ╣цбИ
  - х╖ехЕ╖цаПцФпцМБцФ╢ш╡╖ф╕║ф╕АцЭбч┤зхЗСцЭбх╕жя╝Ых▒Хх╝Аф╕ОцФ╢ш╡╖хПкх╜▒хУНх╖ехЕ╖цаПхМ║шЗкш║лщлШх║жя╝Мф╕НцФ╣хПШцнгцЦЗц╗ЪхКишБМш┤г
  - цнгцЦЗхМ║хЯЯчЛмчлЛц╗ЪхКия╝Мф╕НщЪП iframe цЦЗцбгцХ┤щб╡ц╗ЪхКи
  - х╖ехЕ╖цаПцПРф╛Ых╕╕чФица╝х╝ПхМЦхС╜ф╗дя╝Ъ
    - цЦЗцЬмца╝х╝Пя╝ЪхКач▓Ч / цЦЬф╜У / ф╕ЛхИТч║┐ / хИащЩдч║┐ / ф╕КцаЗ / ф╕ЛцаЗ / шбМхЖЕф╗гчаБ
    - цо╡шР╜ца╝х╝Пя╝ЪцнгцЦЗ / H1-H6уАБцЬЙх║ПхИЧшбиуАБцЧах║ПхИЧшбиуАБх╝ХчФихЭЧ
    - ца╖х╝Пя╝ЪцЦЗхнЧщвЬшЙ▓уАБшГМцЩпщлШф║оуАБхнЧф╜Ухдзх░Пя╝Иpxя╝Йя╝Мх╖ж/ф╕н/хП│/ф╕дчлп хп╣щ╜Р
    - цПТхЕея╝ЪщУ╛цОеуАБхЫ╛чЙЗуАБц░┤х╣│ч║┐
    - ц╕ЕщЩдца╝х╝Пя╝Ъчз╗щЩдхЖЕшБФца╖х╝Пф╕ОхЯ║чбАца╝х╝П
  - х╖ехЕ╖цаПф║дф║Тх┐Ещб╗ф┐ЭчХЩцнгцЦЗщАЙхМ║я╝МчВ╣хЗ╗цМЙщТохРОца╝х╝Пф╜ЬчФичВ╣ф╕НшГ╜ц╝Вчз╗
  - ч▓Шш┤┤хпМцЦЗцЬмцЧ╢х┐Ещб╗хЕИхБЪ HTML хоЙхЕиц╕Ец┤Чя╝Ыч║пцЦЗцЬмч▓Шш┤┤шжБш╜мцИРчи│хоЪчЪДцо╡шР╜ч╗УцЮД
  - ш┐Юч╗нш╛УхЕецЬЯщЧ┤ф╕Нх╛ЧщвСч╣БщЗНхЖЩч╝Цш╛СхМ║ DOMя╝МщБ┐хЕНхЕЙцаЗш╖│хЫЮщжЦшбМуАБцо╡шР╜щб║х║ПщФЩф╣▒цИЦш╛УхЕец│ХхАЩщАЙшвлцЙУцЦн
  - х┐Ещб╗цнгчбохдДчРЖш╛УхЕец│Хч╗ДхРИш╛УхЕея╝ИIMEя╝Йя╝МхЬич╗ДхРИш┐ЗчиЛф╕нф╕НшГ╜цПРхЙНцПРф║дцИЦщЗНч╜охЖЕхо╣
  - `Enter` хИЫх╗║цЦ░цо╡шР╜я╝М`Shift + Enter` цПТхЕецНвшбМя╝Мф╕дшАЕщГ╜х┐Ещб╗хЯ║ф║Ох╜УхЙНчЬЯхоЮхЕЙцаЗф╜Нч╜оцЙзшбМ
  - цЦ░цо╡шР╜чЪДцнгх╝Пш╛УхЗ║ч╗УцЮДхЫ║хоЪф╕║ `<p>`я╝Мф╕НхЕБшо╕хЬицнгцЦЗф╕нц╝Вчз╗чФЯцИРф╕┤цЧ╢ `div` / щЭЮшзДшМГхЭЧч║зч╗УцЮД
  - щФочЫШх┐лцН╖щФоя╝Ъ
    - `Ctrl / Cmd + B`я╝ЪхКач▓Ч
    - `Ctrl / Cmd + I`я╝ЪцЦЬф╜У
    - `Ctrl / Cmd + U`я╝Ъф╕ЛхИТч║┐
- цабщкМф╕ОхЫЮш░Г
  - `body` чЪДцЬЙцХИхЖЕхо╣ф╕НшГ╜ф╕║чй║
  - цабщкМхд▒ш┤ецЧ╢хЬич╝Цш╛СщЭвцЭ┐хЖЕх▒Хчд║щФЩшппхИЧшби
  - щЕНч╜охПСчФЯцЬЙцХИхПШхМЦхРОя╝МщАЪш┐З `onChange(BasecardConfig)` хРСф╕Кх▒ВцПРф║дхоМцХ┤щЕНч╜оя╝Мцнгх╝ПщЕНч╜оф╗ЕхМЕхРл `id/body/locale`
- хЫ╜щЩЕхМЦ
  - хЯ║ф║О `i18n/zh-CN.json` ф╕О `i18n/en-US.json` хоЮчО░ф╕ншЛ▒цЦЗцЦЗцбИ
  - ф╜┐чФи `BasecardConfig.locale` цИЦц╡ПшзИхЩишпншиАхЖ│хоЪх╜УхЙНшпншиА

# хЫ╛чЙЗхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢

> щАЪш┐З `chips-scaffold-basecard` чФЯцИРчЪДцаЗхЗЖхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢х╖ечиЛуАВ

## чоАф╗Л

цЬмцПТф╗╢х╖ечиЛхоЮчО░ф║Жф╕Аф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢я╝И`type: card`я╝Йя╝МчФиф║Оц╝Фчд║хжВф╜Хя╝Ъ

- хЬицЯечЬЛхЩиф╕нц╕▓цЯУхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗхЖЕхо╣я╝Мх╣╢ц╢Иш┤╣ Host ц│ихЕечЪДф╕╗щвШ CSSя╝Ы
- хЬич╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОф╕нцПРф╛Ыч╝Цш╛СщЭвцЭ┐я╝Мч╝Цш╛СхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗщЕНч╜оя╝Ы
- ф╜┐чФи YAML щЕНч╜оцЦЗф╗╢ф┐ЭхнШхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцХ░цНоя╝Ы
- ф╜┐чФихдЪшпншиАцЦЗцбИф╕ОхЯ║чбАщФЩшппхдДчРЖуАВ

## х┐лщАЯх╝АхзЛ

```bash
cd <чФЯцАБца╣х╖еф╜ЬхМ║>
npm install
cd image-BCP
npm run dev
```

хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗх╖ечиЛф╕нчЪД `chips-sdk` ф╕О `chipsdev` ч╗Яф╕Аф╛Эш╡ЦчФЯцАБца╣х╖еф╜ЬхМ║шзгцЮРя╝Ышп╖щАЪш┐З `chipsdev create` х░Жх╖ечиЛцОехЕех╖еф╜ЬхМ║я╝Мф╕НхЖНхНХчЛмхЬищб╣чЫочЫох╜ХцЙзшбМщжЦцмбф╛Эш╡ЦхоЙшгЕуАВ

хЬих╝АхПСцибх╝Пф╕Ля╝Мф╜┐чФи `chips dev server` хРпхКицЬмхЬ░х╝АхПСчОпхвГя╝Мца╣цНо `chips dev` х╖ехЕ╖цЦЗцбгхЬи Host х╖еф╜ЬхМ║ф╕нхКаш╜╜цПТф╗╢ш┐ЫшбМш░ГшпХуАВ

## щЕНч╜оч╗УцЮД

хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗщЕНч╜оч▒╗хЮЛхЬи `src/schema/card-config.ts` ф╕нхоЪф╣Йя╝Мхп╣х║Ф YAML цЦЗф╗╢чд║ф╛Лф╜Нф║О `templates/default-card-config.yaml`уАВ

хПВцХ░шбиф╕ОхблхЖЩшп┤цШОшзБ `templates/parameters.md`уАВ

/**
 * ц╕▓цЯУхЩич▒╗ц╡ЛшпХ
 */

import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, vi } from 'vitest';
import { ImageRenderer } from '../../src/renderer/ImageRenderer';
import type { ImageCardConfig, RenderOptions } from '../../src/types';

const createMockConfig = (): ImageCardConfig => ({
  card_type: 'ImageCard',
  images: [
    { id: 'img001', source: 'url', url: 'https://example.com/1.jpg', alt: 'Image 1', title: 'First' },
    { id: 'img002', source: 'url', url: 'https://example.com/2.jpg', alt: 'Image 2', title: 'Second' },
  ],
  layout_type: 'grid',
  layout_options: { grid_mode: '2x2', gap: 8 },
});

const createRenderOptions = (): RenderOptions => ({
  mode: 'view',
  interactive: true,
});

describe('ImageRenderer', () => {
  let renderer: ImageRenderer;
  let container: HTMLElement;

  beforeEach(() => {
    renderer = new ImageRenderer();
    container = document.createElement('div');
    document.body.appendChild(container);
  });

  afterEach(async () => {
    await renderer.destroy();
    if (container.parentNode) {
      document.body.removeChild(container);
    }
  });

  describe('setCore', () => {
    it('should set core reference', () => {
      const mockCore = {
        request: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({ success: true }),
        on: vi.fn(),
        off: vi.fn(),
      };
      renderer.setCore(mockCore as any);
      // Should not throw
    });
  });

  describe('render', () => {
    it('should render into container', async () => {
      const config = createMockConfig();
      await renderer.render(config, container, createRenderOptions());
      expect(container.innerHTML).not.toBe('');
    });

    it('should update state after render', async () => {
      const config = createMockConfig();
      await renderer.render(config, container, createRenderOptions());
      
      const state = renderer.getState();
      expect(state.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(state.error).toBeNull();
      expect(state.loadedImages.length).toBe(2);
    });

    it('should handle empty images', async () => {
      const config = { ...createMockConfig(), images: [] };
      await renderer.render(config, container, createRenderOptions());
      
      const state = renderer.getState();
      expect(state.loadedImages.length).toBe(0);
    });

    it('should auto-detect single mode for 1 image', async () => {
      const config = createMockConfig();
      config.images = [config.images[0]!];
      await renderer.render(config, container, createRenderOptions());
      
      // Should render in single mode regardless of config
      expect(container.innerHTML).not.toBe('');
    });

    it('should apply theme if provided', async () => {
      const mockCore = {
        request: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({
          success: true,
          data: {
            variables: {
              colors: { text: { primary: '#333' }, background: '#fff', border: '#e0e0e0' },
            },
          },
        }),
        on: vi.fn(),
        off: vi.fn(),
      };
      renderer.setCore(mockCore as any);

      const config = createMockConfig();
      config.theme = 'test-theme';
      await renderer.render(config, container, createRenderOptions());
      
      const state = renderer.getState();
      expect(state.currentTheme).toBe('test-theme');
    });
  });

  describe('update', () => {
    it('should update configuration', async () => {
      const config = createMockConfig();
      await renderer.render(config, container, createRenderOptions());
      
      await renderer.update({ layout_type: 'horizontal-scroll' });
      // Should not throw
    });

    it('should handle update before render', async () => {
      // Should not throw
      await renderer.update({ layout_type: 'single' });
    });
  });

  describe('getState / setState', () => {
    it('should return initial state', () => {
      const state = renderer.getState();
      expect(state.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(state.error).toBeNull();
      expect(state.loadedImages).toEqual([]);
      expect(state.scrollPosition).toBe(0);
      expect(state.currentImageIndex).toBe(0);
    });

    it('should update state', () => {
      renderer.setState({ isLoading: true });
      expect(renderer.getState().isLoading).toBe(true);
    });

    it('should return copy of state', () => {
      const state1 = renderer.getState();
      const state2 = renderer.getState();
      expect(state1).not.toBe(state2);
      expect(state1).toEqual(state2);
    });
  });

  describe('destroy', () => {
    it('should clean up container', async () => {
      const config = createMockConfig();
      await renderer.render(config, container, createRenderOptions());
      
      await renderer.destroy();
      // Container should be cleared
    });

    it('should handle double destroy', async () => {
      await renderer.destroy();
      await renderer.destroy();
      // Should not throw
    });
  });
});

import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import {
  validateConfig,
  validateImageUrl,
  validateImageFormat,
  validateImageSize,
  getDefaultConfig,
  mergeDefaults,
} from '../../src/utils/validator';

describe('validateConfig', () => {
  it('should validate minimal correct config', () => {
    const result = validateConfig({
      card_type: 'ImageCard',
      images: [],
      layout_type: 'single',
    });
    expect(result.valid).toBe(true);
    expect(result.errors).toBeUndefined();
  });

  it('should validate full config', () => {
    const result = validateConfig({
      card_type: 'ImageCard',
      images: [
        { id: 'abc1234567', source: 'url', url: 'https://example.com/a.jpg' },
        { id: 'def7890123', source: 'file', file_path: 'images/b.png' },
      ],
      layout_type: 'grid',
      layout_options: {
        grid_mode: '3x3',
        gap: 12,
      },
      layout: {
        height_mode: 'auto',
      },
    });
    expect(result.valid).toBe(true);
  });

  it('should reject null', () => {
    const result = validateConfig(null);
    expect(result.valid).toBe(false);
    expect(result.errors).toBeDefined();
    expect(result.errors?.length).toBe(1);
    expect(result.errors?.[0]?.code).toBe('INVALID_TYPE');
  });

  it('should reject non-object', () => {
    const result = validateConfig('string');
    expect(result.valid).toBe(false);
  });

  it('should reject wrong card_type', () => {
    const result = validateConfig({
      card_type: 'WrongType',
      images: [],
    });
    expect(result.valid).toBe(false);
    expect(result.errors?.some((e) => e.code === 'INVALID_CARD_TYPE')).toBe(true);
  });

  it('should reject non-array images', () => {
    const result = validateConfig({
      card_type: 'ImageCard',
      images: 'not-array',
    });
    expect(result.valid).toBe(false);
    expect(result.errors?.some((e) => e.code === 'INVALID_IMAGES')).toBe(true);
  });

  it('should reject invalid layout_type', () => {
    const result = validateConfig({
      card_type: 'ImageCard',
      images: [],
      layout_type: 'invalid',

    expect(result.valid).toBe(false);
    expect(result.errors?.some((e) => e.code === 'INVALID_LAYOUT_TYPE')).toBe(true);
  });

  it('should validate image items', () => {

      card_type: 'ImageCard',
      images: [
        { id: '', source: 'invalid' },

    });
    expect(result.valid).toBe(false);
  });

  /**
   * щАЪш┐ЗURLц╖╗хКахЫ╛чЙЗ
   */
  addImageByUrl(url: string, alt?: string, title?: string): void {
    this.executeCommand({
      type: 'add_image',
      image: {
        id: generateId(),
        source: 'url',
        url,
        alt: alt || '',
        title: title || '',
      },
    });
  }

  /**
   * цТдщФА
   */
  undo(): void {
    const entry = this.undoManager.undo();
    if (entry) {
      this.restoreState(entry.beforeState);
      this.state.canUndo = this.undoManager.canUndo();
      this.state.canRedo = this.undoManager.canRedo();
      this.notifyChange();
    }
  }

  /**
   * щЗНхБЪ
   */
  redo(): void {
    const entry = this.undoManager.redo();
    if (entry) {
      this.restoreState(entry.afterState);
      this.state.canUndo = this.undoManager.canUndo();
      this.state.canRedo = this.undoManager.canRedo();
      this.notifyChange();
    }
  }

  /**
   * цШпхРжхПпцТдщФА
   */
  canUndo(): boolean {
    return this.undoManager.canUndo();
  }

  /**
   * цШпхРжхПпщЗНхБЪ
   */
  canRedo(): boolean {
    return this.undoManager.canRedo();
  }

  /**
   * шО╖хПЦчК╢цАБ
   */
  getState(): ImageEditorState {
    return { ...this.state };
  }

  /**
   * щФАцпБ
   */
  async destroy(): Promise<void> {
    this.removeKeyboardShortcuts();

    if (this.vueApp) {
      this.vueApp.unmount();
      this.vueApp = null;
    }

    if (this.container) {
      this.container.innerHTML = '';
      this.container = null;
    }

    this.changeCallbacks = [];
    this.config = null;
    this.options = null;
  }

  // ===== чзБцЬЙцЦ╣ц│Х =====

  private addImage(image: ImageItem): void {
    this.state.images.push({ ...image });
  }

  private removeImage(imageId: string): void {
    const index = this.state.images.findIndex((img) => img.id === imageId);
    if (index !== -1) {
      this.state.images.splice(index, 1);
    }
    if (this.state.selectedImageId === imageId) {
      this.state.selectedImageId = null;
    }
  }

  private moveImage(imageId: string, targetIndex: number): void {
    const fromIndex = this.state.images.findIndex((img) => img.id === imageId);
    if (fromIndex !== -1 && targetIndex >= 0 && targetIndex < this.state.images.length) {
      this.state.images = arrayMove(this.state.images, fromIndex, targetIndex);
    }
  }

  private updateImage(imageId: string, updates: Partial<ImageItem>): void {
    const image = this.state.images.find((img) => img.id === imageId);
    if (image) {
      Object.assign(image, updates);
    }
  }

  private setLayoutType(layoutType: LayoutType): void {
    this.state.layoutType = layoutType;
    if (this.config) {
      this.config.layout_type = layoutType;
    }
  }

  private updateLayoutOptions(options: Partial<LayoutOptions>): void {
    if (this.config) {
      this.config.layout_options = {
        ...this.config.layout_options,
        ...options,
      };
    }
  }

  private batchAddImages(images: ImageItem[]): void {
    this.state.images.push(...images.map((img) => ({ ...img })));
  }

  private clearAllImages(): void {
    this.state.images = [];
    this.state.selectedImageId = null;
  }

  private replaceImage(imageId: string, newImage: ImageItem): void {
    const index = this.state.images.findIndex((img) => img.id === imageId);
    if (index !== -1) {
      this.state.images[index] = { ...newImage };
    }
  }

  private restoreState(config: ImageCardConfig): void {
    this.config = { ...config };
    this.state.images = [...config.images];
    this.state.layoutType = config.layout_type;
  }

      move_image: 'move',
      update_image: 'update',
      set_layout_type: 'layout',

import type { ImageCardConfig } from '../types';

/**
 * хОЖхП▓шо░х╜Хщб╣
 */
export interface HistoryEntry {
  id: string;
  type: 'add' | 'remove' | 'move' | 'update' | 'layout' | 'batch' | 'clear';
  beforeState: ImageCardConfig;
  afterState: ImageCardConfig;
  timestamp: number;
}

/**
 * цТдщФАщЗНхБЪчобчРЖхЩи
 */
export class UndoManager {
  private history: HistoryEntry[] = [];
  private position = -1;
  private maxSize = 100;

  /**
   * хИЭхзЛхМЦ
   */
  init(_config: ImageCardConfig): void {
    this.history = [];
    this.position = -1;
  }

  /**
   * ц╖╗хКахОЖхП▓шо░х╜Х
   */
  push(entry: Omit<HistoryEntry, 'id' | 'timestamp'>): void {
    // ц╕ЕщЩдpositionф╣ЛхРОчЪДхОЖхП▓
    this.history = this.history.slice(0, this.position + 1);

    // ц╖╗хКацЦ░шо░х╜Х
    const newEntry: HistoryEntry = {
      ...entry,
      id: this.generateId(),
      timestamp: Date.now(),
    };

    this.history.push(newEntry);
    this.position++;

    // щЩРхИ╢хдзх░П
    if (this.history.length > this.maxSize) {
      this.history.shift();
      this.position--;
    }
  }

  /**
   * цТдщФА
   */
  undo(): HistoryEntry | null {
    if (!this.canUndo()) return null;

    const entry = this.history[this.position];
    this.position--;
    return entry ?? null;
  }

  /**
   * щЗНхБЪ
   */
  redo(): HistoryEntry | null {
    if (!this.canRedo()) return null;

    this.position++;
    return this.history[this.position] ?? null;
  }

  /**
   * цШпхРжхПпцТдщФА
   */
  canUndo(): boolean {
    return this.position >= 0;
  }

  /**
   * цШпхРжхПпщЗНхБЪ
   */
  canRedo(): boolean {
    return this.position < this.history.length - 1;
  }

  /**
   * шО╖хПЦхОЖхП▓шо░х╜ХцХ░щЗП
   */
  getHistoryLength(): number {
    return this.history.length;
  }

  /**
   * шО╖хПЦх╜УхЙНф╜Нч╜о
   */
  getPosition(): number {
    return this.position;
  }

  /**
   * ц╕Ечй║хОЖхП▓
   */
  clear(): void {
    this.history = [];
    this.position = -1;
  }

  /**
   * чФЯцИРхФпф╕АID
   */
  private generateId(): string {
    return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
  }
}

export default UndoManager;
```
</details></tool-use>

import type { ImageCardConfig, ImageItem, LayoutOptions } from '../types/config';
import type { ValidationResult, ValidationError } from '../types/validation';
import { DEFAULT_CONFIG, ACCEPTED_IMAGE_FORMATS } from '../types/constants';

/**
 * щкМшпБхЫ╛чЙЗхНбчЙЗщЕНч╜о
 *
 * @param config - х╛ЕщкМшпБчЪДщЕНч╜о
 * @returns щкМшпБч╗УцЮЬ
 */
export function validateConfig(config: unknown): ValidationResult {
  const errors: ValidationError[] = [];

  // цгАцЯецШпхРжф╕║хп╣ш▒б
  if (!config || typeof config !== 'object') {
    return {
      valid: false,
      errors: [
        {
          field: 'config',
          message: 'щЕНч╜ох┐Ещб╗цШпхп╣ш▒б',
          code: 'INVALID_TYPE',
        },
      ],
    };
  }

  const cfg = config as Record<string, unknown>;

  // щкМшпБcard_type
  if (cfg.card_type !== 'ImageCard') {
    errors.push({
      field: 'card_type',
      message: 'card_typeх┐Ещб╗ф╕║ImageCard',
      code: 'INVALID_CARD_TYPE',
    });
  }

  // щкМшпБimages
  if (!Array.isArray(cfg.images)) {
    errors.push({
      field: 'images',
      message: 'imagesх┐Ещб╗цШпцХ░ч╗Д',
      code: 'INVALID_IMAGES',
    });
  } else {
    // щкМшпБцпПх╝ахЫ╛чЙЗ
    (cfg.images as unknown[]).forEach((img, index) => {
      const imgErrors = validateImageItem(img, index);
      errors.push(...imgErrors);
    });
  }

  // щкМшпБlayout_type
  const validLayoutTypes = ['single', 'grid', 'long-scroll', 'horizontal-scroll'];
  if (cfg.layout_type !== undefined && !validLayoutTypes.includes(cfg.layout_type as string)) {
    errors.push({
      field: 'layout_type',
      message: 'layout_typeх┐Ещб╗ф╕║singleуАБgridуАБlong-scrollцИЦhorizontal-scroll',
      code: 'INVALID_LAYOUT_TYPE',
    });
  }

  // щкМшпБlayout_options
  if (cfg.layout_options !== undefined) {
    const optErrors = validateLayoutOptions(
      cfg.layout_options as Record<string, unknown>,
      cfg.layout_type as string
    );
    errors.push(...optErrors);
  }

  // щкМшпБlayout
  if (cfg.layout !== undefined) {
    if (typeof cfg.layout !== 'object' || cfg.layout === null) {
      errors.push({
        field: 'layout',
        message: 'layoutх┐Ещб╗цШпхп╣ш▒б',
        code: 'INVALID_LAYOUT',
      });
    } else {
      const layout = cfg.layout as Record<string, unknown>;

      if (
        layout.height_mode !== undefined &&
        !['auto', 'fixed'].includes(layout.height_mode as string)
      ) {
        errors.push({
          field: 'layout.height_mode',
          message: 'height_modeх┐Ещб╗ф╕║autoцИЦfixed',
          code: 'INVALID_HEIGHT_MODE',
        });
      }

      if (layout.fixed_height !== undefined) {
        if (typeof layout.fixed_height !== 'number' || layout.fixed_height <= 0) {
          errors.push({
            field: 'layout.fixed_height',
            message: 'fixed_heightх┐Ещб╗ф╕║цнгцХ┤цХ░',
            code: 'INVALID_FIXED_HEIGHT',
          });
        }
      }
    }
  }

  return {
    valid: errors.length === 0,
    errors: errors.length > 0 ? errors : undefined,
  };
}

/**
 * щкМшпБхНХх╝ахЫ╛чЙЗщб╣
 */
function validateImageItem(item: unknown, index: number): ValidationError[] {
  const errors: ValidationError[] = [];

  if (!item || typeof item !== 'object') {
    errors.push({
      field: `images[${index}]`,
      message: 'хЫ╛чЙЗщб╣х┐Ещб╗цШпхп╣ш▒б',

  }

  // щкМшпБsource
  if (!['file', 'url'].includes(img.source as string)) {
    errors.push({
      field: `images[${index}].source`,
      message: 'sourceх┐Ещб╗ф╕║fileцИЦurl',
      code: 'INVALID_IMAGE_SOURCE',

  // щкМшпБцЭбф╗╢х┐ЕщЬАхнЧцо╡
  if (img.source === 'file') {

        code: 'MISSING_URL',
      });
    }
  }

  return errors;
}

import type { BasecardDescriptor, BasecardConfigRecord, EditorValidationResult } from '../contracts';
import { renderBasecardEditor, renderBasecardView } from '../../../../Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP/src/index';
import type { BasecardConfig } from '../../../../Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP/src/schema/card-config';
import { defaultBasecardConfig } from '../../../../Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP/src/schema/card-config';
import { sanitizeRichTextHtml } from '../../../../Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP/src/shared/utils';

const EMPTY_RICH_TEXT_BODY = '<p></p>';
const INITIAL_RICH_TEXT_BODY = '<p>123456789</p>';

function asNonEmptyString(value: unknown): string | undefined {
  return typeof value === 'string' && value.trim().length > 0 ? value.trim() : undefined;
}

function sanitizeRichtextHtmlForRuntime(html: string): string {
  if (typeof document !== 'undefined') {
    return sanitizeRichTextHtml(html);
  }

  return html
    .replace(/<script[\s\S]*?>[\s\S]*?<\/script>/gi, '')
    .replace(/<style[\s\S]*?>[\s\S]*?<\/style>/gi, '')
    .replace(/\son\w+=(?:"[^"]*"|'[^']*'|[^\s>]+)/gi, '');
}

function normalizeRichtextBody(input: BasecardConfigRecord): string {
  const rawBody = typeof input.body === 'string'
    ? input.body
    : typeof input.content_text === 'string'
      ? input.content_text
      : EMPTY_RICH_TEXT_BODY;

  const sanitized = sanitizeRichtextHtmlForRuntime(rawBody);
  return sanitized.trim().length > 0 ? sanitized : EMPTY_RICH_TEXT_BODY;
}

function hasMeaningfulRichtextContent(body: string): boolean {
  const sanitized = sanitizeRichtextHtmlForRuntime(body);
  const plainText = sanitized
    .replace(/<br\s*\/?>/gi, ' ')
    .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ')
    .replace(/&nbsp;/gi, ' ')
    .trim();

  if (plainText.length > 0) {
    return true;
  }

  return /<(img|video|audio|iframe|hr|table|ul|ol|blockquote|pre)\b/i.test(sanitized);
}

function normalizeRichtextConfig(input: BasecardConfigRecord, baseCardId: string): BasecardConfigRecord {
  return {
    ...defaultBasecardConfig,
    id: baseCardId,
    body: normalizeRichtextBody(input),
    locale: asNonEmptyString(input.locale) ?? defaultBasecardConfig.locale ?? 'zh-CN',
  };
}

function validateRichtextConfig(config: BasecardConfigRecord): EditorValidationResult {
  const body = typeof config.body === 'string' ? config.body : EMPTY_RICH_TEXT_BODY;
  const valid = hasMeaningfulRichtextContent(body);

  return {
    valid,
    errors: valid ? {} : {
      body: 'цнгцЦЗхЖЕхо╣ф╕НшГ╜ф╕║чй║',
    },
  };
}

export const richtextBasecardDescriptor: BasecardDescriptor = {
  pluginId: 'chips.basecard.richtext',
  cardType: 'base.richtext',
  displayName: 'хпМцЦЗцЬмхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗ',
  aliases: ['RichTextCard'],
  commitDebounceMs: 260,
  createInitialConfig(baseCardId) {
    return normalizeRichtextConfig({
      ...defaultBasecardConfig,
      body: INITIAL_RICH_TEXT_BODY,
    }, baseCardId);
  },
  normalizeConfig: normalizeRichtextConfig,
  validateConfig: validateRichtextConfig,
  renderView(ctx) {
    return renderBasecardView({
      container: ctx.container,
      config: ctx.config as unknown as BasecardConfig,
      themeCssText: ctx.themeCssText,
    });
  },
  renderEditor(ctx) {
    return renderBasecardEditor({
      container: ctx.container,
      initialConfig: ctx.initialConfig as unknown as BasecardConfig,
      onChange(nextConfig) {
        ctx.onChange(nextConfig as unknown as BasecardConfigRecord);
      },
    });
  },
};
