import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { getBasecardDescriptor } from '../basecard-runtime/registry';
import { globalEventEmitter } from '../core/event-emitter';
import { useTranslation } from '../hooks/useTranslation';
import { fileService } from '../services/file-service';
import type { BasecardPendingResourceImport, BasecardResourceOperations } from '../basecard-runtime/contracts';
import type { EditorSessionSnapshot } from './contracts';
import { useEditorRuntime } from './context';

function joinPath(...parts: string[]): string {
  return parts.filter(Boolean).join('/').replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/\/+/g, '/');
}

function normalizeResourcePath(resourcePath: string): string | null {
  const normalized = resourcePath.replace(/\\/g, '/').trim();
  if (!normalized) {
    return null;
  }

  const segments = normalized
    .replace(/^\.?\//, '')
    .split('/')
    .filter((segment) => segment.length > 0 && segment !== '.');
  if (segments.length === 0 || segments.some((segment) => segment === '..')) {
    return null;
  }

  return segments.join('/');
}

function sanitizeImportedFileName(fileName: string): string {
  const normalizedPath = normalizeResourcePath(fileName);
  const candidate = normalizedPath?.split('/').pop() ?? fileName.trim();
  const sanitized = candidate
    .replace(/[\u0000-\u001f]/g, '')
    .replace(/[<>:"/\\|?*]/g, '')
    .trim();

  return sanitized.length > 0 ? sanitized : 'resource';
}

function createObjectUrl(resource: BasecardPendingResourceImport): string {
  const type = resource.mimeType?.trim() || 'application/octet-stream';
  const buffer = new ArrayBuffer(resource.data.byteLength);
  new Uint8Array(buffer).set(resource.data);
  return URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([buffer], { type }));
}

export interface EditorHostProps {
  cardId: string;
  cardPath: string;
  cardType: string;
  baseCardId: string;
  sourceConfig: Record<string, unknown>;
  onConfigChange?: (
    config: Record<string, unknown>,
    resourceOperations?: BasecardResourceOperations,
  ) => Promise<void> | void;
  onPluginLoaded?: (pluginInfo: { cardType: string; baseCardId: string }) => void;
  onPluginError?: (error: Error) => void;
}

export function EditorHost({
  cardId,
  cardPath,
  cardType,
  baseCardId,
  sourceConfig,
  onConfigChange,
  onPluginLoaded,
  onPluginError,
}: EditorHostProps) {
  const { t } = useTranslation();
  const store = useEditorRuntime();
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
  const descriptor = useMemo(() => getBasecardDescriptor(cardType), [cardType]);
  const sourceSignature = useMemo(() => JSON.stringify(sourceConfig), [sourceConfig]);
  const sessionKey = useMemo(() => store.createKey(cardId, baseCardId), [baseCardId, cardId, store]);

  const [snapshot, setSnapshot] = useState<EditorSessionSnapshot | null>(() => {
    if (!descriptor) {
      return null;
    }

    return store.ensureSession({
      cardId,
      baseCardId,
      cardType: descriptor.cardType,
      sourceConfig,
      descriptor,
    });
  });
  const [loadError, setLoadError] = useState<Error | null>(null);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
  const [renderRevision, setRenderRevision] = useState(0);
  const mountRevision = snapshot?.mountRevision ?? 0;
  const resolvedResourceUrlsRef = useRef(new Map<string, string>());
  const pendingResourceResolvesRef = useRef(new Map<string, Promise<string>>());

  const syncSnapshot = useCallback(() => {
    setSnapshot(store.getSnapshot(sessionKey));
  }, [sessionKey, store]);

  const releaseResolvedResourceUrl = useCallback((resourcePath: string) => {
    const url = resolvedResourceUrlsRef.current.get(resourcePath);
    if (!url) {
      return;
    }

    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    resolvedResourceUrlsRef.current.delete(resourcePath);
  }, []);

  const releaseAllResolvedResourceUrls = useCallback(() => {
    resolvedResourceUrlsRef.current.forEach((url) => {
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    });
    resolvedResourceUrlsRef.current.clear();
    pendingResourceResolvesRef.current.clear();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      releaseAllResolvedResourceUrls();
    };
  }, [releaseAllResolvedResourceUrls, sessionKey, cardPath]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!descriptor) {
      setSnapshot(null);
      return;
    }

    const nextSnapshot = store.ensureSession({
      cardId,
      baseCardId,
      cardType: descriptor.cardType,
      sourceConfig,
      descriptor,
    });
    setSnapshot(nextSnapshot);

    return store.subscribe(sessionKey, () => {
      syncSnapshot();
    });
  }, [baseCardId, cardId, cardType, descriptor, sessionKey, sourceConfig, sourceSignature, store, syncSnapshot]);

  const reportEditorActivity = useCallback(() => {
    globalEventEmitter.emit('card:editor-activity', {
      cardId,
      baseCardId,
      cardType,
      at: Date.now(),
    });
  }, [baseCardId, cardId, c

/**

 * @module core/card-service
 * @description чобчРЖшзгхОЛцАБ `.card` чЫох╜ХчЪДшп╗хПЦуАБч╝Цш╛Сф╕ОшЗкхКиф┐ЭхнШ

import yaml from 'yaml';
import { fileService } from '../services/file-service';
import { generateId62 } from '../utils/id';
import {
    createDefaultCoverHtml,
    DEFAULT_COVER_RATIO,
    normalizeCoverRatio,
    type CardCoverResource,
} from '../utils/card-cover';
import { globalEventEmitter } from './event-emitter';
import {
    createInitialBasecardConfig,
    getBasecardDescriptor,
    normalizeBasecardConfig,
    normalizeBasecardType,
} from '../basecard-runtime/registry';
import type { BasecardResourceOperations } from '../basecard-runtime/contracts';

interface PendingBasicCardResourceImport {
    path: string;
    data: Uint8Array;
    mimeType?: string;
    token: string;
}

export interface BasicCardData {
    id: string;
    type: string;
    data: Record<string, unknown>;
    createdAt: string;
    modifiedAt: string;
    pendingResourceImports?: Map<string, PendingBasicCardResourceImport>;
}

export interface CardMetadata {
    name: string;
    description?: string;
    themeId?: string;
    coverPath?: string;
    coverRatio?: string;
    createdAt: string;
    modifiedAt: string;
    tags?: string[];
}

export interface CardStructure {
    basicCards: BasicCardData[];
    layout?: {
        padding?: number;
        gap?: number;
    };
}

export interface CompositeCard {
    id: string;
    path: string;
    metadata: CardMetadata;
    cover?: {
        html: string;
        ratio: string;
        resources: CardCoverResource[];
    };
    structure: CardStructure;
    isDirty: boolean;
    isEditing: boolean;
    isPersisting?: boolean;
    persistedRevision?: number;
    pendingPersistRevision?: number;
    lastPersistedAt?: string;
    pendingResourceDeletions: Set<string>;
}

export interface CardServiceState {
    openedCards: Map<string, CompositeCard>;
    selectedCardId: string | null;
    selectedBasicCardId: string | null;
}

export type CardServiceListener = (state: CardServiceState) => void;

let cardServiceInstance: CardService | null = null;

function now(): string {
    return new Date().toISOString();
}

function joinPath(...parts: string[]): string {
    return parts.filter(Boolean).join('/').replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/\/+/g, '/');
}

function asRecord(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> {
    return value && typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value)
        ? (value as Record<string, unknown>)
        : {};
}

function asString(value: unknown): string | undefined {
    return typeof value === 'string' && value.trim().length > 0 ? value.trim() : undefined;
}

function normalizeBasicCardData(id: string, type: string, rawData: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {
    return normalizeBasecardConfig(type, id, rawData);
}

function createDefaultBasicCardData(type: string, id: string): Record<string, unknown> {
    return createInitialBasecardConfig(type, id);
}

function cloneValue<T>(value: T): T {
    if (typeof globalThis.structuredClone === 'function') {
        return globalThis.structuredClone(value);
    }
    return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value)) as T;
}

function cloneBytes(bytes: Uint8Array): Uint8Array {
    return new Uint8Array(bytes);
}

function normalizeResourcePath(resourcePath: string): string | null {
    const normalized = resourcePath.replace(/\\/g, '/').trim();
    if (!normalized) {
        return null;
    }

    const segments = normalized
        .replace(/^\.?\//, '')
        .split('/')
        .filter((segment) => segment.length > 0 && segment !== '.');
    if (segments.length === 0 || segments.some((segment) => segment === '..')) {
        return null;
    }

    return segments.join('/');
}

function createPendingResourceToken(): string {
    return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10)}`;
}

function guessMimeType(resourcePath: string, fallback?: string): string {
    if (fallback && fallback.trim().length > 0) {
        return fallback;
    }

    const normalized = resourcePath.toLowerCase();
    if (normalized.endsWith('.png')) return 'image/png';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.jpg') || normalized.endsWith('.jpeg')) return 'image/jpeg';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.gif')) return 'image/gif';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.webp')) return 'image/webp';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.svg')) return 'image/svg+xml';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.bmp')) return 'image/bmp';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.avif')) return 'image/avif';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.mp4')) return 'video/mp4';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.webm')) return 'video/webm';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.mp3')) return 'audio/mpeg';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.wav')) return 'audio/wav';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.json')) return 'application/json';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.pdf')) return 'application/pdf';
    if (normalized.endsWith('.txt')) ret

import type {

  BasecardDescriptor,

import {

} from '../../../../Chips-BaseCardPlugin/image-BCP/src/index';

import {
  defaultBasecardConfig,
  normalizeBasecardConfig,
  validateBasecardConfig,
} from '../../../../Chips-BaseCardPlugin/image-BCP/src/schema/card-config';
import { getInternalResourcePaths } from '../../../../Chips-BaseCardPlugin/image-BCP/src/shared/utils';

function normalizeImageConfig(input: BasecardConfigRecord): BasecardConfigRecord {
  return normalizeBasecardConfig(input) as unknown as BasecardConfigRecord;
}

function validateImageConfig(config: BasecardConfigRecord): EditorValidationResult {
  const normalizedConfig = normalizeBasecardConfig(config);
  return validateBasecardConfig(normalizedConfig);
}

export const imageBasecardDescriptor: BasecardDescriptor = {
  pluginId: 'chips.basecard.image',
  cardType: 'base.image',
  displayName: 'хЫ╛чЙЗхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗ',
  aliases: ['ImageCard'],
  commitDebounceMs: 260,
  createInitialConfig() {
    return normalizeBasecardConfig(
      defaultBasecardConfig as unknown as BasecardConfigRecord,
    ) as unknown as BasecardConfigRecord;
  },
  normalizeConfig(input) {
    return normalizeImageConfig(input);
  },
  validateConfig(config) {
    return validateImageConfig(config);
  },
  collectResourcePaths(config) {
    return getInternalResourcePaths(normalizeBasecardConfig(config));
  },
  renderView(ctx) {
    return renderBasecardView({
      container: ctx.container,
      config: ctx.config as unknown as BasecardConfig,
      themeCssText: ctx.themeCssText,
    });
  },
  renderEditor(ctx) {
    return renderBasecardEditor({
      container: ctx.container,
      initialConfig: normalizeBasecardConfig(ctx.initialConfig) as unknown as BasecardConfig,
      onChange(nextConfig) {
        ctx.onChange(nextConfig as unknown as BasecardConfigRecord);
      },
      resolveResourceUrl: ctx.resolveResourceUrl,
      releaseResourceUrl: ctx.releaseResourceUrl,
      importResource: ctx.importResource,
      deleteResource: ctx.deleteResource,
    });

};

import type { BasecardConfigRecord, BasecardDescriptor, EditorValidationResult } from './contracts';
import { imageBasecardDescriptor } from './registrations/image';
import { richtextBasecardDescriptor } from './registrations/richtext';

const basecardDescriptors = [
  imageBasecardDescriptor,
  richtextBasecardDescriptor,
] satisfies BasecardDescriptor[];

const descriptorMap = new Map<string, BasecardDescriptor>();
const aliasMap = new Map<string, string>();

for (const descriptor of basecardDescriptors) {
  descriptorMap.set(descriptor.cardType, descriptor);
  aliasMap.set(descriptor.cardType, descriptor.cardType);
  for (const alias of descriptor.aliases ?? []) {
    aliasMap.set(alias, descriptor.cardType);
  }
}

export function getRegisteredBasecardDescriptors(): BasecardDescriptor[] {
  return basecardDescriptors;
}

export function normalizeBasecardType(cardType: string): string {
  return aliasMap.get(cardType) ?? cardType;
}

export function getBasecardDescriptor(cardType: string): BasecardDescriptor | null {
  return descriptorMap.get(normalizeBasecardType(cardType)) ?? null;
}

export function assertBasecardDescriptor(cardType: string): BasecardDescriptor {
  const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor(cardType);
  if (!descriptor) {
    throw new Error(`цЬкцЙ╛хИ░хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцППш┐░чмж: ${cardType}`);
  }
  return descriptor;
}

export function createInitialBasecardConfig(cardType: string, baseCardId: string): BasecardConfigRecord {
  const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor(cardType);
  if (!descriptor) {
    return { id: baseCardId };
  }
  return descriptor.createInitialConfig(baseCardId);
}

export function normalizeBasecardConfig(
  cardType: string,
  baseCardId: string,
  input: BasecardConfigRecord,
): BasecardConfigRecord {
  const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor(cardType);
  if (!descriptor) {
    return {
      ...input,
      id: baseCardId,
    };
  }
  return descriptor.normalizeConfig(input, baseCardId);
}

export function validateBasecardConfig(cardType: string, config: BasecardConfigRecord): EditorValidationResult {
  const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor(cardType);
  if (!descriptor) {
    return {
      valid: true,
      errors: {},
    };
  }
  return descriptor.validateConfig(config);
}

import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import type { CompositeInteractionPayload } from 'chips-sdk';
import { getBasecardDescriptor, normalizeBasecardConfig } from './registry';
import { createBasecardFrameThemeCss } from './theme-css';

export interface BasecardFrameStatus {
  state: 'loading' | 'ready' | 'error';
  height: number;
  errorMessage: string | null;
}

export interface BasecardFrameHostProps {
  baseCardId: string;
  cardType: string;
  config: Record<string, unknown>;
  resourceBaseUrl?: string;
  selectable?: boolean;
  themeCacheKey?: string;
  interactionPolicy: 'delegate' | 'native';
  onSelect?: () => void;
  onStatusChange?: (status: BasecardFrameStatus) => void;
  onInteraction?: (payload: CompositeInteractionPayload, frame: HTMLIFrameElement) => void;
}

const DEFAULT_STATUS: BasecardFrameStatus = {
  state: 'loading',
  height: 96,
  errorMessage: null,
};

function createFrameDocumentHtml(resourceBaseUrl?: string): string {
  return [
    '<!doctype html>',
    '<html>',
    '<head>',
    '<meta charset="utf-8" />',
    '<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />',
    ...(resourceBaseUrl ? [`<base href="${resourceBaseUrl}" />`] : []),
    '</head>',
    '<body></body>',
    '</html>',
  ].join('');
}

function measureFrameHeight(frame: HTMLIFrameElement): number {
  const doc = frame.contentDocument;
  if (!doc) {
    return DEFAULT_STATUS.height;
  }

  const body = doc.body;
  const root = doc.documentElement;
  return Math.max(
    1,
    Math.ceil(
      Math.max(
        body?.scrollHeight ?? 0,
        body?.offsetHeight ?? 0,
        root?.scrollHeight ?? 0,
        root?.offsetHeight ?? 0,
      ),
    ),
  );
}

export function BasecardFrameHost({
  baseCardId,
  cardType,
  config,
  resourceBaseUrl,
  selectable = false,
  themeCacheKey,
  interactionPolicy,
  onSelect,
  onStatusChange,
  onInteraction,
}: BasecardFrameHostProps) {
  const wrapperRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
  const iframeRef = useRef<HTMLIFrameElement | null>(null);
  const selectableRef = useRef(selectable);
  const onSelectRef = useRef(onSelect);
  const onInteractionRef = useRef(onInteraction);
  const interactionPolicyRef = useRef(interactionPolicy);
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<BasecardFrameStatus>(DEFAULT_STATUS);

  const descriptor = useMemo(() => getBasecardDescriptor(cardType), [cardType]);
  const normalizedConfig = useMemo(
    () => normalizeBasecardConfig(cardType, baseCardId, config),
    [baseCardId, cardType, config],
  );
  const configSignature = useMemo(() => JSON.stringify(normalizedConfig), [normalizedConfig]);
  const readyMinHeightStyle = useMemo(
    () => ({ minHeight: status.state === 'ready' ? '0px' : `${DEFAULT_STATUS.height}px` }),
    [status.state],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    onStatusChange?.(status);
  }, [onStatusChange, status]);

  useEffect(() => {
    selectableRef.current = selectable;
  }, [selectable]);

  useEffect(() => {
    onSelectRef.current = onSelect;
  }, [onSelect]);

  useEffect(() => {
    onInteractionRef.current = onInteraction;
  }, [onInteraction]);

  useEffect(() => {
    interactionPolicyRef.current = interactionPolicy;
  }, [interactionPolicy]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const frame = iframeRef.current;
    const wrapper = wrapperRef.current;
    if (!frame || !wrapper) {
      return;
    }

    if (!descriptor) {
      setStatus({
        state: 'error',
        height: DEFAULT_STATUS.height,
        errorMessage: `цЬкц│ихЖМхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч▒╗хЮЛ: ${cardType}`,
      });
      return;
    }

    let disposed = false;
    let renderCleanup: (() => void) | void;
    const cleanupTasks: Array<() => void> = [];

    setStatus({
      state: 'loading',
      height: DEFAULT_STATUS.height,
      errorMessage: null,
    });

    const mountFrame = () => {
      const doc = frame.contentDocument;
      const frameWindow = frame.contentWindow;
      if (!doc || !frameWindow) {
        throw new Error('хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУчкЧхПгцЬкх░▒ч╗куАВ');
      }

      const container = doc.createElement('div');
      container.setAttribute('data-chips-basecard-frame-root', 'true');

      while (doc.body.firstChild) {
        doc.body.removeChild(doc.body.firstChild);
      }

      doc.body.appendChild(container);
      renderCleanup = descriptor.renderView({
        container,
        config: normalizedConfig,
        themeCssText: createBasecardFrameThemeCss(wrapper),
      });

      const applyMeasuredHeight = () => {
        if (disposed) {
          return;
        }

        const nextHeight = measureFrameHeight(frame);
        frame.style.height = `${nextHeight}px`;
        setStatus((current) => {
          if (
            current.state === 'ready' &&
            current.height === nextHeight &&
            current.errorMessage === null
          ) {
            return current;
          }

          return {
            state: 're

import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest';
import {
  createInitialBasecardConfig,
  getBasecardDescriptor,
  normalizeBasecardConfig,
} from '../../src/basecard-runtime/registry';

describe('basecard registry', () => {
  it('creates richtext starter content through the descriptor for new base cards', () => {
    expect(createInitialBasecardConfig('RichTextCard', 'base-1')).toMatchObject({
      id: 'base-1',
      body: '<p>123456789</p>',
      locale: 'zh-CN',
    });
  });

  it('creates an empty image config through the descriptor for new image base cards', () => {
    expect(createInitialBasecardConfig('ImageCard', 'base-2')).toMatchObject({
      card_type: 'ImageCard',
      images: [],
      layout_type: 'single',
      layout: {
        height_mode: 'auto',
        fixed_height: 720,
      },
    });
  });

  it('normalizes image resource paths and collects only card-root file references', () => {
    const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor('base.image');
    if (!descriptor?.collectResourcePaths) {
      throw new Error('хЫ╛чЙЗхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцППш┐░чмжцЬкц│ихЖМш╡Дц║Рш╖пх╛ДцФ╢щЫЖхЩи');
    }

    const normalized = normalizeBasecardConfig('base.image', 'base-3', {
      card_type: 'ImageCard',
      images: [
        {
          id: 'image-1',
          source: 'file',
          file_path: './cover.png',
        },
        {
          id: 'image-2',
          source: 'url',
          url: 'https://example.com/photo.png',
        },
      ],
      layout_type: 'grid',
    });

    expect(normalized.card_type).toBe('ImageCard');
    expect((normalized.images as Array<Record<string, unknown>>)[0]).toMatchObject({
      id: 'image-1',
      source: 'file',
      file_path: 'cover.png',
    });
    expect(descriptor.collectResourcePaths(normalized)).toEqual(['cover.png']);
  });
});
```
</details></tool-use>

$schema: "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"

  - card_type

хЬищЬАшжБх▒Хчд║хНбчЙЗчЪДх║ФчФиф╕ня╝Мч╗Яф╕Аф╜┐чФи SDK цШ╛чд║чкЧхПгцОехПгя╝Ъ

```typescript
client.card.coverFrame.render({
  cardFile: string,
  cardName?: string
}): Promise<IframeWindow>

client.card.compositeWindow.render({
  cardFile: string,
  mode?: 'view' | 'preview',
  interactionPolicy?: 'native' | 'delegate'
}): Promise<IframeWindow>

client.card.editorPanel.render({
  cardType: string,
  initialConfig?: Record<string, unknown>,
  baseCardId?: string,
  resources?: {
    rootPath?: string,
    resolveResourceUrl?(resourcePath: string): Promise<string> | string,
    releaseResourceUrl?(resourcePath: string): Promise<void> | void,
    importResource?(input: { file: File, preferredPath?: string }): Promise<{ path: string }> | { path: string },
    deleteResource?(resourcePath: string): Promise<void> | void
  }
}): Promise<IframeWindow>
```

шп┤цШОя╝Ъ

- `coverFrame` ш┐ФхЫЮхНбчЙЗх░БщЭв iframeя╝Иф╕ЛцЦ╣цШ╛чд║хНбчЙЗхРНчз░я╝ЙуАВ
- `compositeWindow` ш┐ФхЫЮхдНхРИхНбчЙЗ iframe чкЧхПгуАВ
- `compositeWindow.mode` хПкхЕБшо╕ `view | preview`уАВ
- `compositeWindow.interactionPolicy` хПкхЕБшо╕ `native | delegate`я╝Мщ╗Шшодх║Фф┐ЭцМБ `native`уАВ
- `compositeWindow.mode = 'preview'` цЧ╢я╝МхПпщАЪш┐Зф║Лф╗╢шовщШЕцОецФ╢хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗшКВчВ╣щАЙф╕нф║Лф╗╢уАВ
- `compositeWindow` хПпщАЪш┐З `onResize` шовщШЕцХ┤х╝ахдНхРИхНбчЙЗх╜УхЙНцА╗щлШх║жя╝Мцнгх╝ПчФиф║ОцЯечЬЛхЩиуАБшЗкщАВх║Фхо╣хЩиф╗ехПКф╗НщАЙцЛй Host цЙШчобхдНхРИ iframe чЪДхЬ║цЩпуАВ
- `compositeWindow.interactionPolicy = 'delegate'` цЧ╢я╝МхПпщАЪш┐З `onInteraction` шовщШЕхдНхРИхНбчЙЗхЖЕщГиц╗Ъш╜оуАБшзжцС╕ц╗ЪхКихТМцНПхРИч╝йцФ╛цДПхЫ╛я╝Мцнгх╝ПчФиф║ОцЧащЩРчФ╗х╕ГчнЙщЬАшжБхдЦх▒Вхг│х▒ВцОечобцбМщЭвф║дф║ТчЪДхЬ║цЩпуАВ
- `editorPanel` ш┐ФхЫЮхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч╝Цш╛СхЩи iframeя╝Мцнгх╝ПчФиф║Очммф╕ЙцЦ╣хо┐ф╕╗уАБш░ГшпХх╖ехЕ╖хТМф╗НщЬА Host цЙШчобч╝Цш╛СхЩи iframe чЪДхЬ║цЩпуАВ
- `editorPanel.resources` цШп SDK цЬмхЬ░ш╡Дц║РцбещЕНч╜оя╝Мф╕Нф╝Ъш┐ЫхЕе `card.renderEditor` цнгх╝Пш╖пчФ▒ш┤Яш╜╜уАВ
- хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗхИЖхПСуАБцибцЭ┐ч╝ЦшпСуАБiframe цЛ╝цОечФ▒ Host хЖЕч╜оц╕▓цЯУш┐РшбМцЧ╢хоМцИРя╝ЫSDK ф╗Ех░БшгЕш░ГчФихЕехПгуАВ

`editorPanel.resources` шзДхИЩя╝Ъ

- `resourcePath` ф╕Ах╛Лф╜┐чФичЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜ХчЪДш╖пх╛Дя╝Ы
- хПкшп╗хЬ║цЩпхПпхПкф╝а `rootPath`я╝МSDK ф╝ЪчФихоГф╕║ `resolveResourceUrl` чФЯцИР `file://` URLя╝Ы
- шЛеч╝Цш╛СхЩицФпцМБхп╝хЕецИЦхИащЩдхНбчЙЗхЖЕщГиш╡Дц║Ря╝Мхо┐ф╕╗х┐Ещб╗хоЮчО░ `importResource/deleteResource`я╝Ы
- шЛехо┐ф╕╗ш┐ФхЫЮ `blob:` URLя╝Мх║Фш┤Яш┤гхЬищАВх╜УцЧ╢цЬ║хУНх║Ф `releaseResourceUrl` щЗКцФ╛ф╕┤цЧ╢ш╡Дц║РуАВ

щАВчФиш╛╣чХМшбехЕЕя╝Ъ

- `compositeWindow + editorPanel` ф╗НцШпчФЯцАБхп╣хдЦхЕмх╝АчЪДщАЪчФи SDK цОехПгя╝Ы
- хоШцЦ╣ `Chips-EditingEngine` чЪДч╝Цш╛СцАБцнгх╝ПщУ╛ш╖пф╕НхЖНф╗еш┐Щф╕дф╕кцОехПгф╜Ьф╕║ф╕╗ш╖пх╛Дя╝МшАМцШпцФ╣чФицЬмхЬ░хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗш┐РшбМцЧ╢я╝Ы
- шЛеф╕НцШпхоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОя╝Мф╕Нх╛ЧцНоцндхдНхИ╢чммф║МхеЧцЬмхЬ░ш┐РшбМцЧ╢уАВ

хдНхРИхНбчЙЗщвДшзИцибх╝ПцОишНРф║Лф╗╢шовщШЕцОехПгя╝Ъ

```typescript
const preview = await client.card.compositeWindow.render({
  cardFile: '/workspace/demo.card',
  mode: 'preview',
  interactionPolicy: 'delegate',
});

const disposeResize = client.card.compositeWindow.onResize(preview.frame, (payload) => {
  console.log(payload.height, payload.reason);
});

const disposeNodeSelect = client.card.compositeWindow.onNodeSelect(preview.frame, (payload) => {
  console.log(payload.nodeId, payload.cardType, payload.pluginId);
});

const disposeInteraction = client.card.compositeWindow.onInteraction(preview.frame, (payload) => {
  console.log(payload.intent, payload.deltaX, payload.deltaY, payload.zoomDelta);
});
```

`onInteraction` ш╜╜шН╖шп┤цШОя╝Ъ

- `intent = 'scroll'`я╝Ъшбичд║хдНхРИхНбчЙЗхЖЕщГихПСчФЯф║ЖщЬАшжБчФ▒хдЦх▒Вхг│х▒Вц╢Иш┤╣чЪДц╗ЪхКицДПхЫ╛я╝Ы
- `intent = 'zoom'`я╝Ъшбичд║хдНхРИхНбчЙЗхЖЕщГихПСчФЯф║ЖцНПхРИцИЦчнЙф╗╖ч╝йцФ╛цДПхЫ╛я╝Ы
- `source` чФиф║ОхМ║хИЖф║Лф╗╢цЭешЗкхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗ iframeуАБхдНхРИхг│х▒Вш┐ШцШпщЩНч║зшКВчВ╣я╝Ы
- `clientX/clientY` цШпчЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхдНхРИ iframe шзЖхПгчЪДхЭРцаЗя╝Мх║ФчФишЛешжБцККч╝йцФ╛щФЪхоЪхИ░хдЦх▒ВцбМщЭвхЭРцаЗя╝Мх║ФхЕИхКаф╕КхдЦх▒В iframe шЗкш║лчЪД `getBoundingClientRect().left/top`уАВ

### хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч╝Цш╛СхЩищЭвцЭ┐

Host цЙШчобч╝Цш╛СхЩищУ╛ш╖пхжВф╕Ля╝Ъ

## цПТф╗╢ч╗УцЮД

## manifest щЕНч╜о

хНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢чЪД `manifest.yaml` х┐Ещб╗ц╗бш╢│ф╗еф╕ЛшжБц▒Вя╝Ъ

## цнгх╝Пхп╝хЗ║хеСч║ж

хНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢хЕехПгх┐Ещб╗хп╝хЗ║ф╗еф╕Лцнгх╝ПшГ╜хКЫя╝Ъ

```ts
export interface BasecardRenderContext {
  container: HTMLElement;
  config: Record<string, unknown>;
  themeCssText?: string;
}

export interface BasecardResourceImportRequest {
  file: File;
  preferredPath?: string;
}

export interface BasecardResourceImportResult {
  path: string;
}

export interface BasecardEditorContext {
  container: HTMLElement;
  initialConfig: Record<string, unknown>;
  onChange(next: Record<string, unknown>): void;
  resolveResourceUrl?(resourcePath: string): Promise<string>;
  releaseResourceUrl?(resourcePath: string): Promise<void> | void;
  importResource?(input: BasecardResourceImportRequest): Promise<BasecardResourceImportResult>;
  deleteResource?(resourcePath: string): Promise<void>;
}

export function renderBasecardView(ctx: BasecardRenderContext): (() => void) | void;
export function renderBasecardEditor(ctx: BasecardEditorContext): (() => void) | void;
```

цнгх╝ПшжБц▒Вя╝Ъ

- ф╕дф╕кхп╝хЗ║щГ╜х┐Ещб╗цШптАЬцМВш╜╜хИ░хо╣хЩих╣╢ш┐ФхЫЮ cleanupтАЭчЪДч║пхЗ╜цХ░я╝Ы

- цЙАцЬЙц╕ЕчРЖщА╗ш╛СщГ╜х┐Ещб╗хЬиш┐ФхЫЮчЪД cleanup ф╕нщЧнчОпуАВ

## цЯечЬЛцАБц╕▓цЯУх╝АхПС

цЯечЬЛцАБц╕▓цЯУчЪДцнгх╝ПшБМш┤гцШпя╝Ъца╣цНощЕНч╜оцККхЖЕхо╣цМВш╜╜хИ░ч╗ЩхоЪхо╣хЩиуАВ

цОишНРхоЮчО░цЦ╣х╝Пя╝Ъ

1. хЬи `render/view.tsx` ф╕нхИЫх╗║ч║п DOM ч╗УцЮДя╝Ы
2. хЬи `render/runtime.ts` ф╕нхдДчРЖф╕╗щвШ CSS ц│ихЕеуАБца╣шКВчВ╣цМВш╜╜ф╕Оц╕ЕчРЖя╝Ы
3. хЬи `src/index.ts` ф╕нцКК `renderBasecardView` цЪ┤щЬ▓ч╗Щхо┐ф╕╗уАВ

цЯечЬЛцАБч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- ф╕НчЫ┤цОехБЗхоЪхдЦх▒Вф╕АхоЪцЬЙш╛╣цбЖуАБхЬЖшзТцИЦхНбчЙЗхг│х▒Вя╝Ы

- хо┐ф╕╗хПпшГ╜цККшпехп╝хЗ║цМВш╜╜хЬи Host чФЯцИРчЪД iframe цЦЗцбгф╕ня╝Мф╣ЯхПпшГ╜цМВш╜╜хЬич╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОхИЫх╗║чЪДхНХхНб iframe ф╕нуАВ

## ч╝Цш╛СхЩих╝АхПС

ч╝Цш╛СхЩичЪДцнгх╝ПшБМш┤гцШпя╝ЪцККщЕНч╜оч╝Цш╛С UI цМВш╜╜хИ░ч╗ЩхоЪхо╣хЩия╝Мх╣╢щАЪш┐З `onChange` ш╛УхЗ║цЦ░щЕНч╜оуАВ

цОишНРхоЮчО░цЦ╣х╝Пя╝Ъ

1. хЬи `editor/panel.tsx` ф╕нхоЮчО░ч╝Цш╛СхЩичХМщЭвя╝Ы
2. хЬи `editor/runtime.ts` ф╕нхдДчРЖхо╣хЩих░║хп╕уАБца╣шКВчВ╣ца╖х╝Пф╕Оц╕ЕчРЖя╝Ы
3. цККх▒АщГиш╛УхЕешКВц╡БуАБхпМцЦЗцЬмц╕Ец┤ЧчнЙщА╗ш╛СцФ╢хПгхЬицПТф╗╢хЖЕщГия╝Ы
4. щАЪш┐З `onChange` ш╛УхЗ║цЦ░чЪДщЕНч╜ох┐лчЕзуАВ

ч╝Цш╛СхЩич║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- ф╕НчЫ┤цОеш░ГчФи `CardService`уАБBridge хЖЩцЦЗф╗╢цИЦхЕ╢ф╗ЦцМБф╣ЕхМЦцОехПгя╝Ы
- ф╕НцККхНбчЙЗхИЗцНвуАБф╝ЪшпЭ flushуАБщШ▓цКЦцПРф║дшБМш┤гхЖЩш┐ЫцПТф╗╢я╝Ы

### storageхнРхЯЯ

storageхнРхЯЯцПРф╛ЫцЬмхЬ░хнШхВишГ╜хКЫя╝МхМЕцЛмstorage.get(key)шп╗хПЦцХ░цНоя╝Мstorage.set(key, value)хЖЩхЕецХ░цНоя╝Мstorage.delete(key)хИащЩдцХ░цНоя╝Мstorage.clear()ц╕Ечй║цЙАцЬЙцХ░цНоуАВ

хнШхВицХ░цНоф╗ещФохА╝хп╣х╜вх╝Пф┐ЭхнШхЬицЬмхЬ░я╝Мф╕ОчЙ╣хоЪцПТф╗╢хЕ│шБФя╝Мф╕НхРМцПТф╗╢чЪДцХ░цНоф║ТчЫ╕щЪФчж╗уАВ

### moduleхнРхЯЯ

moduleхнРхЯЯцПРф╛ЫцибхЭЧхКаш╜╜шГ╜хКЫя╝МхМЕцЛмmodule.load(moduleId)хКаш╜╜цибхЭЧя╝Мmodule.unload(moduleId)хН╕ш╜╜цибхЭЧя╝Мmodule.list()шО╖хПЦх╖▓хКаш╜╜цибхЭЧхИЧшбиуАВ

### pluginхнРхЯЯ

pluginхнРхЯЯцПРф╛ЫцПТф╗╢ф┐бцБпцЯешпвшГ╜хКЫя╝МщЗЗчФи vNext хЖ╗ч╗УхКиф╜ЬхПгх╛Дя╝Ъ

| хКиф╜Ь | шп┤цШО | х╣ВчнЙ |
|---|---|---|
| `plugin.getSelf()` | шО╖хПЦх╜УхЙНцПТф╗╢шЗкш║лф┐бцБп | цШп |
| `plugin.list({ type?, capability? })` | цЯешпвх╖▓хоЙшгЕцПТф╗╢хИЧшби | цШп |
| `plugin.get({ pluginId })` | шО╖хПЦцМЗхоЪцПТф╗╢ф┐бцБп | цШп |
| `plugin.getCardPlugin({ cardType })` | ца╣цНохНбчЙЗч▒╗хЮЛшО╖хПЦц╕▓цЯУцПТф╗╢ | цШп |
| `plugin.getLayoutPlugin({ layoutType })` | ца╣цНох╕Гх▒Ач▒╗хЮЛшО╖хПЦх╕Гх▒АцПТф╗╢ | цШп |
| `plugin.query({ type?, capability? })` | цМЙц▓╗чРЖшзЖшзТцЯешпвх╖▓хоЙшгЕцПТф╗╢ш┐РшбМцЧ╢шо░х╜Х | цШп |

**цПТф╗╢ф┐бцБпч╗УцЮД**я╝Ъ

```ts
interface PluginInfo {
  id: string;           // цПТф╗╢хФпф╕АцаЗшпЖ
  version: string;      // цПТф╗╢чЙИцЬм
  type: 'app' | 'card' | 'layout' | 'theme'; // цПТф╗╢ч▒╗хЮЛ
  name: string;         // цПТф╗╢цШ╛чд║хРНчз░
  description?: string; // цПТф╗╢цППш┐░
  installPath: string;  // хоЙшгЕш╖пх╛Д

```

ц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢цШпцПТф╗╢чЪДхЙНчлпф╗гчаБя╝МхоЪф╣Йф║Жш┐ЩчзНхНбчЙЗхжВф╜ХхЬицЯечЬЛхЩиф╕нцШ╛чд║уАВц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢ф╜┐чФич╜Сщб╡цКАцЬпч╝ЦхЖЩя╝МхМЕцЛмHTMLуАБCSSуАБJavaScriptя╝МцШпхНбчЙЗцЬАч╗ИхСИчО░ч╗ЩчФицИ╖чЪДчХМщЭвхТМф║дф║ТщА╗ш╛СчЪДхоМцХ┤хоЮчО░уАВ

ф╕НхРМч▒╗хЮЛчЪДхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцЬЙф╕НхРМчЪДц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢хоЮчО░цЦ╣х╝ПуАВхЫ╛чЙЗхНбчЙЗчЪДц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢хоЮчО░хЫ╛чЙЗцЯечЬЛхЩичХМщЭвя╝МхМЕцЛмч╝йцФ╛уАБцЧЛш╜муАБх╣╗чБпчЙЗцТнцФ╛чнЙхКЯшГ╜уАВMarkdownхНбчЙЗчЪДц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢шзгцЮРMarkdownшпнц│Хх╣╢ц╕▓цЯУф╕║HTMLя╝МцФпцМБчЫох╜ХуАБхЕмх╝ПуАБф╗гчаБщлШф║очнЙщлШч║зчЙ╣цАзуАВф╗гчаБхНбчЙЗчЪДц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢хоЮчО░ф╗гчаБцШ╛чд║хЩия╝МхМЕцЛмшпнц│ХщлШф║оуАБшбМхП╖цШ╛чд║уАБф╗гчаБцКШхПауАБхдНхИ╢цМЙщТочнЙхКЯшГ╜уАВхпМцЦЗцЬмхНбчЙЗчЪДц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢хоЮчО░хпМцЦЗцЬмч╝Цш╛СхЩичХМщЭвя╝МцФпцМБца╝х╝Пшо╛ч╜оуАБх╡МхЕехдЪхкТф╜УчнЙхЖЕхо╣ч╝Цш╛СуАВ

ц╕▓цЯУц╡БчиЛчЪДш╡╖чВ╣цШпчФицИ╖цЙУх╝АхНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢уАВчФицИ╖хПМхЗ╗cardцЦЗф╗╢цИЦщАЪш┐ЗцЯечЬЛхЩицЙУх╝АхНбчЙЗцЧ╢я╝МцУНф╜Ьч│╗ч╗Ях░ЖцЦЗф╗╢ш╖пх╛Дф╝ащАТч╗ЩшЦпчЙЗф╕╗цЬ║уАВхЖЕца╕шпЖхИлцЦЗф╗╢ч▒╗хЮЛхРОя╝МцЯецЙ╛ц│ихЖМчЪДцЦЗф╗╢хдДчРЖцЬНхКбуАВхНбчЙЗцЬНхКбцОецФ╢шп╖ц▒Вя╝Мх╝АхзЛшзгцЮРcardцЦЗф╗╢чЪДч╗УцЮДуАВхНбчЙЗцЬНхКбшп╗хПЦmetadata.yamlшО╖хПЦхНбчЙЗчЪДхЯ║цЬмф┐бцБпя╝Мшп╗хПЦstructure.yamlшО╖хПЦхНбчЙЗхМЕхРлчЪДхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗхИЧшбия╝Мшп╗хПЦcontentчЫох╜Хф╕ЛхРДф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗчЪДщЕНч╜оцЦЗф╗╢шО╖хПЦхЕ╖ф╜УхПВцХ░уАВ

ц╕▓цЯУц╡БчиЛца╣цНохНбчЙЗч▒╗хЮЛчЪДф╕НхРМхИЖф╕║хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУхТМхдНхРИхНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУф╕дчзНцибх╝ПуАВхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУщТИхп╣хНХф╕Ач▒╗хЮЛчЪДхЖЕхо╣ч╗Дф╗╢я╝МхдНхРИхНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУщТИхп╣хМЕхРлхдЪф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗчЪДхдНхРИч╗УцЮДуАВф╕дчзНцибх╝ПхЕ▒ф║лчЫ╕хРМчЪДх║Хх▒ВцЬ║хИ╢я╝Мф╜ЖхЬич╗Дф╗╢ч╗ДшгЕхТМх╕Гх▒АцЦ╣щЭвцЬЙцЙАхМ║хИлуАВ

х╜УхЙНцнгх╝Пш┐ШхнШхЬиф╕АцЭбтАЬч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОч╝Цш╛СцАБцЬмхЬ░ш┐РшбМцЧ╢тАЭхИЖцФпя╝Ъ

- щАЪчФицЯечЬЛцАБф╕Очммф╕ЙцЦ╣щЫЖцИРя╝Ъч╗зч╗нш╡░ Host ч╗Яф╕Ац╕▓цЯУф╕О SDK цШ╛чд║цОехПгя╝Ы
- хоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОч╝Цш╛СцАБя╝ЪцМЙхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч▓Тх║жхЬих║ФчФихЖЕшгЕщЕНхНХхНб iframeя╝Мх╣╢чЫ┤цОецМВш╜╜хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч╝Цш╛СхЩихп╝хЗ║уАВ

## хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУ

хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУцШпцХ┤ф╕кц╕▓цЯУц╡БчиЛчЪДхЯ║цЬмхНХхЕГуАВцпПф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗщГ╜хЬичЛмчлЛчЪДiframeф╕нц╕▓цЯУя╝Мф╕ОхЕ╢ф╗ЦхНбчЙЗхТМф╕╗щб╡щЭвщЪФчж╗уАВ

ц╕▓цЯУхЩищжЦхЕИца╣цНохНбчЙЗч▒╗хЮЛцЯецЙ╛хп╣х║ФчЪДхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢уАВч│╗ч╗Яца╣цНоstructure.yamlф╕нчЪДч▒╗хЮЛхнЧцо╡я╝МчбохоЪщЬАшжБхКаш╜╜хУкф║ЫхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢уАВцпПф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч▒╗хЮЛхп╣х║Фф╕Аф╕кхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢я╝МцПТф╗╢цПРф╛Ышпеч▒╗хЮЛчЪДц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢уАВ

хКаш╜╜ц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢хРОя╝Мц╕▓цЯУхЩишп╗хПЦшпехЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗчЪДщЕНч╜оцЦЗф╗╢уАВщЕНч╜оцЦЗф╗╢ф╕нхМЕхРлшпехНбчЙЗчЪДч▒╗хЮЛцаЗшпЖуАБхПВцХ░шо╛ч╜оуАБш╡Дц║Рш╖пх╛ДчнЙф┐бцБпуАВц╕▓цЯУхЩих░ЖщЕНч╜оцХ░цНоф╝ащАТч╗Щц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢чЪДхИЭхзЛхМЦцОехПгуАВ

ц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢цОецФ╢хИ░щЕНч╜оцХ░цНохРОя╝МчФЯцИРхп╣х║ФчЪДHTMLхЖЕхо╣уАВц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢ф╜┐чФишЗкх╖▒хоЪф╣ЙчЪДHTMLч╗УцЮДхТМJavaScriptщА╗ш╛Ся╝Мца╣цНощЕНч╜оцХ░цНохблхЕЕхЖЕхо╣уАВхжВцЮЬхНбчЙЗхМЕхРлшзЖщвСя╝Мц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢чФЯцИРvideoцаЗчн╛хТМцТнцФ╛цОзхИ╢чХМщЭвуАВхжВцЮЬхНбчЙЗхМЕхРлхЫ╛чЙЗя╝Мц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢чФЯцИРimgцаЗчн╛хТМцЯечЬЛхЩихКЯшГ╜уАВ

чФЯцИРчЪДHTMLшвлхКаш╜╜хИ░iframeф╕нш┐РшбМуАВiframeцПРф╛Ыф║ЖчЛмчлЛчЪДц╡ПшзИхЩиф╕Кф╕ЛцЦЗя╝Мф╕Оф╕╗щб╡щЭвщЪФчж╗уАВш┐ЩчзНщЪФчж╗чбоф┐Эф║ЖхоЙхЕицАзхТМчи│хоЪцАзя╝Ъф╕Аф╕кхНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУхЗ║щФЩф╕Нф╝Ъх╜▒хУНхЕ╢ф╗ЦхНбчЙЗхТМф╕╗чиЛх║ПуАВцпПф╕кiframeш┐РшбМхЬичЛмчлЛчЪДхЯЯф╕ня╝МщАЪш┐ЗpostMessageф╕Оф╕╗щб╡щЭвщАЪф┐буАВ

ц╕▓цЯУхоМцИРхРОя╝МчФицИ╖хПпф╗ехЬиiframeф╕нф╕ОхНбчЙЗхЖЕхо╣ф║дф║ТуАВчВ╣хЗ╗шзЖщвСхНбчЙЗх╝АхзЛцТнцФ╛я╝Мц╗ЪхКицЯечЬЛщХ┐цЦЗцЬмхЖЕхо╣я╝Мч╝йцФ╛цЯечЬЛхЫ╛чЙЗч╗ЖшКВуАВцЙАцЬЙчЪДф║дф║ТщГ╜хЬиiframeхЖЕщГихПСчФЯя╝Мф╕Нх╜▒хУНхЕ╢ф╗Цч╗Дф╗╢уАВ

## хдНхРИхНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУ

хдНхРИхНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУхдДчРЖхМЕхРлхдЪф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗчЪДхдНцЭВч╗УцЮДуАВх╜УхЙНцнгх╝ПхИЖф╕║ф╕дцЭбщУ╛ш╖пуАВ

### щАЪчФи Host цЙШчобщУ╛ш╖п

щАЪчФицЯечЬЛцАБчЪДхдНхРИхНбчЙЗчФ▒ Host ч╗Яф╕Ац╕▓цЯУуАВц╡БчиЛхжВф╕Ля╝Ъ

1. х║ФчФицПРф╛ЫхНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢ш╖пх╛Дя╝Ы
2. Host шзгцЮР `structure.yaml` ф╕О `content/*.yaml`я╝Ы
3. Host ф╛ЭцНо `capabilities.cardTypes` хИЖхПСхИ░хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢я╝Ы
4. Host ф╕║цпПф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗчФЯцИРчЛмчлЛ iframeя╝Ы
5. Host цЛ╝цОехЗ║цХ┤х╝ахдНхРИхНбчЙЗцЦЗцбгя╝Мх╣╢х░ЖхЕ╢ф╜Ьф╕║ф╕Аф╕кхдНхРИ iframe ф║дф╗Шч╗Щх║ФчФиуАВ

ш┐ЩцЭбщУ╛ш╖пщАВчФиф║ОцЯечЬЛхЩиуАБчммф╕ЙцЦ╣щЫЖцИРхТМхЕ╢ф╗ЦщАЪчФицЯечЬЛцАБхо┐ф╕╗уАВ

### хоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОч╝Цш╛СцАБщУ╛ш╖п

хоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОхЬич╝Цш╛СцАБф╕НхЖНц╢Иш┤╣цХ┤х╝ахдНхРИхНбчЙЗ iframeя╝МшАМцШпхЬих║ФчФихЖЕщГихоМцИРшгЕщЕНя╝Ъ

1. ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОшп╗хПЦшзгхМЕцАБ `.card/` чЫох╜Хя╝Ы
2. ф╛ЭцНо `cardType` ф╗ОцЬмхЬ░цППш┐░чмжц│ихЖМф╕нх┐ГшзгцЮРхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢хп╝хЗ║я╝Ы
3. ф╕║цпПф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗхИЫх╗║ф╕Аф╕кхНХчЛм iframeя╝Ы
4. цКК `renderBasecardView` цМВш╜╜хИ░шпе iframeя╝Ы
5. ф╜┐чФих║ФчФихЖЕчЪД `CompositeCardAssembler` цМЙщб║х║ПшгЕщЕНш┐Щф║ЫхНХхНб iframeя╝Ы
6. ц▒ЗцА╗хНХхНбщлШх║жуАБхКаш╜╜цАБф╕ОщФЩшппцАБя╝Мщй▒хКихНбчЙЗчкЧхПгцЫ┤цЦ░уАВ

ш┐ЩцЭбщУ╛ш╖пчЪДчЫоцаЗф╕НцШпцЫ┐ф╗г Host хп╣хдЦцОехПгя╝МшАМцШпшойч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОхг│х▒ВчЫ┤цОецОМцПбшКВчВ╣щАЙф╕нуАБх╕Гх▒Ац▒ЗцА╗хТМч╝Цш╛Сф╝ЪшпЭуАВ

## ф╕╗щвШх║ФчФи

ф╕╗щвШч│╗ч╗Яш┤Яш┤гхНбчЙЗчЪДшзЖшзЙца╖х╝ПуАВц╕▓цЯУш┐ЗчиЛф╕ня╝Мф╕╗щвШф┐бцБпшвлц│ихЕехИ░хРДф╕кч╗Дф╗╢ф╕нуАВ

# ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОшо╛шоб

## ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОчЪДхоЪф╜Н

хНбчЙЗч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОцШпхИЫх╗║хТМч╝Цш╛СхНбчЙЗчЪДш╜пф╗╢х╣│хП░я╝МцШпчФЯцАБф╕нцЬАщЗНшжБчЪДчФЯф║зхКЫх╖ехЕ╖уАВч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОцЬмш║лцШпцбЖцЮ╢я╝МхоЮщЩЕчЪДч╝Цш╛СхдДчРЖхКЯшГ╜чФ▒хп╣х║ФчЪДцПТф╗╢цПРф╛ЫуАВх╝ХцУОш┤Яш┤гцОецФ╢чФицИ╖цУНф╜Ья╝Мф╝аш╛╛ч╗ЩчЫ╕х║ФцПТф╗╢ш┐ЫшбМцХ░цНохдДчРЖя╝МхоЮцЧ╢ф┐ЭхнШцЙАцЬЙцЫ┤цФ╣уАВчФицИ╖цУНф╜ЬхоМцИРхРОцХ░цНошЗкхКиф┐ЭхнШх╣╢хИ╖цЦ░я╝Мф╕НщЬАшжБцЙЛхКиф┐ЭхнШуАВ

ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОцПРф╛ЫчкЧхПгчобчРЖуАБцЦЗф╗╢чобчРЖуАБцЛЦцЛ╜хдДчРЖуАБф┐ЭхнШцЬ║хИ╢чнЙхЯ║чбАшГ╜хКЫуАВхЕ╖ф╜УчЪДч╝Цш╛СхКЯшГ╜чФ▒цПТф╗╢хоЮчО░уАВф╛ЛхжВч╝Цш╛СщЭвцЭ┐чкЧхПгхПкцПРф╛Ыхо╣хЩихТМцМВш╜╜чВ╣я╝МхоЮщЩЕчЪДч╝Цш╛СчХМщЭвчФ▒хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗчЪДч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢цПТф╗╢ш┤Яш┤гшо╛шобуАВч╝Цш╛СщЭвцЭ┐ф╕НхМ║хИЖцЩощАЪшо╛ч╜охТМщлШч║зшо╛ч╜оя╝МчХМщЭвх╕Гх▒АхоМхЕичФ▒цПТф╗╢шЗкх╖▒хЖ│хоЪуАВ

## х╕Гх▒Ацибх╝П

ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОцФпцМБхдЪчзНх╕Гх▒Ацибх╝Пя╝МцпПчзНцибх╝ПцШпчЛмчлЛчЪДцПТф╗╢уАВч│╗ч╗Яшо╛шобф║ЖхдЪчзНхЯ║чбАх╕Гх▒Ая╝МчФицИ╖хПпф╗ехоЙшгЕцЫ┤хдЪх╕Гх▒АцПТф╗╢я╝МхЬишо╛ч╜оф╕нщАЙцЛйщ╗Шшодх╕Гх▒Ая╝Мф╣ЯхПпф╗еф╕┤цЧ╢хИЗцНвх╕Гх▒АуАВ

цЧащЩРчФ╗х╕Гх╕Гх▒АщЗЗчФиф╕дх▒ВчХМщЭвшо╛шобуАВцбМщЭвх▒ВцШпх║Хх▒Вя╝Мш┐ЩцШпф╕Аф╕кцЧащЩРхдзчЪДчФ╗х╕Гя╝МшГМцЩпцШ╛чд║ч╜Сца╝хЫ╛цбИуАВчФицИ╖хПпф╗ехЬицбМщЭвф╕КшЗкчФ▒цСЖцФ╛хНбчЙЗхТМчо▒хнРя╝МхПпф╗ецЛЦхКицбМщЭвх╣│чз╗цЯечЬЛф╕НхРМхМ║хЯЯя╝МхПпф╗ецФ╛хдзч╝йх░ПцФ╣хПШч╝йцФ╛цпФф╛ЛуАВцбМщЭвц▓бцЬЙш╛╣чХМщЩРхИ╢я╝МхПпф╗ецЧащЩРцЙйх▒ХуАВхНбчЙЗхТМчо▒хнРчкЧхПгцФ╛ч╜охЬицбМщЭвф╕Кя╝МщЪПцбМщЭвф╕Аш╡╖ч╝йцФ╛хТМчз╗хКиуАВ

чкЧхПгх▒ВцШпщб╢х▒Вя╝МхГПф╕АхЭЧчО╗чТГцВмц╡охЬицбМщЭвф╕КцЦ╣уАВчкЧхПгх▒Вф╕нчЪДхЕГч┤ахЫ║хоЪхЬих▒Пх╣Хф╜Нч╜оя╝Мф╕НщЪПцбМщЭвчЪДч╝йцФ╛хТМх╣│чз╗шАМчз╗хКиуАВчкЧхПгх▒ВхМЕхРлх╖ехЕ╖чкЧхПгхТМчиЛх║ПхЭЮуАВ

чиЛх║ПхЭЮхЬичкЧхПгх▒Вф╕ЛцЦ╣цИЦф╛зш╛╣я╝МцШ╛чд║цЙАцЬЙх╖ехЕ╖ч╗Дф╗╢чЪДхЫ╛цаЗуАВх╖ехЕ╖ч╗Дф╗╢цЬАх░ПхМЦцЧ╢хПШцИРхЫ╛цаЗф┐ЭхнШхЬичиЛх║ПхЭЮф╕ня╝МчВ╣хЗ╗хЫ╛цаЗхРОх▒Хх╝АцИРцВмц╡очкЧхПгцШ╛чд║хЬичкЧхПгх▒ВуАВ

чкЧхПгх▒ВхП│ф╕ЛшзТцЬЙч╝йцФ╛цпФф╛Лц╗СхЭЧя╝МчФицИ╖щЩдф║ЖчФищ╝ацаЗц╗Ъш╜охТМшзжцС╕цЙЛхК┐я╝Мш┐ШхПпф╗ецЛЦхКиц╗СхЭЧцФ╣хПШцбМщЭвч╝йцФ╛цпФф╛ЛуАВц╗СхЭЧцЧБш╛╣цШ╛чд║х╜УхЙНчЪДч╝йцФ╛чЩ╛хИЖцпФуАВ

## хНПшооцаЗхЗЖ

шЦпчЙЗхНПшооцШпчФЯцАБхЖЕщГихТМхдЦщГищАЪф┐бчЪДч╗Яф╕АцаЗхЗЖуАВ

щАЪф┐бхНПшоохоЪф╣Йф║Жшп╖ц▒ВхТМхУНх║ФчЪДца╝х╝ПуАВшп╖ц▒Вц╢ИцБпхМЕхРлхНПшоочЙИцЬмуАБц╢ИцБпIDуАБцЧ╢щЧ┤цИ│уАБцЬНхКбхРНчз░уАБш┤Яш╜╜цХ░цНочнЙф┐бцБпуАВхУНх║Фц╢ИцБпхМЕхРлхп╣х║ФчЪДшп╖ц▒ВIDуАБхдДчРЖчК╢цАБуАБш┐ФхЫЮцХ░цНоуАБщФЩшппф┐бцБпчнЙуАВ

ш╖пчФ▒цЬ║хИ╢шзДхоЪц╢ИцБпчЪДф╝ащАТцЦ╣х╝ПуАВцЙАцЬЙшп╖ц▒ВщГ╜ч╗Пш┐ЗхЖЕца╕ш╖пчФ▒хЩиш╜мхПСуАВш╖пчФ▒хЩица╣цНоцЬНхКбхРНчз░цЯецЙ╛хп╣х║ФчЪДхдДчРЖцибхЭЧя╝Мх░Жшп╖ц▒ВхИЖхПСш┐ЗхО╗уАВхдДчРЖхоМцИРхРОя╝Мч╗УцЮЬц▓┐хОЯш╖пш┐ФхЫЮч╗ЩхПСш╡╖шАЕуАВ

ф║Лф╗╢цЬ║хИ╢цФпцМБх╝ВцнещАЪчЯеуАВцибхЭЧхПпф╗ехПСх╕Гф║Лф╗╢я╝МхЕ╢ф╗ЦцибхЭЧхПпф╗ешовщШЕф║Лф╗╢уАВф║Лф╗╢чФиф║ОчК╢цАБхПШхМЦщАЪчЯеуАБчФицИ╖цУНф╜ЬхПНщжИчнЙхЬ║цЩпуАВ

хНбчЙЗцШ╛чд║чЫ╕хЕ│чЪДцнгх╝ПхНПшоохИЖф╕║ф╕ЙцЭбх╣╢хИЧщУ╛ш╖пя╝Ъ

- `card.render` / `client.card.compositeWindow.render(...)`я╝ЪхдНхРИхНбчЙЗцШ╛чд║щУ╛ш╖п
- `card.renderCover` / `client.card.coverFrame.render(...)`я╝Ъх░БщЭвцШ╛чд║щУ╛ш╖п
- `card.renderEditor` / `client.card.editorPanel.render(...)`я╝ЪхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч╝Цш╛СхЩищУ╛ш╖п

хЕ╢ф╕нх░БщЭвцШ╛чд║щУ╛ш╖пчЪДцнгх╝Пч║жцЭЯцШпя╝Ъ

- Host шп╗хПЦ `.card/cover.html` х╣╢ш┐ФхЫЮхПЧцОз `coverUrl`
- SDK ф╜┐чФи `coverUrl` хИЫх╗║ iframe,ф╕НхЕБшо╕цККх░БщЭв HTML чЫ┤цОех╜Уф╜ЬхнЧчмжф╕▓ц│ихЕе
- х░БщЭвхЖЕхо╣хПкчФ▒ `cover.html` хЖ│хоЪ,ф╕НшЗкхКицОехЕеф╕╗щвШхТМхдЪшпншиАч│╗ч╗Я
- `.card/cover.html` ф╕нчЪДчЫ╕хп╣ш╖пх╛ДцМЙ `.card/` чЫох╜ХшзгцЮР

## 8. цЦЗф╗╢хС╜хРНшзДшМГ

### 8.1 хС╜хРНшзДхИЩ

1. **ч╝ЦчаБ**: ф╜┐чФиUTF-8ч╝ЦчаБ,цФпцМБф╕нцЦЗцЦЗф╗╢хРН
2. **чЙ╣цоКхнЧчмж**: щБ┐хЕНф╜┐чФи `< > : " / \ | ? *`
3. **цЙйх▒ХхРН**: ф╜┐чФих░ПхЖЩ(`.mp4`шАМщЭЮ`.MP4`)
4. **чй║ца╝**: х╗║шооф╜┐чФиш┐ЮхнЧчмж`-`цИЦф╕ЛхИТч║┐`_`ф╗гцЫ┐чй║ца╝
5. **щХ┐х║ж**: цЦЗф╗╢хРНх╗║шооф╕Нш╢Еш┐З255хнЧчмж

### 8.2 щЕНч╜оцЦЗф╗╢хС╜хРН

```

```

**ф┐ЭчХЩхОЯхРН**: чФицИ╖хп╝хЕечЪДцЦЗф╗╢ф┐ЭчХЩхОЯцЦЗф╗╢хРН

## ш╡Дц║Рх╝ХчФи

ц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢хПпшГ╜щЬАшжБх╝ХчФихНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢ф╕нчЪДш╡Дц║РуАВ

цнгх╝Пч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- чЫ╕хп╣ш╖пх╛Дш╡Дц║Рх┐Ещб╗чЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхНбчЙЗхЖЕхо╣цИЦхо┐ф╕╗хИЖхПСх╛ЧхИ░чЪДш╡Дц║Рца╣шзгцЮРя╝Ы
- хНбчЙЗхЖЕщГиш╡Дц║Рш╖пх╛Дч╗Яф╕Аф╗ОхНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢ца╣чЫох╜Хх╝АхзЛшо░х╜Хя╝Мф╕НчЫ╕хп╣ф║О `content/`я╝Ы
- цПТф╗╢ф╕НчЫ┤цОехБЗхоЪшЗкх╖▒цЛецЬЙцЦЗф╗╢ч│╗ч╗ЯцЭГщЩРя╝Ы
- ш╡Дц║Р URL чЪДчФЯцИРчФ▒ Host цИЦхо┐ф╕╗ш┐РшбМцЧ╢хоМцИРя╝Мф╕НчФ▒ц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢чзБшЗкцЛ╝ч│╗ч╗Яч╗Эхп╣ш╖пх╛ДуАВ

ч╝Цш╛СцАБшбехЕЕя╝Ъ

- Host цЙШчобч╝Цш╛СхЩищУ╛ш╖пф╕ня╝Мш╡Дц║РцУНф╜ЬщАЪш┐Зцнгх╝П `chips.card-editor:resource-*` хНПшоохТМ SDK `resources` цбецОехоМцИРя╝Ы
- `importResource(...)` ш┐ФхЫЮчЪД `path` х┐Ещб╗цШпхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜ХчЫ╕хп╣ш╖пх╛Дя╝Ы
- `releaseResourceUrl(...)` чФиф║ОщЗКцФ╛ `blob:` чнЙф╕┤цЧ╢ш╡Дц║Р URLя╝Ы
- шЛехо┐ф╕╗цЬкцПРф╛Ыш╡Дц║РцбецОея╝МшАМх╜УхЙНч╝Цш╛СхЩихПИх┐Ещб╗ф╛Эш╡ЦхЖЕщГиш╡Дц║РцУНф╜Ья╝Мх║ФцШ╛х╝ПцКещФЩя╝Мф╕Нх╛ЧчзБцОецЦЗф╗╢ч│╗ч╗ЯуАВ

## чФЯхС╜хСицЬЯчобчРЖ

хНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢х┐Ещб╗хЕ╖хдЗхоМцХ┤чФЯхС╜хСицЬЯя╝Ъ

- хИЭхзЛхМЦщШ╢цо╡я╝ЪхИЫх╗║ DOMуАБч╗СхоЪф║Лф╗╢уАБхРМцнехИЭхзЛщЕНч╜оя╝Ы
- цЫ┤цЦ░щШ╢цо╡я╝ЪчФ▒хо┐ф╕╗щЗНцЦ░цМВш╜╜цИЦцОищАБцЦ░щЕНч╜оя╝Ы
- щФАцпБщШ╢цо╡я╝Ъц╕ЕчРЖф║Лф╗╢чЫСхРмуАБхоЪцЧ╢хЩиуАБч╝Цш╛СхЩихоЮф╛ЛхТМф╕┤цЧ╢шКВчВ╣уАВ

чжБцнвф║Лщб╣я╝Ъ

- цККхЕих▒Аф║Лф╗╢чЫСхРмщБЧчХЩхЬищб╡щЭвф╕Кя╝Ы
- ф╛Эш╡Цц╡ПшзИхЩихИ╖цЦ░цЙНшГ╜щЗКцФ╛чК╢цАБя╝Ы
- цКК cleanup чХЩцИР TODO цИЦчй║хоЮчО░уАВ

## ф╕╗щвШщАВщЕН

хНбчЙЗцПТф╗╢х┐Ещб╗щАВщЕНч╗Яф╕Аф╕╗щвШч│╗ч╗ЯуАВ

цнгх╝ПшжБц▒Вя╝Ъ

- `interactionPolicy`: `native | delegate`

хПВцХ░цабщкМшзДхИЩя╝Ъ

- `target` щЭЮчЩ╜хРНхНХхА╝цЧ╢я╝МHost х┐Ещб╗ш┐ФхЫЮ `SCHEMA_VALIDATION_FAILED`уАВ
- `viewport.width/height`я╝ИшЛецПРф╛Ыя╝Йх┐Ещб╗хдзф║О 0 ф╕Фф╕║цЬЙщЩРцХ░хА╝уАВ
- `viewport.scrollTop/scrollLeft`я╝ИшЛецПРф╛Ыя╝Йх┐Ещб╗ф╕║цЬЙщЩРцХ░хА╝уАВ
- `verifyConsistency`я╝ИшЛецПРф╛Ыя╝Йх┐Ещб╗ф╕║х╕Гх░ФхА╝уАВ
- `mode`я╝ИшЛецПРф╛Ыя╝Йх┐Ещб╗цШп `view | preview`уАВ
- `interactionPolicy`я╝ИшЛецПРф╛Ыя╝Йх┐Ещб╗цШп `native | delegate`уАВ

`card.render` ш┐ФхЫЮ `view.semanticHash` ф╕ОхПпщАЙ `view.diagnostics/view.consistency`я╝МчФиф║Оф╕АшЗ┤цАзцпФхп╣ф╕ОшпКцЦнуАВ

`card.renderCover` ш┐ФхЫЮ `view.title/view.coverUrl/view.ratio`я╝Мцнгх╝Пч║жцЭЯхжВф╕Ля╝Ъ

- `view.coverUrl` х┐Ещб╗цМЗхРСхПЧцОзчЪД `.card/cover.html` хЕехПгя╝Мф╛Ы SDK ф╜Ьф╕║ iframe `src` ф╜┐чФия╝Ы
- `.card/cover.html` ф╕нчЪДчЫ╕хп╣ш╖пх╛Дх┐Ещб╗чЫ╕хп╣ф║О `.card/` чЫох╜ХшзгцЮРя╝МхПпч╗зч╗нх╝ХчФи `.card/cardcover/*`я╝Ы
- х░БщЭвщУ╛ш╖пф╕Нц│ихЕехдНхРИхНбчЙЗхг│х▒Вя╝Мф╣Яф╕НшЗкхКиц│ихЕеф╕╗щвШ CSSуАБхдЪшпншиАцЦЗцбИцИЦхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗшКВчВ╣ш┐РшбМцЧ╢я╝Ы
- х║ФчФих▒Вф╕Нх╛ЧцКК `view.coverUrl` хЖНцФ╣хЖЩф╕║ф╗╗цДП `srcdoc` цИЦхЖЕшБФ HTML хнЧчмжф╕▓уАВ

шп┤цШОя╝Ъ

- `interactionPolicy = 'native'` шбичд║хдНхРИхНбчЙЗф┐ЭцМБхОЯчФЯц╗ЪхКи/шзжцС╕шбМф╕║я╝Мф╕НхРСхдЦх▒Вх║ФчФихг│х▒Вф╗гчРЖф║дф║ТцДПхЫ╛я╝Ы
- `interactionPolicy = 'delegate'` шбичд║ Host хдНхРИцЦЗцбгф╕ОхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцЦЗцбгщЬАшжБцККц╗Ъш╜оуАБшзжцС╕ц╗ЪхКиуАБцНПхРИч╝йцФ╛чнЙф║дф║ТцДПхЫ╛цнгх╝ПхЫЮф╝аф╕║ `chips.composite:interaction`я╝Ы
- щАЙцЛй Host цЙШчобхдНхРИ iframe чЪДцЧащЩРчФ╗х╕ГхЬ║цЩпя╝Мх║Фф╜┐чФи `delegate`я╝МхЕ╢ф╗ЦхЬ║цЩпщ╗Шшодф┐ЭцМБ `native`уАВ

`card.renderEditor` ш┐ФхЫЮ `view.title/body/cardType/pluginId/baseCardId`я╝МчФиф║Оч╝Цш╛СщЭвцЭ┐шгЕш╜╜цнгх╝ПхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч╝Цш╛СхЩи iframeуАВ

цнгх╝Пч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ

- цЩощАЪх║ФчФихТМчммф╕ЙцЦ╣хо┐ф╕╗ф╕Нх╛ЧшЗкшбМцЙлцППцПТф╗╢чЫох╜ХхРОчЫ┤цОе import ч╝Цш╛СхЩицибхЭЧя╝Ы
- хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч╝Цш╛СхЩих┐Ещб╗щАЪш┐З `card.renderEditor` чФ▒ Host цМЙ `capabilities.cardTypes` ш╖пчФ▒я╝Ы
- `initialConfig` чФ▒х║ФчФих▒ВцПРф╛Ых╜УхЙНхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗхЖЕхо╣х┐лчЕзя╝МHost ш┤Яш┤гц│ихЕецПТф╗╢ч╝Цш╛СхЩиш┐РшбМцЧ╢я╝Ы

ш╛╣чХМшбехЕЕя╝Ъ

- хоШцЦ╣ `Chips-EditingEngine` чЪДцнгх╝Пч╝Цш╛СцАБщУ╛ш╖пф╕НхЖНцКК `card.renderEditor` ф╜Ьф╕║ф╕╗ш╖пх╛Дя╝Ы

-    description: "щАВщЕНцибх╝П"
-    
-  clickable:
-    type: boolean
-    default: true
-    description: "цШпхРжцФпцМБчВ╣хЗ╗цФ╛хдз"
+    description: "хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗф╕╗щвШшжЖчЫЦцаЗшпЖ,ф╕║чй║цЧ╢ц▓┐чФиф╕Кх▒Вф╕╗щвШ"
+
+  layout:
+    type: object
+    properties:
+      height_mode:
+        type: string
+        enum: ["auto", "fixed"]
+        default: "auto"
+      fixed_height:
+        type: number
+        minimum: 1
+        default: 720
+
+  images:
+    type: array
+    description: "хЫ╛чЙЗхИЧшби,хЕБшо╕ф╕║чй║цХ░ч╗Д"
+    items:
+      type: object
+      required:
+        - id
+        - source
+      properties:
+        id:
+          type: string
+          description: "хЫ╛чЙЗщб╣хФпф╕АID"
+        source:
+          type: string
+          enum: ["file", "url"]
+        file_path:
+          type: string
+          description: "хНбчЙЗхЖЕщГицЦЗф╗╢ш╖пх╛Д,х┐Ещб╗чЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜Х"
+        url:
+          type: string
+          description: "ш┐ЬчиЛхЫ╛чЙЗхЬ░хЭА,ф╗ЕхЕБшо╕ http/https цИЦ data:image/*"
+        alt:
+          type: string
+        title:
+          type: string
+
+  layout_type:
+    type: string
+    enum: ["single", "grid", "long-scroll", "horizontal-scroll"]
+    default: "single"
+
+  layout_options:
+    type: object
+    properties:
+      grid_mode:
+        type: string
+        enum: ["2x2", "3x3", "3-column-infinite"]
+        default: "2x2"
+      scroll_mode:
+        type: string
+        enum: ["fixed-window", "adaptive"]
+        default: "fixed-window"
+      fixed_window_height:
+        type: number
+        minimum: 1
+        default: 600
+      single_width_percent:
+        type: number
+        minimum: 10
+        maximum: 100
+        default: 100
+      single_alignment:
+        type: string
+        enum: ["left", "center", "right"]
+        default: "center"
+      gap:
+        type: number
+        minimum: 0
+        default: 8
 ```
 
 **чд║ф╛Л**:
 
 ```yaml
 # content/k1L2m3N4o5.yaml
 card_type: "ImageCard"
+theme: ""
 layout:
   height_mode: "auto"
+  fixed_height: 720
 
-image_file: "photo.jpg"
-title: "ф╕Ьф║мхбФхдЬцЩп"
-caption: "цСДф║О2026х╣┤1цЬИ15цЧецЩЪф╕К"
-fit_mode: "contain"
-clickable: true
+images:
+  - id: "cover-1"
+    source: "file"
+    file_path: "photo.jpg"
+    title: "ф╕Ьф║мхбФхдЬцЩп"
+    alt: "ф╕Ьф║мхбФхдЬцЩпчЕзчЙЗ"
+  - id: "cover-2"
+    source: "url"
+    url: "https://example.com/tokyo-night-2.jpg"
+    title: "хдЗчФич╜Сч╗ЬхЫ╛"
+    alt: "ф╕Ьф║мхдЬцЩпшбехЕЕхЫ╛чЙЗ"
+
+layout_type: "grid"
+layout_options:
+  grid_mode: "2x2"
+  scroll_mode: "fixed-window"
+  fixed_window_height: 600
+  single_width_percent: 100
+  single_alignment: "center"
+  gap: 8
 ```
+
+шбехЕЕшп┤цШО:
+
+- `images` хПпф╗еф╕║чй║цХ░ч╗Д,цндцЧ╢хЫ╛чЙЗхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцШ╛чд║ф╕║чй║чК╢цАБ;
+- `source = file` цЧ╢х┐Ещб╗цПРф╛Ы `file_path`,ф╕Фш╖пх╛Дх┐Ещб╗чЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜Х;
+- `source = url` цЧ╢х┐Ещб╗цПРф╛ЫхРИц│ХчЪД `http/https` цИЦ `data:image/*` хЬ░хЭА;
+- цнгх╝Пф┐ЭхнШщУ╛ш╖пф╝ЪцККхп╝хЕецЦЗф╗╢хЖЩхЕехНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜Х,х╣╢хЬищЕНч╜оф╕нф╗Ешо░х╜ХчЫ╕хп╣ш╖пх╛Д,ф╛ЛхжВ `photo.jpg`;
+- х╜У `images.length <= 1` цЧ╢,ш┐РшбМцЧ╢цЬЙцХИх╕Гх▒Ах╝║хИ╢шзЖф╕║ `single`,хН│ф╜┐щЕНч╜оф╕нчЪД `layout_type` ф╕║хЕ╢ф╗ЦхА╝уАВ
@@
 **чЫ╕хп╣ш╖пх╛Д**(ш╡Дц║РхЬихНбчЙЗхЖЕщГи):

```diff

 - `RichTextCard -> base.richtext` ш┐Щч▒╗хИлхРНх╜Тф╕Ах▒Юф║ОцППш┐░чмжх▒ВшГ╜хКЫя╝Мф╕Нх╛ЧцХгшР╜хЬиф╕ЪхКбч╗Дф╗╢ф╕ня╝Ы
 - ш╡Дц║РхЮЛхНбчЙЗчЪДцнгх╝ПщЕНч╜охПкф┐ЭхнШтАЬчЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜ХтАЭчЪДш╡Дц║Рш╖пх╛Дя╝Ы

+- х╜УхЙНцнгх╝ПщЭЩцАБц│ихЖМч▒╗хЮЛшЗ│х░СхМЕцЛм `base.richtext` ф╕О `base.image`я╝МхоГф╗мщГ╜хПкцШпц│ихЖМф╕нх┐Гф╕нчЪДцППш┐░чмжя╝Мф╕НцШпф╕╗ц╡БчиЛчЙ╣хИдуАВ
@@
 цнгх╝Пч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ
 
 - хоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОчЪДч╝Цш╛СхЩиф╕╗щУ╛ш╖пф╕НхЖНф╜┐чФи iframe хо┐ф╕╗я╝Ы
 - `PluginHost` хЬич╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОф╕нф╗Еф╜Ьф╕║ `EditorHost` чЪДшЦДхМЕшгЕя╝Мф╕НхЖНцЙ┐цЛЕ SDK iframe ч╝Цш╛СхЩишБМш┤гуАВ
+- `resolveResourceUrl(...)` х┐Ещб╗ф╝ШхЕИхС╜ф╕нх╜УхЙНф╝ЪшпЭф╕нчЪДх╛Ехп╝хЕеш╡Дц║Ря╝МхЕ╢цмбхЖНхЫЮщААхИ░хНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜ХчЬЯхоЮцЦЗф╗╢я╝Ы
+- `importResource(...)` х┐Ещб╗ф╕║х╜УхЙНхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜ХцМСщАЙхПпчФицЦЗф╗╢хРНя╝МщБ┐хЕНшжЖчЫЦх╖▓цЬЙш╡Дц║Ря╝Ы
+- `deleteResource(...)` хПкчЩ╗шо░хИащЩдцДПхЫ╛я╝МцЬАч╗ИчЙйчРЖхИащЩдцЧ╢цЬ║чФ▒цМБф╣ЕхМЦщШ╢цо╡ф╛ЭцНочЬЯхоЮх╝ХчФихЕ│ч│╗хЖ│хоЪуАВ
@@
 6. шЛеч╝Цш╛СхЩихПСчФЯш╡Дц║Рхп╝хЕе/хИащЩдя╝М`EditorHost` хЕИцККш┐Щф║ЫцУНф╜ЬчЩ╗шо░хИ░х╜УхЙНф╝ЪшпЭя╝Ы
 7. `EditorSessionStore` ш░ГчФи `CardService.updateBasicCard(...)` цПРф║дхРИц│ХщЕНч╜оя╝Ы

-- шЛецПТф╗╢щЬАшжБхЕ╝хо╣ `RichTextCard -> base.richtext` ш┐Щч▒╗хИлхРНя╝Мх║ФхЬихо┐ф╕╗цППш┐░чмжх▒ВхдДчРЖя╝Мф╕Нх║ФцККхИлхРНхИдцЦнцХгшР╜хЬиф╕ЪхКбч╗Дф╗╢ф╕нуАВ
+- шЛецПТф╗╢щЬАшжБхЕ╝хо╣ `RichTextCard -> base.richtext`уАБ`ImageCard -> base.image` ш┐Щч▒╗хИлхРНя╝Мх║ФхЬихо┐ф╕╗цППш┐░чмжх▒ВхдДчРЖя╝Мф╕Нх║ФцККхИлхРНхИдцЦнцХгшР╜хЬиф╕ЪхКбч╗Дф╗╢ф╕нуАВ
@@
 цнгх╝Пч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ
 
-- чЫ╕хп╣ш╖пх╛Дш╡Дц║Рх┐Ещб╗чЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхНбчЙЗхЖЕхо╣цИЦхо┐ф╕╗хИЖхПСх╛ЧхИ░чЪДш╡Дц║Рца╣шзгцЮРя╝Ы
+- чЫ╕хп╣ш╖пх╛Дш╡Дц║Рх┐Ещб╗чЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜ХшзгцЮРя╝Мш┐РшбМцЧ╢хПпщАЪш┐З Host цИЦцЬмхЬ░ш┐РшбМцЧ╢ц│ихЕечЪДш╡Дц║РхЯ║хЗЖхЬ░хЭАчФЯцХИя╝Ы
 - хНбчЙЗхЖЕщГиш╡Дц║Рш╖пх╛Дч╗Яф╕Аф╗ОхНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢ца╣чЫох╜Хх╝АхзЛшо░х╜Хя╝Мф╕НчЫ╕хп╣ф║О `content/`я╝Ы
 - цПТф╗╢ф╕НчЫ┤цОехБЗхоЪшЗкх╖▒цЛецЬЙцЦЗф╗╢ч│╗ч╗ЯцЭГщЩРя╝Ы

```

+- хп╣х╝ХчФихНбчЙЗхЖЕщГиш╡Дц║РчЪДхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗя╝МHost х┐Ещб╗хРСхНХхНбцЦЗцбгцПРф╛ЫхПпшзгцЮРхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜ХчЫ╕хп╣ш╖пх╛ДчЪДш╡Дц║РхЯ║хЗЖхЬ░хЭАя╝Ы

**Update: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/чФЯцАБхЕ▒чФицКАцЬпцЦЗцбг/хНПшооф╕ОцОехПгцаЗхЗЖ/02-Bridge-APIшзДшМГ.md`**

```diff
@@
 ш╡Дц║Рф║Лф╗╢ч║жцЭЯя╝Ъ
 
 - `resource-request` / `resource-response` чФиф║Оч╝Цш╛СхЩи iframe ф╕ОхдЦх▒Вхо┐ф╕╗ф╣ЛщЧ┤чЪДцнгх╝Пш╡Дц║РцбецОея╝Ы
 - `resourcePath` ф╕Ах╛Лф╜┐чФичЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜ХчЪДш╖пх╛Дя╝Ы
 - `resource-request.action` х╜УхЙНцнгх╝ПцФпцМБ `resolve | import | delete`я╝Ы
+- `resolve` хУНх║Фш┐ФхЫЮчЪД URL хПкф╜Ьф╕║х╜УхЙНф╝ЪшпЭчЪДш┐РшбМцЧ╢шо┐щЧохЬ░хЭАя╝МшЛеф╜┐чФи `blob:` чнЙф╕┤цЧ╢хЬ░хЭАя╝МхРОч╗нх┐Ещб╗цФпцМБ `resource-release`я╝Ы
+- `import` хУНх║Фш┐ФхЫЮчЪД `path` х┐Ещб╗цШпхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜ХчЫ╕хп╣ш╖пх╛Дя╝Мхо┐ф╕╗х║Фш┤Яш┤гцМСщАЙф╕НхЖ▓чкБчЪДцнгх╝ПцЦЗф╗╢хРНя╝Ы
+- `delete` шбичд║хп╣хНбчЙЗхЖЕщГиш╡Дц║РхПСш╡╖хИащЩдцДПхЫ╛я╝МцШпхРжчлЛхН│чЙйчРЖхИащЩдчФ▒хо┐ф╕╗цМБф╣ЕхМЦщУ╛ш╖пхЖ│хоЪя╝Ы
 - `resource-release` чФиф║ОщАЪчЯехдЦх▒Вхо┐ф╕╗щЗКцФ╛ `blob:` чнЙф╕┤цЧ╢ш╡Дц║Р URLя╝Ы
 - SDK `editorPanel.render({ resources })` хПпф╗ехЬицЬмхЬ░цбецОеш┐Щч╗ДхНПшооя╝Мф╜Ж `resources` цЬмш║лф╕Нш┐ЫхЕе `card.renderEditor` Host ш╖пчФ▒ш╛УхЕеуАВ
```

-шзЖщвСхНбчЙЗчЪДч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢цПРф╛ЫцЦЗф╗╢ф╕Кф╝ахКЯшГ╜шойчФицИ╖щАЙцЛйшзЖщвСцЦЗф╗╢я╝МцПРф╛Ых░БщЭвщАЙцЛйхКЯшГ╜шо╛ч╜ошзЖщвСч╝йчХехЫ╛я╝МцПРф╛ЫхнЧх╣ХчобчРЖхКЯшГ╜ц╖╗хКахТМч╝Цш╛СхнЧх╣Хя╝МцПРф╛ЫцТнцФ╛хПВцХ░шо╛ч╜оцОзхИ╢шЗкхКицТнцФ╛уАБх╛кчОпцТнцФ╛чнЙщАЙщб╣уАВхЫ╛чЙЗхНбчЙЗчЪДч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢цПРф╛ЫхЫ╛чЙЗф╕Кф╝ахКЯшГ╜уАБцаЗщвШш╛УхЕехКЯшГ╜уАБщАВщЕНцибх╝ПщАЙцЛйхКЯшГ╜чнЙуАВMarkdownхНбчЙЗчЪДч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢цПРф╛ЫхЖЕхо╣ч╝Цш╛СхКЯшГ╜уАБшпнц│ХщлШф║оф╕╗щвШщАЙцЛйхКЯшГ╜уАБчЫох╜ХчФЯцИРщАЙщб╣чнЙуАВ
+шзЖщвСхНбчЙЗчЪДч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢цПРф╛ЫцЦЗф╗╢ф╕Кф╝ахКЯшГ╜шойчФицИ╖щАЙцЛйшзЖщвСцЦЗф╗╢я╝МцПРф╛Ых░БщЭвщАЙцЛйхКЯшГ╜шо╛ч╜ошзЖщвСч╝йчХехЫ╛я╝МцПРф╛ЫхнЧх╣ХчобчРЖхКЯшГ╜ц╖╗хКахТМч╝Цш╛СхнЧх╣Хя╝МцПРф╛ЫцТнцФ╛хПВцХ░шо╛ч╜оцОзхИ╢шЗкхКицТнцФ╛уАБх╛кчОпцТнцФ╛чнЙщАЙщб╣уАВх╜УхЙНцнгх╝ПхЫ╛чЙЗхНбчЙЗчЪДч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢цПРф╛ЫцЬмхЬ░хп╝хЕеуАБURLц╖╗хКауАБцЫ┐цНвуАБхИащЩдуАБц╕Ечй║уАБцЛЦцЛ╜цОТх║ПуАБцаЗщвШф╕ОцЫ┐ф╗гцЦЗцЬмч╝Цш╛Ся╝Мф╗ехПКх╕Гх▒АхПВцХ░ш░ГцХ┤уАВMarkdownхНбчЙЗчЪДч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢цПРф╛ЫхЖЕхо╣ч╝Цш╛СхКЯшГ╜уАБшпнц│ХщлШф║оф╕╗щвШщАЙцЛйхКЯшГ╜уАБчЫох╜ХчФЯцИРщАЙщб╣чнЙуАВ
@@
-ч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢ф┐оцФ╣чЪДщЕНч╜оф┐ЭхнШхЬихдНхРИхНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢чЪДcontentчЫох╜Хф╕ЛуАВцпПф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцЬЙф╕Аф╕кчЛмчлЛчЪДщЕНч╜оцЦЗф╗╢я╝МцЦЗф╗╢хРНф╜┐чФишпехНбчЙЗчЪДхНБф╜НхЕнхНБф║Мш┐ЫхИ╢IDуАВщЕНч╜оцЦЗф╗╢чЪДхЕ╖ф╜Уч╗УцЮДчФ▒цПТф╗╢хоЪф╣Йя╝Мф╕НхРМч▒╗хЮЛчЪДхНбчЙЗцЬЙф╕НхРМчЪДщЕНч╜ощб╣уАВч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢ш┤Яш┤гшп╗хПЦхТМхЖЩхЕеш┐Щф║ЫщЕНч╜оя╝Мч│╗ч╗Яш┤Яш┤гх░ЖщЕНч╜оф┐ЭхнШхИ░хНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢ф╕нуАВ
+ч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢ф┐оцФ╣чЪДщЕНч╜оцЬАч╗Иф┐ЭхнШхЬихдНхРИхНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢чЪД`content`чЫох╜Хф╕ЛуАВцпПф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцЬЙф╕Аф╕кчЛмчлЛчЪДщЕНч╜оцЦЗф╗╢я╝МцЦЗф╗╢хРНф╜┐чФишпехНбчЙЗчЪДхНБф╜НхЕнхНБф║Мш┐ЫхИ╢IDуАВщЕНч╜оцЦЗф╗╢чЪДхЕ╖ф╜Уч╗УцЮДчФ▒цПТф╗╢хоЪф╣Йя╝Мф╕НхРМч▒╗хЮЛчЪДхНбчЙЗцЬЙф╕НхРМчЪДщЕНч╜ощб╣уАВч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢ш┤Яш┤гш╛УхЗ║цЦ░чЪДщЕНч╜ох┐лчЕзя╝Мч│╗ч╗Яш┤Яш┤гщАЪш┐Зцнгх╝Пхо┐ф╕╗щУ╛ш╖пх░ЖщЕНч╜охЖЩхЫЮхНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢уАВ
@@
 цнгх╝ПшгЕш╜╜шжБц▒Вя╝Ъ
 
 - цПТф╗╢хМЕх║ФхРМцЧ╢хп╝хЗ║ `renderBasecardView` ф╕О `renderBasecardEditor`я╝Ы
 - Host щАЪчФицШ╛чд║щУ╛ш╖пф╝Ъц╢Иш┤╣ш┐Щф╕дч▒╗хп╝хЗ║я╝Мх╣╢цККхоГф╗мхМЕшгЕш┐Ыцнгх╝П iframe цЦЗцбгя╝Ы
 - хоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОф╝ЪхЬицЮДх╗║цЬЯщЭЩцАБц│ихЖМхРМф╕Ач╗Дхп╝хЗ║я╝Ъ
   - `renderBasecardView` цМВш╜╜хИ░ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОхИЫх╗║чЪДхНХхНб iframeя╝Ы
   - `renderBasecardEditor` чЫ┤цОецМВш╜╜хИ░ч╝Цш╛СщЭвцЭ┐хо╣хЩия╝Ы
+- хп╣хЫ╛чЙЗуАБшзЖщвСчнЙш╡Дц║РхЮЛхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗя╝МхЖЕщГицЦЗф╗╢ш╡Дц║Рх┐Ещб╗ф┐ЭхнШхИ░хНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜Хя╝Мх╣╢хЬищЕНч╜оф╕нф╗Ешо░х╜Хца╣чЫох╜ХчЫ╕хп╣ш╖пх╛Дя╝Ы
+- ш╡Дц║РхЮЛч╝Цш╛СхЩих┐Ещб╗щАЪш┐Зхо┐ф╕╗цПРф╛ЫчЪД `resolve/import/delete/releaseResourceUrl` шГ╜хКЫхоМцИРш╡Дц║РчФЯхС╜хСицЬЯя╝Мф╕Нх╛ЧшЗкшбМцЛ╝цОецЦЗф╗╢ч│╗ч╗Яш╖пх╛Дя╝Ы
 - цЩощАЪх║ФчФихТМчммф╕ЙцЦ╣щЫЖцИРф╕Нх╛ЧчЫ┤цОе import цПТф╗╢ц║РчаБя╝МхПкцЬЙхоШцЦ╣ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОхПпф╗ецМЙцнгх╝ПхЕ▒ф║лшзДшМГц╢Иш┤╣ш┐Щф║Ыхп╝хЗ║уАВ
@@
-ч╝Цш╛СхНбчЙЗчЪДц╡БчиЛч▒╗ф╝╝уАВчФицИ╖цЛЦцЛ╜шзЖщвСхНбчЙЗхИ░ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОчЪДчФ╗х╕Гя╝МцУНф╜ЬшвлхПСщАБхИ░хЖЕца╕я╝МхЖЕца╕ш╖пчФ▒хИ░хНбчЙЗч╝Цш╛СцибхЭЧуАВчФицИ╖чВ╣хЗ╗цЯРф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗя╝МхЖЕца╕шпЖхИлщЬАшжБхКаш╜╜шпеч▒╗хЮЛчЪДч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢уАВч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢хКаш╜╜хРОцШ╛чд║хЬич╝Цш╛СщЭвцЭ┐чкЧхПгф╕нуАВчФицИ╖ф╕Кф╝ашзЖщвСуАБшо╛ч╜охПВцХ░я╝Мч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢щАЪш┐ЗхЖЕца╕цОехПгх░ЖщЕНч╜оф┐ЭхнШхИ░хНбчЙЗцЦЗф╗╢ф╕нуАВф┐ЭхнШхоМцИРхРОя╝Мц╕▓цЯУч╗Дф╗╢ф╝ЪшЗкхКицЫ┤цЦ░цШ╛чд║цЦ░чЪДхЖЕхо╣уАВ
+ч╝Цш╛СхНбчЙЗчЪДц╡БчиЛч▒╗ф╝╝уАВчФицИ╖цЛЦцЛ╜шзЖщвСхНбчЙЗхИ░ч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОчЪДчФ╗х╕Гя╝МцУНф╜ЬшвлхПСщАБхИ░хЖЕца╕я╝МхЖЕца╕ш╖пчФ▒хИ░хНбчЙЗч╝Цш╛СцибхЭЧуАВчФицИ╖чВ╣хЗ╗цЯРф╕кхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗя╝Мч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОца╣цНох╜УхЙН`cardType`шзгцЮРх╖▓ц│ихЖМчЪДхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцППш┐░чмжуАВч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢хКаш╜╜хРОцШ╛чд║хЬич╝Цш╛СщЭвцЭ┐чкЧхПгф╕нуАВчФицИ╖ф╕Кф╝ашзЖщвСуАБшо╛ч╜охПВцХ░я╝Мч╝Цш╛Сч╗Дф╗╢щАЪш┐З`onChange`ш╛УхЗ║цЦ░чЪДщЕНч╜ох┐лчЕзя╝Ыхо┐ф╕╗ш┐РшбМцЧ╢хЖНш┤Яш┤гф┐ЭхнШщЕНч╜оуАБхп╝хЕеш╡Дц║Рх╣╢хИ╖цЦ░щвДшзИхЖЕхо╣уАВ

# ImageCardщЕНч╜оSchema
$schema: "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"
title: "Image Card Config Schema"
type: object
required:
  - card_type
  - images
  - layout_type

properties:
  card_type:
    const: "ImageCard"

  theme:
    type: string
    description: "хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗф╕╗щвШшжЖчЫЦцаЗшпЖ,ф╕║чй║цЧ╢ц▓┐чФиф╕Кх▒Вф╕╗щвШ"

  layout:
    type: object
    properties:
      height_mode:
        type: string
        enum: ["auto", "fixed"]
        default: "auto"
      fixed_height:
        type: number
        minimum: 1
        default: 720

  images:
    type: array
    description: "хЫ╛чЙЗхИЧшби,хЕБшо╕ф╕║чй║цХ░ч╗Д"
    items:
      type: object
      required:
        - id
        - source
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: "хЫ╛чЙЗщб╣хФпф╕АID"
        source:
          type: string
          enum: ["file", "url"]
        file_path:
          type: string
          description: "хНбчЙЗхЖЕщГицЦЗф╗╢ш╖пх╛Д,х┐Ещб╗чЫ╕хп╣ф║ОхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜Х"
        url:

          description: "ш┐ЬчиЛхЫ╛чЙЗхЬ░хЭА,ф╗ЕхЕБшо╕ http/https цИЦ data:image/*"
        alt:
          type: string
        title:
          type: string

  layout_type:
    type: string
    enum: ["single", "grid", "long-scroll", "horizontal-scroll"]
    default: "single"

  layout_options:
    type: object
    properties:
      grid_mode:
        type: string
        enum: ["2x2", "3x3", "3-column-infinite"]
        default: "2x2"
      scroll_mode:
        type: string
        enum: ["fixed-window", "adaptive"]
        default: "fixed-window"
      fixed_window_height:
        type: number
        minimum: 1
        default: 600

        default: 100
      single_alignment:
        type: string

        default: "center"

        type: number
        minimum: 0
        default: 8

```typescript
const result = await client.card.editorPanel.render({
  cardType: 'base.image',
  baseCardId: 'image-1',
  initialConfig: {
    card_type: 'ImageCard',
    images: [
      {
        id: 'image-1',
        source: 'file',
        file_path: 'cover.png',
        title: 'х░БщЭвхЫ╛',
        alt: 'хНбчЙЗх░БщЭвхЫ╛',
      },
    ],
    layout_type: 'single',
    layout: {
      height_mode: 'auto',
      fixed_height: 720,
    },
    layout_options: {
      single_width_percent: 100,
      single_alignment: 'center',
      gap: 8,
    },
  },
  resources: {
    rootPath: '/workspace/cards/demo',
    async importResource({ file, preferredPath }) {
      return saveIntoCardRoot(file, preferredPath);
    },
    async deleteResource(resourcePath) {
      await removeFromCardRoot(resourcePath);
    },
    releaseResourceUrl(resourcePath) {
      releaseBlobUrl(resourcePath);
    },
  },
});
```

## ф║дф║ТхКЯшГ╜

цЯечЬЛхЩицФпцМБф╕░хпМчЪДф║дф║ТхКЯшГ╜я╝МцПРхНЗц╡ПшзИф╜УщкМуАВ

ч╝йцФ╛хКЯшГ╜хЕБшо╕чФицИ╖ш░ГцХ┤хЖЕхо╣чЪДцШ╛чд║цпФф╛ЛуАВхПпф╗ещАЪш┐Зц╗Ъш╜оуАБч╝йцФ╛цМЙщТоуАБцЙЛхК┐чнЙцЦ╣х╝Пч╝йцФ╛уАВ

ц╗ЪхКихп╝шИкхЬихЖЕхо╣ш╢ЕхЗ║чкЧхПгцЧ╢цПРф╛Ыц╗ЪхКиц╡ПшзИуАВчФицИ╖хПпф╗ех╣│ц╗Сц╗ЪхКицЯечЬЛхоМцХ┤хЖЕхо╣уАВ

х╜УцЯечЬЛхЩищЗЗчФи Host цЙШчобхдНхРИхНбчЙЗчкЧхПгцЧ╢я╝МхЖЕщГиш╡Дц║Рш╖пх╛Дх┐Ещб╗ч╗зч╗нф╗ОхНбчЙЗца╣чЫох╜Хх╝АхзЛшо░х╜ХуАВчЫ╕хп╣ш╡Дц║РчФ▒ Host ч╗Яф╕АшзгцЮРх╣╢хИЖхПСч╗ЩхНХхНб iframeя╝МцЯечЬЛхЩицЬмш║лф╕НцЛ╝цОеш╡Дц║Рч╗Эхп╣ш╖пх╛ДуАВ

ф╣жчн╛хКЯшГ╜шойчФицИ╖цаЗшо░щЗНшжБчЪДф╜Нч╜оя╝Мф╕ЛцмбцЙУх╝АхПпф╗ечЫ┤цОеш╖│ш╜мхИ░ф╣жчн╛хдДуАВ

хОЖхП▓шо░х╜Хш╖Яш╕кчФицИ╖чЪДц╡ПшзИхОЖхП▓я╝МцФпцМБхЙНш┐ЫхТМхРОщААцУНф╜ЬуАВ

## цЯечЬЛцибх╝П

цЯечЬЛхЩицФпцМБхдЪчзНцЯечЬЛцибх╝ПщАВх║Фф╕НхРМхЬ║цЩпуАВ

хЕих▒Пцибх╝ПщЪРшЧПцЙАцЬЙчХМщЭвхЕГч┤ая╝МхПкцШ╛чд║хЖЕхо╣я╝МщАВхРИц▓Йц╡╕х╝Пц╡ПшзИуАВчФицИ╖цМЙEscapeщФоцИЦчВ╣хЗ╗ш┐ФхЫЮцМЙщТощААхЗ║хЕих▒ПуАВ

ц╝Фчд║цибх╝Пф╝ШхМЦхЖЕхо╣х▒Хчд║я╝МщАВхРИхИЖф║лхТМх▒Хчд║хЬ║цЩпуАВц╝Фчд║цибх╝ПхПпшГ╜ш░ГцХ┤хнЧф╜Ухдзх░ПуАБхп╣цпФх║жчнЙхПВцХ░уАВ

щШЕшп╗цибх╝ПчоАхМЦчХМщЭвя╝МхПкф┐ЭчХЩца╕х┐ГщШЕшп╗хКЯшГ╜я╝МщЪРшЧПх╖ехЕ╖цаПхТМф╛зш╛╣цаПуАВ

цЙУхН░цибх╝Пф╝ШхМЦцЙУхН░ш╛УхЗ║я╝Мш░ГцХ┤щб╡щЭвх╕Гх▒АхТМца╖х╝Пчбоф┐ЭцЙУхН░цХИцЮЬуАВ

## хИЖф║лхКЯшГ╜

цЯечЬЛхЩицПРф╛ЫхЖЕхо╣хИЖф║лшГ╜хКЫуАВ

хп╝хЗ║хКЯшГ╜х░ЖхНбчЙЗф┐ЭхнШф╕║хЕ╢ф╗Цца╝х╝Пя╝МхжВPDFуАБхЫ╛чЙЗчнЙуАВхп╝хЗ║чЪДцЦЗф╗╢хПпф╗ехЬихЕ╢ф╗Цш╜пф╗╢ф╕нцЙУх╝АуАВ

хИЖф║лщУ╛цОечФЯцИРхНбчЙЗчЪДхИЖф║лщУ╛цОея╝МхЕ╢ф╗ЦчФицИ╖хПпф╗ещАЪш┐ЗщУ╛цОечЫ┤цОецЯечЬЛхНбчЙЗхЖЕхо╣уАВщУ╛цОехПпф╗ешо╛ч╜оф╕║хЕмх╝АцИЦчзБцЬЙя╝МцОзхИ╢шо┐щЧоцЭГщЩРуАВ

х╡МхЕеф╗гчаБчФЯцИРхПпф╗ехЬичммф╕ЙцЦ╣ч╜СчлЩх╡МхЕехНбчЙЗчЪДHTMLф╗гчаБуАВх╡МхЕечЪДхНбчЙЗф┐ЭцМБф║дф║ТшГ╜хКЫя╝МшзВчЬЛшАЕхПпф╗ечЫ┤цОехЬич╜Сщб╡ф╕нц╡ПшзИхЖЕхо╣уАВ

import type { BasecardConfigRecord, BasecardDescriptor, EditorValidationResult } from './contracts';
import { imageBasecardDescriptor } from './registrations/image';
import { richtextBasecardDescriptor } from './registrations/richtext';

const basecardDescriptors = [
  imageBasecardDescriptor,
  richtextBasecardDescriptor,
] satisfies BasecardDescriptor[];

const descriptorMap = new Map<string, BasecardDescriptor>();
const aliasMap = new Map<string, string>();

for (const descriptor of basecardDescriptors) {
  descriptorMap.set(descriptor.cardType, descriptor);
  aliasMap.set(descriptor.cardType, descriptor.cardType);
  for (const alias of descriptor.aliases ?? []) {
    aliasMap.set(alias, descriptor.cardType);
  }
}

export function getRegisteredBasecardDescriptors(): BasecardDescriptor[] {
  return basecardDescriptors;
}

export function normalizeBasecardType(cardType: string): string {
  return aliasMap.get(cardType) ?? cardType;
}

export function getBasecardDescriptor(cardType: string): BasecardDescriptor | null {
  return descriptorMap.get(normalizeBasecardType(cardType)) ?? null;
}

export function assertBasecardDescriptor(cardType: string): BasecardDescriptor {
  const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor(cardType);
  if (!descriptor) {
    throw new Error(`цЬкцЙ╛хИ░хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцППш┐░чмж: ${cardType}`);
  }
  return descriptor;
}

export function createInitialBasecardConfig(cardType: string, baseCardId: string): BasecardConfigRecord {
  const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor(cardType);
  if (!descriptor) {
    return { id: baseCardId };
  }
  return descriptor.createInitialConfig(baseCardId);
}

export function normalizeBasecardConfig(
  cardType: string,
  baseCardId: string,
  input: BasecardConfigRecord,
): BasecardConfigRecord {
  const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor(cardType);
  if (!descriptor) {
    return {
      ...input,
      id: baseCardId,
    };
  }
  return descriptor.normalizeConfig(input, baseCardId);
}

export function validateBasecardConfig(cardType: string, config: BasecardConfigRecord): EditorValidationResult {
  const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor(cardType);
  if (!descriptor) {
    return {
      valid: true,
      errors: {},
    };
  }
  return descriptor.validateConfig(config);
}
```
</details></tool-use>

export type BasecardConfigRecord = Record<string, unknown>;

export interface EditorValidationResult {
  valid: boolean;
  errors: Record<string, string>;
}

export interface BasecardResourceImportRequest {
  file: File;
  preferredPath?: string;
}

export interface BasecardResourceImportResult {
  path: string;
}

export interface BasecardPendingResourceImport {
  path: string;
  data: Uint8Array;
  mimeType?: string;
}

export interface BasecardResourceOperations {
  imports: BasecardPendingResourceImport[];
  deletions: string[];
}

export interface BasecardRenderContext {
  container: HTMLElement;
  config: BasecardConfigRecord;
  themeCssText?: string;
}

export interface BasecardEditorContext {
  container: HTMLElement;
  initialConfig: BasecardConfigRecord;
  onChange: (next: BasecardConfigRecord) => void;
  resolveResourceUrl?: (resourcePath: string) => Promise<string>;
  releaseResourceUrl?: (resourcePath: string) => Promise<void> | void;
  importResource?: (input: BasecardResourceImportRequest) => Promise<BasecardResourceImportResult>;
  deleteResource?: (resourcePath: string) => Promise<void>;
}

export interface BasecardDescriptor {
  pluginId: string;
  cardType: string;
  displayName: string;
  aliases?: string[];
  commitDebounceMs?: number;
  createInitialConfig: (baseCardId: string) => BasecardConfigRecord;
  normalizeConfig: (input: BasecardConfigRecord, baseCardId: string) => BasecardConfigRecord;
  validateConfig: (config: BasecardConfigRecord) => EditorValidationResult;
  collectResourcePaths?: (config: BasecardConfigRecord) => string[];
  renderView: (ctx: BasecardRenderContext) => (() => void) | void;
  renderEditor?: (ctx: BasecardEditorContext) => (() => void) | void;
}

import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { getBasecardDescriptor } from '../basecard-runtime/registry';
import { globalEventEmitter } from '../core/event-emitter';
import { useTranslation } from '../hooks/useTranslation';
import { fileService } from '../services/file-service';
import type { BasecardPendingResourceImport, BasecardResourceOperations } from '../basecard-runtime/contracts';
import type { EditorSessionSnapshot } from './contracts';
import { useEditorRuntime } from './context';

function joinPath(...parts: string[]): string {
  return parts.filter(Boolean).join('/').replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/\/+/g, '/');
}

function normalizeResourcePath(resourcePath: string): string | null {
  const normalized = resourcePath.replace(/\\/g, '/').trim();
  if (!normalized) {
    return null;
  }

  const segments = normalized
    .replace(/^\.?\//, '')
    .split('/')
    .filter((segment) => segment.length > 0 && segment !== '.');
  if (segments.length === 0 || segments.some((segment) => segment === '..')) {
    return null;
  }

  return segments.join('/');
}

function sanitizeImportedFileName(fileName: string): string {
  const normalizedPath = normalizeResourcePath(fileName);
  const candidate = normalizedPath?.split('/').pop() ?? fileName.trim();
  const sanitized = candidate
    .replace(/[\u0000-\u001f]/g, '')
    .replace(/[<>:"/\\|?*]/g, '')
    .trim();

  return sanitized.length > 0 ? sanitized : 'resource';
}

function createObjectUrl(resource: BasecardPendingResourceImport): string {
  const type = resource.mimeType?.trim() || 'application/octet-stream';
  const buffer = new ArrayBuffer(resource.data.byteLength);
  new Uint8Array(buffer).set(resource.data);
  return URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([buffer], { type }));
}

export interface EditorHostProps {
  cardId: string;
  cardPath: string;
  cardType: string;
  baseCardId: string;
  sourceConfig: Record<string, unknown>;
  onConfigChange?: (
    config: Record<string, unknown>,
    resourceOperations?: BasecardResourceOperations,
  ) => Promise<void> | void;
  onPluginLoaded?: (pluginInfo: { cardType: string; baseCardId: string }) => void;
  onPluginError?: (error: Error) => void;
}

export function EditorHost({
  cardId,
  cardPath,
  cardType,
  baseCardId,
  sourceConfig,
  onConfigChange,
  onPluginLoaded,
  onPluginError,
}: EditorHostProps) {
  const { t } = useTranslation();
  const store = useEditorRuntime();
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
  const descriptor = useMemo(() => getBasecardDescriptor(cardType), [cardType]);
  const sourceSignature = useMemo(() => JSON.stringify(sourceConfig), [sourceConfig]);
  const sessionKey = useMemo(() => store.createKey(cardId, baseCardId), [baseCardId, cardId, store]);

  const [snapshot, setSnapshot] = useState<EditorSessionSnapshot | null>(() => {
    if (!descriptor) {
      return null;
    }

    return store.ensureSession({
      cardId,
      baseCardId,
      cardType: descriptor.cardType,
      sourceConfig,
      descriptor,
    });
  });
  const [loadError, setLoadError] = useState<Error | null>(null);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
  const [renderRevision, setRenderRevision] = useState(0);
  const mountRevision = snapshot?.mountRevision ?? 0;
  const resolvedResourceUrlsRef = useRef(new Map<string, string>());
  const pendingResourceResolvesRef = useRef(new Map<string, Promise<string>>());

  const syncSnapshot = useCallback(() => {
    setSnapshot(store.getSnapshot(sessionKey));
  }, [sessionKey, store]);

  const releaseResolvedResourceUrl = useCallback((resourcePath: string) => {
    const url = resolvedResourceUrlsRef.current.get(resourcePath);
    if (!url) {
      return;
    }

    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    resolvedResourceUrlsRef.current.delete(resourcePath);
  }, []);

  const releaseAllResolvedResourceUrls = useCallback(() => {
    resolvedResourceUrlsRef.current.forEach((url) => {
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    });
    resolvedResourceUrlsRef.current.clear();
    pendingResourceResolvesRef.current.clear();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      releaseAllResolvedResourceUrls();
    };
  }, [releaseAllResolvedResourceUrls, sessionKey, cardPath]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!descriptor) {
      setSnapshot(null);
      return;
    }

    const nextSnapshot = store.ensureSession({
      cardId,
      baseCardId,
      cardType: descriptor.cardType,
      sourceConfig,
      descriptor,
    });
    setSnapshot(nextSnapshot);

    return store.subscribe(sessionKey, () => {
      syncSnapshot();
    });
  }, [baseCardId, cardId, cardType, descriptor, sessionKey, sourceConfig, sourceSignature, store, syncSnapshot]);

  const reportEditorActivity = useCallback(() => {
    globalEventEmitter.emit('card:editor-activity', {
      cardId,
      baseCardId,
      cardType,
      at: Date.now(),
    });
  }, [baseCardId, cardId, c

import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import type { CompositeInteractionPayload } from 'chips-sdk';
import { getBasecardDescriptor, normalizeBasecardConfig } from './registry';
import { createBasecardFrameThemeCss } from './theme-css';

export interface BasecardFrameStatus {
  state: 'loading' | 'ready' | 'error';
  height: number;
  errorMessage: string | null;
}

export interface BasecardFrameHostProps {
  baseCardId: string;
  cardType: string;
  config: Record<string, unknown>;
  resourceBaseUrl?: string;
  selectable?: boolean;
  themeCacheKey?: string;
  interactionPolicy: 'delegate' | 'native';
  onSelect?: () => void;
  onStatusChange?: (status: BasecardFrameStatus) => void;
  onInteraction?: (payload: CompositeInteractionPayload, frame: HTMLIFrameElement) => void;
}

const DEFAULT_STATUS: BasecardFrameStatus = {
  state: 'loading',
  height: 96,
  errorMessage: null,
};

function createFrameDocumentHtml(resourceBaseUrl?: string): string {
  return [
    '<!doctype html>',
    '<html>',
    '<head>',
    '<meta charset="utf-8" />',
    '<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />',
    ...(resourceBaseUrl ? [`<base href="${resourceBaseUrl}" />`] : []),
    '</head>',
    '<body></body>',
    '</html>',
  ].join('');
}

function measureFrameHeight(frame: HTMLIFrameElement): number {
  const doc = frame.contentDocument;
  if (!doc) {
    return DEFAULT_STATUS.height;
  }

  const body = doc.body;
  const root = doc.documentElement;
  return Math.max(
    1,
    Math.ceil(
      Math.max(
        body?.scrollHeight ?? 0,
        body?.offsetHeight ?? 0,
        root?.scrollHeight ?? 0,
        root?.offsetHeight ?? 0,
      ),
    ),
  );
}

export function BasecardFrameHost({
  baseCardId,
  cardType,
  config,
  resourceBaseUrl,
  selectable = false,
  themeCacheKey,
  interactionPolicy,
  onSelect,
  onStatusChange,
  onInteraction,
}: BasecardFrameHostProps) {
  const wrapperRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
  const iframeRef = useRef<HTMLIFrameElement | null>(null);
  const selectableRef = useRef(selectable);
  const onSelectRef = useRef(onSelect);
  const onInteractionRef = useRef(onInteraction);
  const interactionPolicyRef = useRef(interactionPolicy);
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<BasecardFrameStatus>(DEFAULT_STATUS);

  const descriptor = useMemo(() => getBasecardDescriptor(cardType), [cardType]);
  const normalizedConfig = useMemo(
    () => normalizeBasecardConfig(cardType, baseCardId, config),
    [baseCardId, cardType, config],
  );
  const configSignature = useMemo(() => JSON.stringify(normalizedConfig), [normalizedConfig]);
  const readyMinHeightStyle = useMemo(
    () => ({ minHeight: status.state === 'ready' ? '0px' : `${DEFAULT_STATUS.height}px` }),
    [status.state],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    onStatusChange?.(status);
  }, [onStatusChange, status]);

  useEffect(() => {
    selectableRef.current = selectable;
  }, [selectable]);

  useEffect(() => {
    onSelectRef.current = onSelect;
  }, [onSelect]);

  useEffect(() => {
    onInteractionRef.current = onInteraction;
  }, [onInteraction]);

  useEffect(() => {
    interactionPolicyRef.current = interactionPolicy;
  }, [interactionPolicy]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const frame = iframeRef.current;
    const wrapper = wrapperRef.current;
    if (!frame || !wrapper) {
      return;
    }

    if (!descriptor) {
      setStatus({
        state: 'error',
        height: DEFAULT_STATUS.height,
        errorMessage: `цЬкц│ихЖМхЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗч▒╗хЮЛ: ${cardType}`,
      });
      return;
    }

    let disposed = false;
    let renderCleanup: (() => void) | void;
    const cleanupTasks: Array<() => void> = [];

    setStatus({
      state: 'loading',
      height: DEFAULT_STATUS.height,
      errorMessage: null,
    });

    const mountFrame = () => {
      const doc = frame.contentDocument;
      const frameWindow = frame.contentWindow;
      if (!doc || !frameWindow) {
        throw new Error('хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗц╕▓цЯУчкЧхПгцЬкх░▒ч╗куАВ');
      }

      const container = doc.createElement('div');
      container.setAttribute('data-chips-basecard-frame-root', 'true');

      while (doc.body.firstChild) {
        doc.body.removeChild(doc.body.firstChild);
      }

      doc.body.appendChild(container);
      renderCleanup = descriptor.renderView({
        container,
        config: normalizedConfig,
        themeCssText: createBasecardFrameThemeCss(wrapper),
      });

      const applyMeasuredHeight = () => {
        if (disposed) {
          return;
        }

        const nextHeight = measureFrameHeight(frame);
        frame.style.height = `${nextHeight}px`;
        setStatus((current) => {
          if (
            current.state === 'ready' &&
            current.height === nextHeight &&
            current.errorMessage === null
          ) {
            return current;
          }

          return {
            state: 're

     1	import type { BasecardConfigRecord, BasecardDescriptor, EditorValidationResult } from './contracts';
     2	import { imageBasecardDescriptor } from './registrations/image';
     3	import { richtextBasecardDescriptor } from './registrations/richtext';
     4	
     5	const basecardDescriptors = [
     6	  imageBasecardDescriptor,
     7	  richtextBasecardDescriptor,
     8	] satisfies BasecardDescriptor[];
     9	
    10	const descriptorMap = new Map<string, BasecardDescriptor>();
    11	const aliasMap = new Map<string, string>();
    12	
    13	for (const descriptor of basecardDescriptors) {
    14	  descriptorMap.set(descriptor.cardType, descriptor);
    15	  aliasMap.set(descriptor.cardType, descriptor.cardType);
    16	  for (const alias of descriptor.aliases ?? []) {
    17	    aliasMap.set(alias, descriptor.cardType);
    18	  }
    19	}
    20	
    21	export function getRegisteredBasecardDescriptors(): BasecardDescriptor[] {
    22	  return basecardDescriptors;
    23	}
    24	
    25	export function normalizeBasecardType(cardType: string): string {
    26	  return aliasMap.get(cardType) ?? cardType;
    27	}
    28	
    29	export function getBasecardDescriptor(cardType: string): BasecardDescriptor | null {
    30	  return descriptorMap.get(normalizeBasecardType(cardType)) ?? null;
    31	}
    32	
    33	export function assertBasecardDescriptor(cardType: string): BasecardDescriptor {
    34	  const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor(cardType);
    35	  if (!descriptor) {
    36	    throw new Error(`цЬкцЙ╛хИ░хЯ║чбАхНбчЙЗцППш┐░чмж: ${cardType}`);
    37	  }
    38	  return descriptor;
    39	}
    40	
    41	export function createInitialBasecardConfig(cardType: string, baseCardId: string): BasecardConfigRecord {
    42	  const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor(cardType);
    43	  if (!descriptor) {
    44	    return { id: baseCardId };
    45	  }
    46	  return descriptor.createInitialConfig(baseCardId);
    47	}
    48	
    49	export function normalizeBasecardConfig(
    50	  cardType: string,
    51	  baseCardId: string,
    52	  input: BasecardConfigRecord,
    53	): BasecardConfigRecord {
    54	  const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor(cardType);
    55	  if (!descriptor) {
    56	    return {
    57	      ...input,
    58	      id: baseCardId,
    59	    };
    60	  }
    61	  return descriptor.normalizeConfig(input, baseCardId);
    62	}
    63	
    64	export function validateBasecardConfig(cardType: string, config: BasecardConfigRecord): EditorValidationResult {
    65	  const descriptor = getBasecardDescriptor(cardType);
    66	  if (!descriptor) {
    67	    return {
    68	      valid: true,
    69	      errors: {},
    70	    };
    71	  }
    72	  return descriptor.validateConfig(config);
    73	}

     7	import type { EditorSessionSnapshot } from './contracts';

     9	
    10	function joinPath(...parts: string[]): string {
    11	  return parts.filter(Boolean).join('/').replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/\/+/g, '/');
    12	}
    13	
    14	function normalizeResourcePath(resourcePath: string): string | null {
    15	  const normalized = resourcePath.replace(/\\/g, '/').trim();
    16	  if (!normalized) {
    17	    return null;
    18	  }
    19	
    20	  const segments = normalized
    21	    .replace(/^\.?\//, '')
    22	    .split('/')
    23	    .filter((segment) => segment.length > 0 && segment !== '.');
    24	  if (segments.length === 0 || segments.some((segment) => segment === '..')) {
    25	    return null;
    26	  }
    27	
    28	  return segments.join('/');
    29	}
    30	
    31	function sanitizeImportedFileName(fileName: string): string {
    32	  const normalizedPath = normalizeResourcePath(fileName);
    33	  const candidate = normalizedPath?.split('/').pop() ?? fileName.trim();
    34	  const sanitized = candidate
    35	    .replace(/[\u0000-\u001f]/g, '')
    36	    .replace(/[<>:"/\\|?*]/g, '')
    37	    .trim();
    38	
    39	  return sanitized.length > 0 ? sanitized : 'resource';
    40	}
    41	
    42	function createObjectUrl(resource: BasecardPendingResourceImport): string {
    43	  const type = resource.mimeType?.trim() || 'application/octet-stream';
    44	  const buffer = new ArrayBuffer(resource.data.byteLength);
    45	  new Uint8Array(buffer).set(resource.data);
    46	  return URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([buffer], { type }));
    47	}
    48

    45	function measureFrameHeight(frame: HTMLIFrameElement): number {
    46	  const doc = frame.contentDocument;
    47	  if (!doc) {
    48	    return DEFAULT_STATUS.height;
    49	  }
    50	
    51	  const body = doc.body;
    52	  const root = doc.documentElement;
    53	  return Math.max(
    54	    1,
    55	    Math.ceil(
    56	      Math.max(
    57	        body?.scrollHeight ?? 0,
    58	        body?.offsetHeight ?? 0,
    59	        root?.scrollHeight ?? 0,
    60	        root?.offsetHeight ?? 0,
    61	      ),
    62	    ),
    63	  );
    64	}
    65	
    66	export function BasecardFrameHost({
    67	  baseCardId,
    68	  cardType,
    69	  config,
    70	  resourceBaseUrl,
    71	  selectable = false,
    72	  themeCacheKey,
    73	  interactionPolicy,
    74	  onSelect,
    75	  onStatusChange,
    76	  onInteraction,
    77	}: BasecardFrameHostProps) {
    78	  const wrapperRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
    79	  const iframeRef = useRef<HTMLIFrameElement | null>(null);
    80	  const selectableRef = useRef(selectable);
    81	  const onSelectRef = useRef(onSelect);
    82	  const onInteractionRef = useRef(onInteraction);
    83	  const interactionPolicyRef = useRef(interactionPolicy);
    84	  const [status, setStatus] = useState<BasecardFrameStatus>(DEFAULT_STATUS);
    85	
    86	  const descriptor = useMemo(() => getBasecardDescriptor(cardType), [cardType]);
    87	  const normalizedConfig = useMemo(
    88	    () => normalizeBasecardConfig(cardType, baseCardId, config),
    89	    [baseCardId, cardType, config],
    90	  );
    91	  const configSignature = useMemo(() => JSON.stringify(normalizedConfig), [normalizedConfig]);
    92	  const readyMinHeightStyle = useMemo(
    93	    () => ({ minHeight: status.state === 'ready' ? '0px' : `${DEFAULT_STATUS.height}px` }),
    94	    [status.state],
    95	  );
    96	
    97	  useEffect(() => {
    98	    onStatusChange?.(status);
    99	  }, [onStatusChange, status]);
   100	
   101	  useEffect(() => {
   102	    selectableRef.current = selectable;
   103	  }, [selectable]);
   104	
   105	  useEffect(() => {
   106	    onSelectRef.current = onSelect;
   107	  }, [onSelect]);
   108	
   109	  useEffect(() => {
   110	    onInteractionRef.current = onInteraction;
   111	  }, [onInteraction]);
   112

   114	    interactionPolicyRef.current = interactionPolicy;

   119	    const wrapper = wrapperRef.current;
   120	    if (!frame || !wrapper) {

хжВцЮЬф╜ачбошодцМЙш┐Щф╕кчЫоцаЗцОиш┐Ыя╝Мф╕Лф╕Ацнеф╕НшпехЕИцФ╣чО░цЬЙч╝Цш╛Сх╝ХцУОф╗гчаБя╝МшАМх║ФшпехЕИчлЛцнгх╝ПцЮ╢цЮДх╖ехНХя╝МхоЪф╣Й Host хНХхНбхНПшоохТМш┐Бчз╗ш╛╣чХМуАВ
